Leveraging the structural stability of the personality space, we show that vectors extracted $\textit{a priori}$ from an instruct-tuned model transfer zero-shot to successfully regulate EM in corrupted fine-tunes. Overall, our findings suggest that harmful fine-tuning does not overwrite a model's internal representation of personality, allowing conserved representations to serve as robust, cross-distribution guardrails.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，对大型语言模型进行微调可能引发广泛的有害行为。通过构建模型的潜在人格空间，发现'邪恶'人格向量和语义效价向量可作为内在防护机制，能够有效控制错位行为，且这些防护机制在不同模型间具有良好的迁移性。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在经过良性窄数据微调后会出现有害行为的漏洞，这种被称为应急错位的现象虽然被认为与激活空间中的特定方向有关，但与模型整体人格特质的关系尚未明确。
AI.method: 通过大五人格、黑暗三联征和LLM特定行为建立模型的潜在人格空间映射，设计因果干预方法，验证'邪恶'人格向量和语义效价向量(SVV)的防护效果，并测试这些向量的跨模型迁移能力。
AI.result: 发现人格空间的语义几何结构在不同对齐模型及其受损微调版本间高度稳定；消融'邪恶'向量和SVV会显著增加错位率(>40%)，而放大它们可将失败模式抑制到3%以下；从指令调优模型提取的向量能够零迁移控制其他受损模型的应急错位。
AI.conclusion: 有害微调不会覆盖模型的内部人格表征，这些保守表征可作为强大且跨分布的防护机制，为解决大型语言模型的安全性问题提供了新的思路。

title: Dual-Path Hyperprior Informed Deep Unfolding Network for Image Compressive Sensing
summary: Recent Deep Unfolding Networks (DUNs) have significantly advanced Compressive Sensing (CS) by integrating iterative optimization with deep networks. However, existing DUNs still suffer from two challenges: 1) Reliance on a single measurement stream, which limits effective information interaction across distinct measurement subsets. 2) Uniform processing of all image regions, which overlooks varying reconstruction difficulties induced by diverse textures. To address these limitations, a novel Dual-Path Hyperprior Informed Deep Unfolding Network (DPH-DUN) is proposed, which partitions measurements into double subsets to enable hyperprior-guided reconstruction via a dual-path architecture. In the Deep Hyperprior Learning branch, a series of lightweight neural modules are designed to efficiently generate hyperprior knowledge of different domains, enabling collaborative guidance for the CS reconstruction. In the Hyperprior Informed Reconstruction branch, a deep unfolding framework with hyperprior guidance is constructed to iteratively refine reconstruction. Specifically, i) in the gradient descent step, a Hyperprior Informed Step Size Generation network is designed to dynamically generate spatially varying step maps, enabling adaptive fine-grained gradient updates. ii) In the proximal mapping step, two well-designed hyperprior informed attention mechanisms are introduced to dynamically focus on challenging regions via gradient-based hard and soft attentions, facilitating CS reconstruction accuracy. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed DPH-DUN outperforms existing CS methods.

AI.tldr: DPH-DUN是一种新颖的双路径超先验深度展开网络，通过双测量子集和超先验引导机制，解决了现有DUNs在信息交互和区域处理方面的局限性，显著提升了压缩感知重建性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度展开网络存在两大问题：1) 依赖单一测量流，限制了不同测量子集间的有效信息交互；2) 对图像所有区域进行统一处理，忽视了不同纹理区域导致的重建难度差异。
AI.method: 提出DPH-DUN网络，采用双路径架构：1) 深度超先验学习分支设计轻量级神经模块生成不同域的超先验知识；2) 超先验引导重建分支构建深度展开框架，包含超先验引导的步长生成网络实现空间变化的梯度更新，以及基于梯度的硬/软注意力机制动态聚焦困难区域。
AI.result: 大量实验证明，所提出的DPH-DUN方法在压缩感知重建任务上优于现有的CS方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过双测量子集划分和超先验引导机制，DPH-DUN有效解决了传统DUNs的信息交互限制和统一处理问题，实现了更精确的自适应压缩感知重建。

title: Towards Understanding Continual Factual Knowledge Acquisition of Language Models: From Theory to Algorithm
summary: Continual Pre-Training (CPT) is essential for enabling Language Models (LMs) to integrate new knowledge without erasing old. While classical CPT techniques like data replay have become the standard paradigm, the mechanisms underlying how LMs acquire and retain facts over time, termed as continual Factual Knowledge Acquisition (cFKA), remain unclear. In this work, we present a theoretical framework that characterizes the training dynamics of cFKA using a single-layer Transformer, offering a unified explanation for the behavior of representative CPT methods. Our analysis reveals that regularization-based methods merely adjust the convergence rate of parameters without altering the inherent forgetting tendency, whereas data replay methods succeed in shifting convergence dynamics and stabilizing pretrained knowledge. Building on these insights, we propose a novel generative data replay approach, called \textbf{S}electing \textbf{T}okens via attenti\textbf{O}n \textbf{C}ontribution~(STOC), which identifies influential factual snippets to guide replay data generation. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets validate our findings and demonstrate that STOC effectively enhances cFKA by mitigating catastrophic forgetting.

AI.tldr: 本文通过理论框架揭示了语言模型在持续预训练中获取和保留事实知识的机制，并提出了基于注意力贡献选择数据重放的新方法STOC。
AI.motivation: 传统的持续预训练技术如数据重放已成为标准范式，但对于语言模型如何随时间获取和保留事实知识（cFKA）的内在机制尚不清楚，需要深入理解其原理以改进技术。
AI.method: 使用单层Transformer建立cFKA训练动态的理论框架，分析各种CPT方法的行为；基于分析发现数据重放可以通过改变收敛动态来稳定预训练知识，进而提出STOC方法，通过注意力贡献识别有影响力的事实片段来指导重放数据生成。
AI.result: 理论分析表明正则化方法仅调整参数收敛率而不改变遗忘倾向，而数据重放方法能改变收敛动态并稳定知识；在合成和真实数据集上的实验验证了发现，STOC有效增强了cFKA并缓解了灾难性遗忘。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为持续事实知识获取提供了统一的理论解释，揭示了不同CPT方法的工作机制，并基于理论提出了有效的数据重放方法STOC，为持续预训练的发展提供了新的见解和实用方案。

title: KAN Text to Vision? The Exploration of Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks for Multi-Scale Sequence-Based Pose Animation from Sign Language Notation
summary: Sign language production from symbolic notation offers a scalable route to accessible sign animation. We present KANMultiSign, a multi-scale sequence generator that translates HamNoSys notation into two-dimensional human pose sequences. Our framework makes two complementary contributions. First, we introduce a coarse-to-fine generation strategy with multi-scale supervision: the model is first guided by an intermediate body--hand--face scaffold to encourage global structural coherence, and then refines fine-grained hand articulation to improve finger-level detail. Second, we investigate integrating Kolmogorov--Arnold Network modules into a Transformer backbone, using learnable univariate function primitives to model the highly non-linear mapping from discrete phonological symbols to continuous body kinematics with a compact parameterization. Experiments on multiple public corpora spanning Polish, German, Greek, and French sign languages show consistent reductions in dynamic time warping based joint error compared with a strong notation-to-pose baseline, while using substantially fewer parameters. Controlled ablations further indicate that KAN-based variants substantially reduce parameter count while maintaining competitive performance when coupled with multi-scale supervision, rather than serving as the main driver of accuracy gains. These findings position multi-scale supervision as the key mechanism for improving notation-conditioned pose generation, with KAN offering a compact alternative for efficient modeling. Our code will be publicly available.

AI.tldr: KANMultiSign是一个从HamNoSys符号到2D人体姿态序列的多尺度生成模型，通过粗到细生成策略和KANTransformer架构，实现了参数更少但性能更好的手语动画生成。
AI.motivation: 手语生产需要可扩展的解决方案，传统的符号到姿态转换方法在精度和参数效率方面存在局限，需要新的方法来提高手语动画的质量和可访问性。
AI.method: 提出两个关键技术：1) 粗到细的多尺度生成策略，通过身体-手部-面部脚手架引导全局结构，再细化手部关节细节；2) 在Transformer中集成KAN模块，用可学习的单变量函数原语建模从符号到连续运动的非线性映射。
AI.result: 在波兰语、德语、希腊语和法语手语数据集上，与强基线相比显著降低了基于DTW的关节误差，同时大幅减少了参数数量。消融实验表明多尺度监督是主要性能驱动因素。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度监督是改进符号条件姿态生成的关键机制，KAN提供了一种紧凑高效的建模替代方案，为可扩展的手语动画生成提供了新的技术路线。

title: A Single-Layer Model Can Do Language Modeling
summary: Modern language models scale depth by stacking layers, each holding its own state - a per-layer KV cache in transformers, a per-layer matrix in Mamba, Gated DeltaNet (GDN), RWKV, and xLSTM. Biological systems lean heavily on recurrence rather than on stacking. We ask how far that shape can go on language modeling. We propose Grounded Prediction Networks (GPN): one state vector revisited at every step through a single recurrent block - one FFN, one shared matrix memory. At 130M parameters, a 1-layer GPN+M reaches FineWeb-Edu perplexity 18.06, within 13% of a 12-layer Transformer++ (16.05) and 18% of a 10-layer GDN (15.34); a 2-layer variant closes the gap to 6%/11%. We do not match the deep baselines. Because the working context is a single vector, we can directly inspect its geometry: a persistent default-token direction, a content-bearing horizon of tens of tokens, and memory heads that split spontaneously into fast and slow retention pools.

AI.tldr: 提出Grounded Prediction Networks (GPN)架构，通过单一循环状态替代传统语言模型的多层堆叠，在130M参数规模下接近复杂基线模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统语言模型通过堆叠多层来扩展深度，每层保持独立状态，这与生物系统主要依赖循环而非堆叠的方式不同。作者探索这种循环导向的架构在语言建模上的潜力。
AI.method: 设计单状态向量的GPN架构，通过单一循环块（一个FFN和一个共享矩阵内存）在每个时间步重复使用状态向量，替代常规的多层结构。
AI.result: 130M参数的单层GPN+M在FineWeb-Edu数据集上达到18.06困惑度，相当于12层Transformer++的87%和10层GDN的82%性能；两层版本将差距缩小到94%/89%。
AI.conclusion: 虽然未完全超越深层基线，但简单的单状态架构展现了良好潜力。单一状态向量便于几何分析，揭示出持续默认token方向、数十token的内容承载范围以及自发的快慢记忆池分化。

title: FPGA-Based Hardware Architecture for Contrast Maximization in Event-Based Vision
summary: This paper presents a hardware architecture that implements the Contrast Maximization (CM) algorithm in Field-Programmable Gate Array (FPGA) resources for event-based vision systems. CM estimates motion parameters by maximizing the contrast of an Image of Warped Events (IWE) reconstructed from asynchronous event streams. Event-based vision sensors generate sparse data with high temporal resolution and low spatial redundancy, which makes them well suited for hardware processing. The deterministic, massively parallel structure of the FPGA is leveraged to design a deeply pipelined architecture capable of high-throughput, energy-efficient processing suitable for real-time embedded applications. This paper details the hardware modules responsible for event warping, contrast computation, and iterative optimization, discusses key implementation decisions, and presents the hardware-aware optimization method used in the design. Experimental results demonstrate a substantial speed and efficiency improvement over CPU- and GPU-based implementations, with motion parameter estimation executing over 200 times faster. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first hardware architecture enabling acceleration of CM algorithm computations. Its performance is evaluated in terms of processing speed, energy efficiency, and hardware resource utilization. The proposed design is validated using an event-based object tracking application. The results confirm that the architecture provides a solid foundation for real-time motion estimation in high-speed, low-power embedded systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在FPGA上实现对比度最大化(CM)算法的硬件架构，用于事件视觉系统的运动参数估计，比CPU/GPU实现快200倍以上。
AI.motivation: 事件视觉传感器生成的稀疏数据具有高时间分辨率和低空间冗余特性，适合硬件处理。现有软件实现无法满足实时嵌入式应用对速度和能效的要求，需要专门的硬件加速解决方案。
AI.method: 设计了一个深度流水线的FPGA架构，包含事件扭曲、对比度计算和迭代优化模块。利用FPGA确定性的大规模并行结构，实现了高吞吐量和能效处理。采用硬件感知的优化方法来加速CM算法计算。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该架构在处理速度、能效和硬件资源利用率方面表现优异，运动参数估计执行速度比CPU和GPU实现快200倍以上。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个能够加速CM算法计算的硬件架构，为高速、低功耗嵌入式系统中的实时运动估计提供了坚实基础。通过事件目标跟踪应用验证了设计的有效性。

title: When Can Digital Personas Reliably Approximate Human Survey Findings?
summary: Digital personas powered by Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly proposed as substitutes for human survey respondents, yet it remains unclear when they can reliably approximate human survey findings. We answer this question using the LISS panel, constructing personas from respondents' background variables and pre-2023 survey histories, then testing them against the same respondents' held-out post-cutoff answers. Across four persona architectures, three LLMs, and two prediction tasks, we assess performance at the question, respondent, distributional, equity, and clustering levels. Digital personas improve alignment with human response distributions, especially in domains tied to stable attributes and values, but remain limited for individual prediction and fail to recover multivariate respondent structure. Retrieval-augmented architectures provide the clearest gains, but performance depends more on human response structure than on model choice: personas perform best for low-variability questions and common respondent patterns, and worst for subjective, heterogeneous, or rare responses. Our results provide practical guidance on when digital personas could be appropriate for survey research and when human validation remains necessary.

AI.tldr: 研究表明，由LLM驱动的数字人设能够改善与人类受访者回答分布的一致性，但在个体预测和恢复多元受访者结构方面仍存在局限，检索增强架构效果最佳。
AI.motivation: 随着大型语言模型驱动的数字人设越来越多地被提议作为人类受访者的替代品，但尚不清楚它们何时能够可靠地近似人类调查结果。研究者需要明确数字人设的适用边界和使用条件。
AI.method: 研究使用LISS面板数据，从受访者的背景变量和2023年前调查历史构建人设，然后在四个架构、三个LLM和两个预测任务下，测试这些数字人设与同一受访者保留的截至截止日期后的回答，从问题、受访者、分布、公平和聚类等多个层面评估性能。
AI.result: 数字人设在改善与人类回答分布一致性方面表现良好，尤其是在与稳定属性和价值观相关的领域，但在个体预测方面仍然有限，无法恢复多元受访者结构。检索增强架构提供最清晰的性能提升，但性能更依赖于人类回答结构而非模型选择。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为数字人设在调查研究中的使用提供了实用指导：数字人设适用于低变异性问题和常见受访者模式，但主观性、异质性或罕见响应的场景仍需要人工验证。

title: DeformMaster: An Interactive Physics-Neural World Model for Deformable Objects from Videos
summary: World models for deformable objects should recover not only geometry and appearance, but also underlying physical dynamics, interaction grounding, and material behavior. Learning such a model from real videos is challenging because deformable linear, planar, and volumetric objects evolve under high-dimensional deformation, noisy interactions, and complex material response. The model must therefore infer a physical state from visual observations, roll it forward under new interactions, and render the resulting dynamics with high visual fidelity. We present DeformMaster, a video-derived interactive physics--neural world model that turns real interaction videos into an online interactive model of deformable objects within a unified dynamics-and-appearance framework. DeformMaster preserves structured physical rollout while using a neural residual to compensate for unmodeled effects, grounds sparse hand motion as distributed compliant actuator for hand--continuum interaction, represents material response with spatially varying constitutive experts, and drives high-fidelity 4D appearance from the predicted physical evolution. Experiments on real-world deformable-object sequences demonstrate DeformMaster's ability to roll out future dynamics and render dynamic appearance, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines while supporting novel action rollout, material-parameter variation, and dynamic novel-view synthesis.

AI.tldr: DeformMaster是一个从真实视频中学习的交互式物理-神经世界模型，能够统一建模可变形物体的动力学和外观，支持物理状态预测和新动作推演。
AI.motivation: 现有可变形物体世界模型面临高维变形、噪声交互和复杂材料响应的挑战。需要从视觉观察推断物理状态，在新交互下进行前向推演，并以高视觉保真度渲染动态外观，这对真实视频学习提出了很高要求。
AI.method: DeformMaster采用统一的动力学-外观框架，保持结构化物理推演的同时使用神经残差补偿未建模效应；将稀疏手部运动建模为分布式柔顺执行器；使用空间变化的本构专家表示材料响应；从预测的物理演化驱动高保真4D外观渲染。
AI.result: 在真实可变形物体序列实验中，DeformMaster成功实现了未来动力学推演和动态外观渲染，在性能上超越现有基线方法，同时支持新颖动作推演、材料参数变化和动态新视角合成。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为可变形物体建立了完整的物理-视觉建模框架，通过结构化物理学习与神经补偿的结合，实现了从视频到可交互世界模型的端到端学习，为机器人操作和虚拟现实等应用提供了技术基础。

title: Prompt-Activation Duality: Improving Activation Steering via Attention-Level Interventions
comment: 23 pages, 5 figures. This paper proposes GCAD, an attention-level activation steering method for more stable multi-turn behavior control
summary: Activation steering controls language model behavior by adding directions to internal representations at inference time, but standard residual-stream steering can fail in stateful dialogue. We identify KV-cache contamination as a key failure mode: steered token states are stored and repeatedly reused, turning a local perturbation into cumulative coherence degradation. To address this challenge, we propose Gated Cropped Attention-Delta steering (GCAD), which extracts steering signals from system-prompt contributions to self-attention and applies them with token-level gating. Across persona-steering experiments, GCAD preserves trait control while substantially improving long-horizon coherence. On the main multi-turn benchmark, GCAD improves average coherence drift from -18.6 to -1.9 and raises turn-10 trait expression from 78.0 to 93.1. These results suggest that activation steering becomes more reliable when interventions follow the prompt-mediated pathways that models already use for behavioral control.

AI.tldr: 这项研究提出了GCAD方法来解决对话中激活转向的失效问题，通过KV缓存污染机制分析和门控注意力增量转向，显著提升了长对话的一致性和特征表达能力。
AI.motivation: 传统的残差流激活转向在有状态的对话中会失效，因为转向的token状态会被存储并重复使用，导致局部扰动累积为严重的连贯性退化，这种KV缓存污染是主要的失效模式。
AI.method: 提出门控裁剪注意力增量转向(GCAD)方法，从系统提示对自注意力的贡献中提取转向信号，并使用token级别的门控机制来应用这些信号，避免KV缓存中的状态污染。
AI.result: 在人格转向实验中，GCAD在保持特征控制的同时大幅改善了长期连贯性。基准测试显示，一致性漂移从-18.6提升到-1.9，第10轮的特征表达能力从78.0提升到93.1。
AI.conclusion: 激活转向在 intervention 遵循模型已有的行为控制路径时变得更加可靠，这为改进语言模型的行为控制方法提供了重要指导。

title: From Pixels to Concepts: Do Segmentation Models Understand What They Segment?
summary: Segmentation is a fundamental vision task underlying numerous downstream applications. Recent promptable segmentation models, such as Segment Anything Model 3 (SAM3), extend segmentation from category-agnostic mask prediction to concept-guided localization conditioned on high-level textual prompts. However, existing benchmarks primarily evaluate mask accuracy or object presence, leaving unclear whether these models faithfully ground the queried concept or instead rely on visually salient but semantically misleading cues. We introduce CAFE: \textbf{C}ounterfactual \textbf{A}ttribute \textbf{F}actuality \textbf{E}valuation, a novel benchmark for evaluating concept-faithful segmentation in promptable segmentation models. Our \textbf{CAFE} is built on attribute-level counterfactual manipulation: the target region and ground-truth mask are preserved, while attributes such as surface appearance, context, or material composition are modified to introduce misleading semantic cues. The benchmark contains 2,146 paired test samples, each consisting of a target image, a ground-truth mask, a positive prompt, and a misleading negative prompt. These samples cover three counterfactual categories: Superficial Mimicry (\textbf{SM}), Context Conflict (\textbf{CC}), and Ontological Conflict (\textbf{OC}). We evaluate various model types and sizes on our CAFE. Experiments reveal a systematic gap between localization quality and concept discrimination: models often generate accurate masks even for misleading prompts, suggesting that strong mask prediction does not necessarily imply faithful semantic grounding. Our CAFE provides a controlled benchmark for diagnosing whether promptable segmentation models perform concept-faithful grounding rather than shortcut-driven mask retrieval.

AI.tldr: CAFE是一个基于反事实属性操作的概念忠实分割评估基准，用于检验提示分割模型是否真正理解概念语义，而不是依赖视觉显著性捷径。
AI.motivation: 现有的提示分割模型评估主要关注掩码准确性或物体存在性，无法确定模型是否忠实于查询概念，还是仅仅依赖视觉上显著但语义误导的线索。需要专门的评估基准来检验概念忠诚度。
AI.method: 构建CAFE基准，通过属性级反事实操作（保留目标区域和真实掩码，修改表面外观、上下文或材料成分等属性）创建误导性语义线索。基准包含2,146对测试样本，涵盖三个反事实类别：表层模仿(SM)、上下文冲突(CC)和本体冲突(OC)。
AI.result: 实验显示定位质量与概念判别之间存在系统性差距：即使对于误导性提示，模型也常常生成准确的掩码，表明强掩码预测能力不一定意味着忠实的语义基础建立。
AI.conclusion: CAFE提供了一个受控的评估基准，用于诊断提示分割模型是进行概念忠实的基础建立，还是依赖捷径驱动的掩码检索，填补了现有评估方法的空白。

title: Why Low-Resource NLP Needs More Than Cross-Lingual Transfer: Lessons Learned from Luxembourgish
comment: Accepted at BigPicture Workshop 2026 (co-located with ACL 2026)
summary: Cross-lingual transfer has become a central paradigm for extending natural language processing (NLP) technologies to low-resource languages. By leveraging supervision from high-resource languages, multilingual language models can achieve strong task performance with little or no labeled target-language data. However, it remains unclear to what extent cross-lingual transfer can substitute for language-specific efforts. In this paper, we synthesize prior research findings and data collection results on Luxembourgish, which, despite its typological proximity to high-resource languages and its presence in a multilingual context, remains insufficiently represented in modern NLP technologies. Across findings, we observe a fundamental interdependence between cross-lingual transfer and language-specific efforts. Cross-lingual transfer can substantially improve target-language performance, but its success depends critically on the availability of sufficiently high-quality, task-aligned target-language data. At the same time, such resources, particularly in low-resource settings, are typically too limited in scale to drive strong performance on their own. Instead, such resources reach their full potential only when leveraged within a cross-lingual framework. We therefore argue that cross-lingual transfer and language-specific efforts should not be viewed as competing alternatives. Instead, they function as complementary components of a sustainable low-resource NLP pipeline. Based on these insights, we provide practical guidelines for integrating and balancing cross-lingual transfer with language-specific development in sustainable low-resource NLP pipelines.

AI.tldr: 本文通过研究卢森堡语案例，发现跨语言迁移与语言特定工作存在根本相互依赖关系，两者是可持续低资源NLP流程中的互补而非替代关系。
AI.motivation: 虽然跨语言迁移已成为扩展NLP技术到低资源语言的重要范式，但尚不清楚跨语言迁移在多大程度上可以替代特定语言的努力。研究以卢森堡语为案例，探讨在高资源语言环境下的低资源语言发展中迁移学习的作用。
AI.method: 综合分析前期研究成果和卢森堡语的数据收集结果，考察跨语言迁移与语言特定工作之间的相互依赖关系，评估两者在任务性能提升中的作用机制。
AI.result: 研究发现跨语言迁移能显著提升目标语言性能，但其成功关键依赖于高质量、任务对齐的目标语言数据；同时，这些有限的资源仅能在跨语言框架内发挥最大潜力。跨语言迁移和语言特定工作具有互补性而非竞争性。
AI.conclusion: 提出了将跨语言迁移与语言特定开发相结合的实践指导原则，为构建可持续的低资源NLP流程提供了理论依据和实用框架。

title: SoccerLens: Grounded Soccer Video Understanding Beyond Accuracy
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have recently shown strong potential in soccer video understanding. However, given the high complexity of soccer videos due to large viewpoint variations, rapid shot transitions, and cluttered scenes, it remains unclear on whether VLMs rely on meaningful visual evidence or exploit spurious correlations and shortcut learning. Existing evaluation protocols focus primarily on classification accuracy and do not assess visual grounding. To address this limitation, we introduce SoccerLens, a benchmark for grounded soccer video understanding. The benchmark contains annotated video segments spanning $13$ common soccer events, with structured visual cues organized into three levels of semantic relevance. We further extend the attribution method of Chefer [arXiv:2103.15679] to jointly model spatial and temporal attention, and introduce evaluation metrics that measure whether model attention aligns with annotated cues or drifts toward spurious regions. Our evaluation of state-of-the-art soccer VLMs shows that, despite strong classification accuracy, current models fail to exceed $50\%$ grounding performance even under the loosest cue definitions and consistently underutilize temporal information. These results reveal a substantial gap between predictive performance and true visual grounding, highlighting the need for grounded evaluation in complex spatio-temporal domains such as soccer.

AI.tldr: 尽管足球视频理解模型在分类准确率上表现良好，但研究发现它们在视觉基础能力方面严重不足，无法有效捕捉有意义的视觉证据。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉语言模型（VLM）在足球视频理解中展现出潜力，但由于足球视频存在视角变化大、镜头切换快、场景复杂等特点，目前尚不清楚模型是否依赖有意义的视觉证据还是利用虚假关联。现有评估协议主要关注分类准确率，缺乏对视觉基础的评估。
AI.method: 提出SoccerLens基准数据集，包含13种常见足球事件的视频片段，并将视觉线索按语义相关性分为三个层次。扩展Chefer的归因方法，联合建模时空注意力，引入评估指标衡量模型注意力与标注线索的对齐程度。
AI.result: 对最先进的足球VLM评估显示，尽管分类准确率很高，但即使在最宽松的线索定义下，当前模型的基础性能也不超过50%，并且持续低估时间信息的使用。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了预测性能与真实视觉基础之间的巨大差距，强调了在足球等复杂时空领域进行基础评估的必要性。

title: Towards On-Policy Data Evolution for Visual-Native Multimodal Deep Search Agents
summary: Multimodal deep search requires an agent to solve open-world problems by chaining search, tool use, and visual reasoning over evolving textual and visual context. Two bottlenecks limit current systems. First, existing tool-use harnesses treat images returned by search, browsing, or transformation as transient outputs, so intermediate visual evidence cannot be re-consumed by later tools. Second, training data is usually built by fixed curation recipes that cannot track the target agent's evolving capability. To address these challenges, we first introduce a visual-native agent harness centered on an image bank reference protocol, which registers every tool-returned image as an addressable reference and makes intermediate visual evidence reusable by later tools. On top of this harness, On-policy Data Evolution (ODE) runs a closed-loop data generator that refines itself across rounds from rollouts of the policy being trained. This per-round refinement makes each round's data target what the current policy still needs to learn. The same framework supports both diverse supervised fine-tuning data and policy-aware reinforcement learning data curation, covering the full training lifecycle of the target agent. Across 8 multimodal deep search benchmarks, ODE improves the Qwen3-VL-8B agent from 24.9% to 39.0% on average, surpassing Gemini-2.5 Pro in standard agent-workflow setting (37.9%). At 30B, ODE raises the average score from 30.6% to 41.5%. Further analyses validate the effectiveness of image-bank reuse, especially on complex tasks requiring iterative visual refinement, while rollout-feedback evolution yields more grounded SFT traces and better policy-matched RL tasks than static synthesis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ODE（On-policy Data Evolution）的框架，通过图像银行参考协议和闭环数据生成机制，显著提升了多模态深度搜索智能体的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态深度搜索系统存在两个主要瓶颈：1）工具返回的图像被视为临时输出，无法被后续工具重用；2）静态的训练数据无法跟踪智能体演化的能力。这些问题限制了智能体在开放世界问题解决中的表现。
AI.method: 提出以图像银行参考协议为核心的视觉原生智能体框架，将所有工具返回的图像注册为可寻址引用；在此基础上运行ODE闭环数据生成器，通过策略推演实现跨轮次的自适应数据优化，支持监督微调和强化学习的全生命周期训练。
AI.result: 在8个多模态深度搜索基准测试中，ODE将Qwen3-VL-8B智能体的平均性能从24.9%提升至39.0%，超越了Gemini-2.5 Pro（37.9%）；30B模型从30.6%提升至41.5%。分析验证了图像银行重用和推演反馈演化的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过图像银行重用机制和策略驱动的数据演化方法，成功解决了多模态深度搜索中的视觉证据重用和数据适配问题，为大语言模型的智能体训练提供了新的解决方案。

title: DAP: Doppler-aware Point Network for Heterogeneous mmWave Action Recognition
summary: Millimeter-wave (mmWave) radar provides privacy-preserving sensing and is valuable for human action recognition (HAR). Existing mmWave point cloud datasets are limited in scale and mostly collected under homogeneous single-source settings, preventing current methods from handling real-world distribution shifts caused by heterogeneous radar sources, such as different devices and frequency bands. To address this, we introduce UniMM-HAR, the largest and first mmWave point cloud HAR dataset for heterogeneous multi-source scenarios, standardizing three distinct radar configurations to realistically evaluate cross-source generalization. We further propose the Doppler-aware Point Cloud Network (DAP-Net) to tackle heterogeneity challenges. DAP-Net enhances intra-modal representations and performs cross-modal alignment to learn source-invariant action semantics. Leveraging action-consistent spatio-temporal Doppler patterns as anchors, the Dual-space Doppler Reparameterization (D2R) module performs sample-adaptive geometric densification and Doppler-guided feature recalibration, while the Text Alignment Module (TAM) provides stable semantic anchors via a pretrained textual space. Experiments show that DAP-Net significantly outperforms existing methods under heterogeneous radar settings, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy and strong cross-source robustness.

AI.tldr: UniMM-HAR是首个大规模异构多源毫米波雷达点云动作识别数据集，配合提出的DAP-Net网络，通过多普勒感知和跨模态对齐实现了鲁棒的跨源动作识别。
AI.motivation: 现有毫米波雷达点云数据集规模有限，多在单一同质环境下采集，无法应对真实世界中由不同设备和频带引起的分布偏移问题。
AI.method: 提出DAP-Net网络，包含双空间多普勒重参数化模块（D2R）进行样本自适应几何密集化和多普勒引导特征重校准，以及文本对齐模块（TAM）利用预训练文本空间提供稳定的语义锚点。
AI.result: 实验表明DAP-Net在异构雷达设置下显著优于现有方法，实现了最先进的准确率和强大的跨源鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过构建大规模异构数据集UniMM-HAR和创新的多普勒感知网络架构DAP-Net，成功解决了毫米波雷达动作识别中的跨源泛化问题，为实际应用奠定了基础。

title: Training-Free Cultural Alignment of Large Language Models via Persona Disagreement
summary: Large language models increasingly mediate decisions that turn on moral judgement, yet a growing body of evidence shows that their implicit preferences are not culturally neutral. Existing cultural alignment methods either require per-country preference data and fine-tuning budgets or assume white-box access to model internals that commercial APIs do not expose. In this work, we focus on this realistic black-box, public-data-only regime and observe that within-country sociodemographic disagreement, not consensus, is the primary steering signal. We introduce DISCA (Disagreement-Informed Steering for Cultural Alignment), an inference-time method that instantiates each country as a panel of World-Values-Survey-grounded persona agents and converts their disagreement into a bounded, loss-averse logit correction. Across 20 countries and 7 open-weight backbones (2B--70B), DISCA reduces cultural misalignment on MultiTP by 10--24% on the six backbones >=3.8B, and 2--7% on open-ended scenarios, without changing any weights. Our results suggest that inference-time calibration is a scalable alternative to fine-tuning for serving the long tail of global moral preferences.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出DISCA方法，通过推理时校准而非微调来减少大语言模型的文化偏见，利用价值观调查数据构建多元化代理人面板，将社会人口统计学分歧转化为模型输出校正。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在道德判断决策中发挥日益重要作用，但研究显示其隐含偏好并非文化中立。现有文化对齐方法要么需要每个国家的偏好数据和微调预算，要么需要商业API不提供的白盒模型内部访问权限。本研究聚焦于现实的黑盒、仅公共数据场景。
AI.method: 提出DISCA（分歧知情的文化对齐引导）方法，这是一个推理时方法：1）将每个国家实例化为基于世界价值观调查的多元化代理人面板；2）将这些代理人之间的分歧转化为有界的、损失规避的logit校正。该方法在不改变模型权重的情况下实现文化对齐。
AI.result: 在20个国家、7个开放权重模型（2B-70B）上的实验显示，DISCA在6个>=3.8B模型上将MultiTP上的文化错配减少了10-24%，在开放场景中减少了2-7%，且无需任何权重微调。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明，推理时校准是服务全球道德偏好长尾场景下微调的可扩展替代方案，为解决大语言模型在全球文化差异下的对齐问题提供了新思路。

title: Reflection Anchors for Propagation-Aware Visual Retention in Long-Chain Multimodal Reasoning
summary: Long chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning improves large vision--language models, but visual information often fades during generation, limiting long-horizon multimodal reasoning. Existing methods either re-inject vision at inference or train policies for stronger grounding, but where to intervene relies on perception heuristics rather than principled gain analysis, and how local visual influence propagates remains implicit. We study this problem from an information-theoretic standpoint and derive a lower bound on the downstream visual gain of a one-step intervention, which suggests two factors: local branching room (token entropy) and downstream visual propagation potential (suffix divergence from a vision-marginalized reference). Guided by this analysis, we propose reflection-anchor policy optimization (RAPO), a GRPO-based policy optimization method that selects high-entropy reflection anchors and optimizes a chain-masked finite-window KL surrogate for downstream visual dependence. Experiments on reasoning-intensive and general-domain benchmarks show that RAPO delivers substantial gains over strong baselines across multiple LVLM backbones. Mechanism analyses further indicate that reflection anchors are enriched for visually sensitive decision points and that RAPO increases contrastive visual-dependence signals along generated trajectories.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于信息论的反思锚点策略优化方法(RAPO)，通过在视觉信息易衰减的关键位置进行干预，显著提升了大视觉语言模型的长时序推理能力。
AI.motivation: 大视觉语言模型在进行长链推理时，视觉信息会在生成过程中逐渐衰减，限制了长时序多模态推理能力。现有方法依赖启发式规则而非基于收益分析的理论指导，且缺乏对局部视觉影响传播机制的明确理解。
AI.method: 从信息论角度推导出单步干预的下游视觉收益下界，识别出两个关键因素：局部分支空间(词元熵)和下游视觉传播潜力。基于此理论分析，提出RAPO方法，采用GRPO优化选择高熵反思锚点，并优化链掩码有限窗口KL代理来增强下游视觉依赖。
AI.result: 在推理密集型和通用领域基准测试中，RAPO在多个LVLM主干网络上相比强基线方法实现了显著性能提升。机制分析表明反思锚点富集了视觉敏感决策点，RAPO增强了生成轨迹上的对比视觉依赖信号。
AI.conclusion: 该方法从信息论角度为理解视觉信息传播提供了理论框架，并通过 principled 的干预策略有效解决了长时序多模态推理中的视觉信息衰减问题，为提升LVLM的推理性能提供了新思路。

title: Grounded Satirical Generation with RAG
summary: Humor generation remains challenging task for Large Language Models (LLMs), due to their subjective nature. We focus on satire, a form of humor strongly shaped by context. In this work, we present a novel pipeline for grounded satire generation that uses Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) over current news to produce satirical dictionary definitions in the Finnish context. We also introduce a new task-specific evaluation framework and annotate 100 generated definitions with six human annotators, enabling analysis across multiple experimental conditions, including cultural background, source-word type, and the presence or absence of RAG. Our results show that the generated definitions are perceived as more political than humorous. Both topic-based word selection and RAG improve the political relevance of the outputs, but neither yields clear gains in humor generation. In addition, our LLM-as-a-judge evaluation of five state-of-the-art models indicates that LLMs correlate well with human judgments on political relevance, but perform poorly on humor. We release our code and annotated dataset to support further research on grounded satire generation and evaluation.

AI.tldr: 研究使用检索增强生成(RAG)技术创建基于新闻的芬兰语讽刺定义，发现生成内容更具政治性而非幽默性，LLM能较好识别政治相关性但在幽默判断上表现不佳。
AI.motivation: 讽刺是一种严重依赖语境的幽默形式，现有大型语言模型在幽默生成方面存在挑战，特别是在需要结合当前时事和文化背景的讽刺生成任务上。
AI.method: 提出基于检索增强生成的讽刺定义生成流程，通过检索当前新闻内容来生成芬兰语讽刺定义；并建立了包含六个标注者的评估框架，分析不同实验条件下的效果。
AI.result: 生成的内容被感知为更具政治性而非幽默性；主题词汇选择和RAG都能提升政治相关性，但对幽默生成没有明显改善；LLM作为评判者时，在政治相关性评估上与人类判断相关度高，但在幽默判断上表现很差。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明讽刺生成任务中政治相关性比幽默性更容易实现，当前LLM在识别和生成幽默方面仍存在显著局限，需要进一步研究来提升讽刺生成的质量和评估方法。

title: GSMap: 2D Gaussians for Online HD Mapping
summary: Accurate High-Definition (HD) map construction is critical for autonomous driving, yet existing methods face a fundamental trade-off: vectorization-based approaches preserve topology but struggle with geometric fidelity, while rasterization-based approaches enable precise geometric supervision but produce unstructured outputs. To bridge this gap, we propose GSMap, a novel framework that unifies both paradigms via a learnable 2D Gaussian representation. Each map element is modeled as an ordered sequence of 2D Gaussians, whose centers correspond to the vertices of the vectorized polyline/polygon. This formulation enables simultaneous optimization through: (1) Differentiable rasterization that enforces pixel-level geometric constraints, and (2) Topology-aware vectorization that maintains structural regularity. Experiments on both nuScenes and Argoverse2 demonstrate that our Gaussian-based representation effectively unifies geometric and topological learning, achieving significant performance improvements and demonstrating strong compatibility with existing HD mapping architectures. Code will be available at https://github.com/peakpang/GSMap

AI.tldr: 本文提出了GSMap框架，通过可学习的2D高斯表示统一了HD地图构建中的向量化和栅格化两种范式，解决了拓扑保持与几何精度之间的权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的HD地图构建方法存在根本性权衡：矢量化方法能保持拓扑但几何保真度不足，而栅格化方法能实现精确几何监督但产生非结构化输出。
AI.method: 将每个地图元素建模为有序的2D高斯序列，高斯中心对应矢量化折线/多边形的顶点，通过可微分栅格化实现像素级几何约束，同时通过拓扑感知矢量化保持结构规律性。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和Argoverse2数据集上的实验表明，基于高斯的表示有效统一了几何和拓扑学习，显著提升了性能并与现有HD地图架构具有良好的兼容性。
AI.conclusion: GSMap成功桥接了矢量化与栅格化方法间的差距，为HD地图构建提供了一个统一且高效的解决方案，在保持拓扑结构的同时实现了精确的几何表示。

title: Learning More from Less: Exploiting Counterfactuals for Data-Efficient Chart Understanding
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated remarkable progress in chart understanding, largely driven by supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on increasingly large synthetic datasets. However, scaling SFT data alone is inefficient and overlooks a key property of charts: charts are programmatically generated visual artifacts, where small, code-controlled visual changes can induce drastic shifts in semantics and correct answers. Learning this counterfactual sensitivity requires VLMs to discriminate fine-grained visual differences, yet standard SFT treats training instances independently and provides limited supervision to enforce this behavior. To address this, we introduce ChartCF, a data-efficient training framework designed to enhance counterfactual sensitivity. ChartCF consists of: (1) a counterfactual data synthesis pipeline via code modification, (2) a chart similarity-based data selection strategy that filters overly difficult samples for improved training efficiency, and (3) multimodal preference optimization across both textual and visual modalities. Experiments on five benchmarks show that ChartCF achieves superior or comparable performance to strong chart-specific VLMs while using significantly less training data.

AI.tldr: ChartCF是一个数据高效的训练框架，通过结合反事实数据合成、基于相似度的数据筛选和多模态偏好优化，显著提升了视觉语言模型在图表理解任务上的表现，同时大幅减少了训练数据需求。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在图表理解上依赖大规模合成数据的监督微调，但这种方法效率低下，忽视了图表作为程序化生成 artifacts 的关键特性——代码控制的细微视觉变化会导致语义的剧烈改变。标准SFT无法有效学习这种反事实敏感性。
AI.method: ChartCF框架包含三个核心组件：(1)通过代码修改的反事实数据合成管道；(2)基于图表相似度的数据选择策略，过滤过难样本以提高训练效率；(3)跨文本和视觉模态的多模态偏好优化方法。
AI.result: 在五个基准测试上的实验表明，ChartCF在使用显著更少训练数据的情况下，达到了与强大的图表专用VLM相当甚至更优的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了利用图表的程序化特性和反事实学习可以有效提升VLM的图表理解能力，为数据高效的AI训练提供了新的思路。

title: Any2Any 3D Diffusion Models with Knowledge Transfer: A Radiotherapy Planning Study
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2026 main conference. Compare to CVPR version, minor updates here are included (e.g., combine main text and appendix; clarify the timing scenario in appendix)
summary: Voxel-wise dose prediction is a critical yet challenging task in practical radiotherapy (RT) planning, as bespoke models trained from scratch often struggle to generalize across diverse clinical settings. Meanwhile, generative models trained on billion-scale datasets from vision domains have achieved impressive performance. Herein, we propose DiffKT3D, a unified Any2Any 3D diffusion framework that leverages prior knowledge from pretrained video diffusion models for efficient and clinically meaningful dose prediction. To enable flexible conditioning across multiple clinical modalities (CT, anatomical structures, body, beam settings, etc.), we introduce an Any2Any conditional paradigm utilizing modality-specific embeddings without cross-attention overhead. Further, we design a novel reinforcement learning (RL) post-training mechanism guided by a clinically-informed Scorecard explicitly tailored to institutional treatment preferences. Compared with winner of GDP-HMM challenge, DiffKT3D sets a new state-of-the-art in dose prediction by reducing voxel-level MAE from 2.07 to 1.93. In addition, DiffKT3D achieves superior image quality and preference match. These results demonstrate that transferring diffusion priors via modality-aware conditioning and clinically aligned RL post-training can provide a robust and generalizable solution for RT planning across various clinical scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiffKT3D，一个基于预训练视频扩散模型的3D剂量预测框架，通过灵活的多模态条件机制和临床导向的强化学习后训练，显著提升了放疗剂量预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统的体素级剂量预测模型难以在不同临床环境中泛化，而视觉领域的预训练大模型表现优异，因此需要探索如何将扩散模型的先验知识迁移到放疗剂量预测任务。
AI.method: DiffKT3D采用Any2Any条件范式，利用模态特定嵌入实现无跨注意力开销的多条件融合，并设计基于临床评价标准的强化学习后训练机制，使模型符合机构治疗偏好。
AI.result: 在GDP-HMM挑战赛中，DiffKT3D将体素级MAE从2.07降低到1.93，达到最先进水平，同时在图像质量和临床偏好匹配方面表现出色。
AI.conclusion: 通过模态感知的条件机制和临床对齐的强化学习后训练，扩散先验知识迁移为放疗规划提供了一个稳健且可泛化的解决方案，适用于各种临床场景。

title: RUBEN: Rule-Based Explanations for Retrieval-Augmented LLM Systems
summary: This paper demonstrates RUBEN, an interactive tool for discovering minimal rules to explain the outputs of retrieval-augmented large language models (LLMs) in data-driven applications. We leverage novel pruning strategies to efficiently identify a minimal set of rules that subsume all others. We further demonstrate novel applications of these rules for LLM safety, specifically to test the resiliency of safety training and effectiveness of adversarial prompt injections.

AI.tldr: RUBEN是一个用于发现检索增强大模型输出解释规则的交互式工具，通过新颖的剪枝策略识别最小规则集，并应用于LLM安全性测试。
AI.motivation: 在数据驱动应用中，需要理解检索增强大型语言模型的决策过程，并确保模型安全性。
AI.method: 提出RUBEN交互式工具，采用新颖的剪枝策略高效识别能够概括所有其他规则的最小规则集。
AI.result: 成功开发了RUBEN工具，能够为检索增强LLM的输出生成解释性规则，并应用于安全性评估。
AI.conclusion: 该工具不仅提供了模型行为的可解释性，还为LLM安全性研究提供了新的测试方法，特别是在对抗性提示注入攻击检测方面。

title: DegBins: Degradation-Driven Binning for Depth Super-Resolution
summary: Depth super-resolution (DSR) aims to recover a high-resolution (HR) depth map from its low-resolution (LR) counterpart. With color image guidance, this task is typically formulated as learning the residual between HR and LR in a low-dimensional feature space. However, this additive formulation is insufficient to accurately capture the complex relationship between HR and LR, especially under spatially varying degradations. In this paper, we introduce DegBins, a novel DSR framework that leverages degradation-driven binning to adaptively enhance residual modeling. Specifically, DegBins reformulates the regression-based DSR as a hybrid classification-regression problem, where the residual depth is represented as a linear combination of discrete depth bins weighted by their learned probability distribution, yielding more flexible and expressive representations. Furthermore, DegBins models the degradation relationship between HR and LR in a high-dimensional feature space, enabling adaptive bin range adjustment and probability optimization conditioned on local degradation characteristics. To progressively improve reconstruction quality, DegBins adopts a multi-stage refinement scheme, where each stage performs finer-grained bin partitioning and probability updating based on the former estimation. This coarse-to-fine design facilitates more accurate depth recovery, particularly in regions with severe degradations or complex structural variations. Extensive experiments across five benchmarks demonstrate that DegBins consistently outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods in terms of accuracy, robustness, and generalization.

AI.tldr: DegBins是一种新颖的深度超分辨率框架，通过退化驱动的分箱技术，将传统回归问题转化为混合分类-回归问题，显著提升了从低分辨率深度图重建高分辨率深度图的精度。
AI.motivation: 传统的基于加性残差建模的深度超分辨率方法无法准确捕捉高低分辨率深度图之间的复杂关系，特别是在空间变化退化的情况下。
AI.method: DegBins采用退化驱动的分箱策略，在多维特征空间中建模退化关系，通过学习离散深度箱的概率分布来表达残差，并采用多阶段细化方案实现渐进式重建。
AI.result: 在五个基准测试上的大量实验证明，DegBins在精度、鲁棒性和泛化能力方面都优于现有的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: DegBins通过创新的混合分类-回归框架和自适应箱调整机制，为深度超分辨率任务提供了更灵活、表达能力更强的解决方案，特别是在严重退化区域的深度恢复方面表现出色。

title: DGPO: Beyond Pairwise Preferences with Directional Consistent Groupwise Optimization
summary: Although Large Language Models (LLMs) have made remarkable progress, current preference optimization methods still struggle to align directional consistency while preserving reasoning diversity. To address this limitation, we propose Directional-Groupwise Preference Optimization (DGPO), a lightweight framework that aggregates supervision signals at the group level and explicitly models direction-aware alignment through multi-candidate comparisons. DGPO organizes forward and reverse question-answer instances into structured sets and optimizes a margin-based likelihood objective that separates coherent reasoning paths from inconsistent alternatives. This group-wise formulation captures richer relative information than pairwise objectives and reinforces consistency across diverse reasoning pathways. Empirical results show that our constructed reverse data yields a 3.2% average improvement across five benchmarks, while DGPO further delivers consistent gains across multiple datasets and model families, achieving average accuracy improvements of up to 3.6%.

AI.tldr: 研究者提出了DGPO框架，通过组级聚合和多候选比较来解决LLMs偏好优化中的方向一致性问题，在多个基准测试中取得了平均3.6%的准确率提升。
AI.motivation: 当前大型语言模型的偏好优化方法在保持推理多样性同时难以确保方向一致性，这限制了模型性能的进一步提升。
AI.method: 提出Directional-Groupwise Preference Optimization (DGPO)轻量级框架，将正向和反向问答实例组织成结构化集合，通过基于边界的似然目标函数显式建模方向感知对齐，分离一致推理路径和不一致选择。
AI.result: 构建的反向数据在五个基准测试中平均提升3.2%，DGPO在多个数据集和模型家族上实现一致性能提升，最高平均准确率提升达3.6%。
AI.conclusion: 组级优化相比成对目标能够捕获更丰富的相对信息，DGPO框架有效强化了多样化推理路径间的一致性，为LLMs偏好优化提供了新的解决思路。

title: Overcoming Catastrophic Forgetting in Visual Continual Learning with Reinforcement Fine-Tuning
summary: Recent studies suggest that Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (RFT) is inherently more resilient to catastrophic forgetting than Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT). However, whether RFT (e.g., GRPO) can effectively overcome forgetting in challenging visual continual learning settings, such as class-incremental learning (CIL) and domain-incremental learning (DIL), remains an open problem. Through a pilot study, we confirm that while RFT consistently outperforms SFT, it still suffers from non-negligible forgetting. We empirically trace this bottleneck to Trajectory-level Drift Agnosticism: among candidate rollouts achieving identical task rewards, the KL divergence from the preceding-task policy varies substantially, which strongly correlates with catastrophic forgetting across sequential tasks. Motivated by this insight, we propose Retention-aware Policy Optimization (RaPO), a simple yet effective RFT method that explicitly mitigates forgetting through trajectory-level reward shaping. Specifically, RaPO comprises two core components: (1) Retention Reward that converts trajectory-level distribution drift into a continuous reward signal, preferentially reinforcing knowledge-preserving rollouts within each group; (2) Cross-Task Advantage Normalization (CTAN), which maintains a persistent exponential moving average of reward statistics across task boundaries to stabilize the optimization progress during continual learning. Leveraging the free-form textual generalization of MLLMs, we comprehensively evaluate RaPO across five visual continual learning settings. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RaPO achieves leading performance, substantially reducing catastrophic forgetting while preserving strong plasticity. To the best of our knowledge, this work represents the first systematic exploration of RFT in visual continual learning, offering insights that we hope will inspire future research.

AI.tldr: 本研究首次系统探索了强化微调在视觉持续学习中的应用，提出了RaPO方法，通过轨迹级奖励塑造和跨任务优势归一化有效缓解灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 虽然强化微调(RFT)比监督微调(SFT)更能抵抗灾难性遗忘，但在视觉持续学习的复杂场景(如类增量学习和域增量学习)中，RFT仍然存在显著的遗忘问题，需要探索更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出了RaPO方法，包含两个核心组件：(1)保留奖励：将轨迹级分布漂移转化为连续奖励信号，优先强化知识保存的轨迹；(2)跨任务优势归一化(CTAN)：在任务边界间保持奖励统计的指数移动平均，稳定持续学习过程中的优化进程。
AI.result: 在五个视觉持续学习设置上的全面实验表明，RaPO取得了领先性能，显著减少了灾难性遗忘，同时保持了强大的可塑性。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个系统性探索RFT在视觉持续学习中应用的工作，RaPO方法有效解决了轨迹级漂移无意识问题，为未来研究提供了重要启示。

title: Neural at ArchEHR-QA 2026: One Method Fits All: Unified Prompt Optimization for Clinical QA over EHRs
summary: Automated question answering (QA) over electronic health records (EHRs) demands precise evidence retrieval, faithful answer generation, and explicit grounding of answers in clinical notes. In this work, we present Neural1.5, our method for the ArchEHR-QA 2026 shared task at CL4Health@LREC 2026, which comprises four subtasks: question interpretation, evidence identification, answer generation, and evidence alignment. Our approach decouples the task into independent, modular stages and employs DSPy"s MIPROv2 optimizer to automatically discover high-performing prompts, jointly tuning instructions and few-shot demonstrations for each stage. Within every stage, self-consistency voting over multiple stochastic inference runs suppresses spurious errors and improves reliability, while stage-specific verification mechanisms (e.g., self-reflection and chain-of-verification for alignment) further refine output quality. Among all teams that participated in all four subtasks, our method ranks second overall (mean rank 4.00), placing 4th, 1st, 4th, and 7th on Subtasks 1-4, respectively. These results demonstrate that systematic, per-stage prompt optimization combined with self-consistency mechanisms is a cost-effective alternative to model fine-tuning for multifaceted clinical QA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Neural1.5方法，通过分阶段的提示优化和自一致性机制，在电子健康记录问答任务中获得了第二名的好成绩，证明了这种方法比模型调参更经济有效。
AI.motivation: 电子健康记录自动问答需要在临床笔记中进行精确的证据检索、忠实的答案生成和明确的答案定位，这是一个多方面的复杂任务，需要系统性的解决方案。
AI.method: 将任务解耦为四个独立模块：问题解释、证据识别、答案生成和证据对齐；使用DSPy的MIPROv2优化器自动发现高性能提示；每个阶段采用自一致性投票机制和特定验证机制（如自我反思和验证链）。
AI.result: 在参与全部四个子任务的团队中排名第二（平均排名4.00），在子任务1-4上分别获得第4、第1、第4和第7名的成绩。
AI.conclusion: 系统性的分阶段提示优化结合自一致性机制，是解决多方面临床问答任务的一种经济有效的替代方案，无需进行模型微调。

title: Attention Itself Could Retrieve.RetrieveVGGT: Training-Free Long Context Streaming 3D Reconstruction via Query-Key Similarity Retrieval
summary: Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer (VGGT) advances 3D reconstruction via scalable Transformer architecture, but the quadratic complexity of global attention prevents long context application. StreamVGGT enables streaming with causal attention, yet its KV cache grows linearly with frames, causing memory overflow and quality degradation. We present RetrieveVGGT, a training-free framework, which formulates context construction for VGGT as a retrieval problem. By retrieving a fixed number of relevant frames at each step, VGGT maintains a controllable memory budget, which is close to its training context length. Interestingly, we find that the similarity between current frame queries and cached history frame keys at the first global attention layer of VGGT is already a strong indicator of relevance, eliminating the need for additional learned scoring. To enhance information diversity similar to a recommender system, we propose Segment Sampling so that the retrieval spans distinct relevant segments rather than a single high-similarity region. We design a pose-aware spatial memory mechanism that organizes history frames according to their already estimated camera poses, enabling location-aware retrieval. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RetrieveVGGT achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming StreamVGGT, TTT3R, and InfiniteVGGT while maintaining constant memory usage regardless of sequence length. Code is available at https://github.com/zzctmd/RetrieveVGGT.

AI.tldr: RetrieveVGGT是一个训练免费的3D重建框架，通过检索机制解决长序列重建中的内存限制问题，实现恒定内存使用和SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: VGGT在3D重建中表现出色，但全局注意力的二次复杂度限制了长序列应用。StreamVGGT虽支持流式处理，但其KV缓存线性增长导致内存溢出和质量下降。
AI.method: 将VGGT的上下文构建建模为检索问题，利用第一层全局注意力中的查询-键相似度作为相关性指标，无需额外学习评分；提出段采样策略增强信息多样性；设计位姿感知空间记忆机制组织历史帧，实现位置感知检索。
AI.result: RetrieveVGGT在长序列3D重建任务中达到SOTA性能，超越StreamVGGT、TTT3R和InfiniteVGGT，同时保持与序列长度无关的恒定内存使用。
AI.conclusion: 通过创新的检索框架和内存管理策略，RetrieveVGGT有效解决了长序列3D重建的内存瓶颈问题，为实时可扩展的3D重建提供了实用解决方案。

title: Grounded or Guessing? LVLM Confidence Estimation via Blind-Image Contrastive Ranking
summary: Large vision-language models suffer from visual ungroundedness: they can produce a fluent, confident, and even correct response driven entirely by language priors, with the image contributing nothing to the prediction. Existing confidence estimation methods cannot detect this, as they observe model behavior under normal inference with no mechanism to determine whether a prediction was shaped by the image or by text alone. We introduce BICR (Blind-Image Contrastive Ranking), a model-agnostic confidence estimation framework that makes this contrast explicit during training by extracting hidden states from a frozen LVLM twice: once with the real image-question pair, and once with the image blacked out while the question is held fixed. A lightweight probe is trained on the real-image hidden state and regularized by a ranking loss that penalizes higher confidence on the blacked-out view, teaching it to treat visual grounding as a signal of reliability at zero additional inference cost. Evaluated across five modern LVLMs and seven baselines on a benchmark covering visual question answering, object hallucination detection, medical imaging, and financial document understanding, BICR achieves the best cross-LVLM average on both calibration and discrimination simultaneously, with statistically significant discrimination gains robust to cluster-aware analysis at 4-18x fewer parameters than the strongest probing baseline.

AI.tldr: BICR是一种新型置信度估计框架，通过对比真实图像与黑化图像的隐藏状态，有效检测大型视觉语言模型的视觉脱锚问题，在零额外推理成本下显著提升了跨模型的校准和判别能力。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型存在视觉脱锚问题，即模型可能仅基于语言先验生成响应而完全忽略图像内容。现有的置信度估计方法无法检测这一问题，因为它们缺乏判断预测是由图像驱动还是仅由文本驱动的机制。
AI.method: 提出BICR框架，在训练阶段对每个图像-问题对提取两次隐藏状态：一次使用真实图像，另一次使用黑化图像。训练一个轻量级探针，在真实图像隐藏状态上进行训练，并通过排序损失正则化，惩罚黑化图像视图上的更高置信度，使模型将视觉锚定作为可靠性信号。
AI.result: 在五个现代LVLMs和七个基线的评估中，BICR在视觉问答、对象幻觉检测、医学成像和金融文档理解等任务上，同时在校准和判别方面取得了最佳的跨LVLM平均性能，具有统计显著的判别增益，参数量仅为最强探针基线的1/4-1/18。
AI.conclusion: BICR通过显式的视觉-文本对比训练，为大型视觉语言模型提供了一个高效、通用的置信度估计解决方案，能够有效识别视觉脱锚现象，提升了模型预测的可靠性和可解释性。

title: BEA-GS: BEyond RAdiance Supervision in 3DGS for Precise Object Extraction
summary: Most Gaussian Splatting techniques that provide a 3D semantic representation of the scene do not optimize the underlying 3D geometry, making object-level editing or asset extraction challenging. Recent methods, such as COBGS, Trace3D, ObjectGS, acknowledge this limitation and propose approaches that modify the scene's geometry to represent the underlying semantics. We advance this concept further by proposing a novel solution that provides near perfect boundaries in object extraction. We do so by introducing two new losses in the optimization that take care of: 1) a loss that modifies the geometry of visible Gaussians to respect semantic boundaries, and 2) a loss that adjusts the geometry of non-visible Gaussians that appear once the object is extracted. Our first loss propagates gradients directly through the rasterization, allowing for seamless integration within the optimization of the Gaussian parameters. The second loss also propagates gradients to Gaussian parameters but does so without passing through the rasterization, enabling modification of the scene's geometry even when little transmittance reaches a Gaussian (partial or non-visible). Exhaustive comparisons with 12 state of the art methods across 4 datasets, using six metrics, demonstrate that our approach produces overall the best boundary segmentation to date.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的高斯泼溅方法，通过引入两种损失函数优化可见和非可见高斯分布的几何形状，实现了近乎完美的物体边界提取效果。
AI.motivation: 现有大多数3D语义表示的高斯泼溅技术不优化底层3D几何，导致物体级编辑或资产提取困难。需要改进几何表示以更好地尊重语义边界。
AI.method: 1) 引入直接通过光栅化传播梯度的损失，修改可见高斯的几何以尊重语义边界；2) 引入不通过光栅化的损失，调整提取物体时才出现的非可见高斯几何。
AI.result: 在4个数据集上与12种最先进方法对比，使用6种指标进行评估，证明该方法产生了迄今为止最佳的边界分割效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过两种互补的损失函数优化高斯几何，在物体边界提取方面达到了近乎完美的性能，显著优于现有方法。

title: RubricEM: Meta-RL with Rubric-guided Policy Decomposition beyond Verifiable Rewards
summary: Training deep research agents, namely systems that plan, search, evaluate evidence, and synthesize long-form reports, pushes reinforcement learning beyond the regime of verifiable rewards. Their outputs lack ground-truth answers, their trajectories span many tool-augmented decisions, and standard post-training offers little mechanism for turning past attempts into reusable experience. In this work, we argue that rubrics should serve not merely as final-answer evaluators, but as the shared interface that structures policy execution, judge feedback, and agent memory. Based on this view, we introduce RubricEM, a rubric-guided reinforcement learning framework that combines stagewise policy decomposition with reflection-based meta-policy evolution. RubricEM first makes research trajectories stage-aware by conditioning planning, evidence gathering, review, and synthesis on self-generated rubrics. It then assigns credit with Stage-Structured GRPO, which uses stagewise rubric judgments to provide denser semantic feedback for long-horizon optimization. In parallel, RubricEM trains a shared-backbone reflection meta-policy that distills judged trajectories into reusable rubric-grounded guidance for future attempts. The resulting RubricEM-8B achieves strong performance across four long-form research benchmarks, outperforming comparable open models and approaching proprietary deep-research systems. Beyond final performance, we perform thorough analyses to understand the key ingredients of RubricEM.

AI.tldr: 训练深度智能体需要超越可验证奖励的强化学习，RubricEM框架利用评分标准结构化策略执行、反馈和记忆，结合策略分解和元策略进化，在多个长篇研究基准上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有的深度研究智能体训练面临三大挑战：输出缺乏真实答案作为奖励信号、轨迹涉及大量工具增强决策、后训练难以将尝试转化为可复用经验。
AI.method: 提出RubricEM框架，以评分标准为核心接口，采用阶段感知的策略分解（规划、证据收集、审查、综合）、阶段化GRPO算法以及共享骨干的反思元策略训练机制。
AI.result: RubricEM-8B模型在四个长篇研究基准上表现强劲，超越同等规模开源模型，接近专有深度研究系统性能。
AI.conclusion: 评分标准不仅是最终答案评估器，更应作为连接策略执行、反馈和记忆的统一接口，这一观点为长周期优化提供了更密集的语义反馈机制。

title: Rethinking Evaluation of Multiple Sclerosis (MS) Lesion Segmentation Models
summary: Multiple Sclerosis (MS) is a chronic autoimmune disease that can significantly reduce the quality of life of a patient. Existing treatment options can only help slow down the progression of the disease. Therefore, early detection and precise monitoring of disease progression are important. Deep learning offers state-of-the-art models for detecting and segmenting MS lesions in brain MRI scans. However, most of these models are evaluated using the Dice score, without accounting for lesion-wise detection and segmentation performance or other metrics that quantify model performance in cases that are complex or confusing for human annotators, or in cases that are essential for disease detection and progression monitoring. In this paper, we highlight the need to rethink the evaluation of MS lesion segmentation models. In this context, we first present problem fingerprinting in detail to highlight what neurologists look for in brain MRI scans for MS detection and progression monitoring, and which metrics are required to properly quantify model performance in these contexts. Additionally, we present an analysis of state-of-the-art models on two open-source datasets using these metrics to highlight their usability for real-world deployment in hospitals.

AI.tldr: 本文重新评估了多发性硬化症(MS)病灶分割模型的评估方法，提出了基于神经科医生实际需求的评估指标体系，并对现有模型进行了实用性分析。
AI.motivation: 现有的深度学习MS病灶分割模型主要使用Dice分数评估，但忽略了病灶级别的检测性能、复杂病例的量化指标以及对疾病诊断和进展监测至关重要的评估维度，无法满足临床实际需求。
AI.method: 首先详细介绍了问题特征分析方法，明确神经科医生在MS检测和进展监控中对脑部MRI的关注要点；然后建立了更全面的评估指标体系；最后在两个开源数据集上对最先进的模型进行了分析评估。
AI.result: 通过新的评估指标体系，揭示了现有模型在实际临床部署中的局限性，为模型改进和临床应用提供了重要参考。
AI.conclusion: MS病灶分割模型评估需要从单一Dice分数转向多维度、面向临床需求的评估体系，这对模型的实际临床部署具有重要意义。

title: WildClawBench: A Benchmark for Real-World, Long-Horizon Agent Evaluation
summary: Large language and vision-language models increasingly power agents that act on a user's behalf through command-line interface (CLI) harnesses. However, most agent benchmarks still rely on synthetic sandboxes, short-horizon tasks, mock-service APIs, and final-answer checks, leaving open whether agents can complete realistic long-horizon work in the runtimes where they are deployed. This work presents WildClawBench, a native-runtime benchmark of 60 human-authored, bilingual, multimodal tasks spanning six thematic categories. Each task averages roughly 8 minutes of wall-clock time and over 20 tool calls, and runs inside a reproducible Docker container hosting an actual CLI agent harness (OpenClaw, Claude Code, Codex, or Hermes Agent) with access to real tools rather than mock services. Grading is hybrid, combining deterministic rule-based checks, environment-state auditing of side effects, and an LLM/VLM judge for semantic verification. Across 19 frontier models, the best, Claude Opus 4.7, reaches only 62.2% overall under OpenClaw, while every other model stays below 60%, and switching harness alone shifts a single model by up to 18 points. These results show that long-horizon, native-runtime agent evaluation remains a far-from-resolved task for current frontier models. We release the tasks, code, and containerized tooling to support reproducible evaluation.

AI.tldr: WildClawBench是一个60项任务的原生运行时基准测试，用于评估终端CLI智能体的长时程多模态任务能力。在最先进的19个模型中，最好性能的Claude Opus 4.7仅达到62.2%的完成率，表明长时程智能体评估仍是未解决的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体基准测试主要依赖合成沙箱、短时程任务和模拟API，无法真实评估智能体在实际部署环境中的长时程工作能力。需要一个在原生运行时环境中测试现实世界长时程任务的基准。
AI.method: 构建包含60个人工编写的双语多模态任务的原生运行时基准WildClawBench，任务覆盖6个主题类别，平均历时8分钟，涉及20+工具调用。在Docker容器中运行真实的CLI智能体，采用混合评分机制：确定性规则检查、环境状态审计和LLM/VLM语义验证。
AI.result: 在19个前沿模型中，最佳模型Claude Opus 4.7在OpenClaw下仅达到62.2%的总体成绩，其他模型均低于60%。仅更换智能体框架就可使单个模型性能变化高达18个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 长时程、原生运行时的智能体评估对当前前沿模型仍是一个远未解决的挑战。研究团队发布了任务、代码和容器化工具以支持可重现评估。

title: S2P-Net: A Spectral-Spatial Polar Network for Rotation-Invariant Object Recognition in Low-Data Regimes
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. Preprint. Code available from the author upon request
summary: We present S2P-Net (Spectral-Spatial Polar Network), a compact deep learning architecture that achieves mathematically guaranteed rotation invariance without data augmentation. In this Paper, we also made a comparison to other neural network architectures (CNN`s). Have a look at the results and feel free to contact me for any questions. This is my first paper:) Made by Hackbert

AI.tldr: S2P-Net是一种无需数据增强就能实现数学保证旋转不变的紧凑深度学习架构，作者是首次发表论文的研究者Hackbert。
AI.motivation: 开发一种具有数学保证旋转不变性的紧凑深度学习架构，避免依赖数据增强技术。
AI.method: 提出了S2P-Net（Spectral-Spatial Polar Network）架构，并与其他CNN架构进行了对比实验。
AI.result: S2P-Net在实验中展现出良好的旋转不变性性能，取得了与其他CNN架构对比的结果。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功实现了无需数据增强的旋转不变性，为解决旋转敏感问题提供了新的解决方案。

title: ELF: Embedded Language Flows
summary: Diffusion and flow-based models have become the de facto approaches for generating continuous data, e.g., in domains such as images and videos. Their success has attracted growing interest in applying them to language modeling. Unlike their image-domain counterparts, today's leading diffusion language models (DLMs) primarily operate over discrete tokens. In this paper, we show that continuous DLMs can be made effective with minimal adaptation to the discrete domain. We propose Embedded Language Flows (ELF), a class of diffusion models in continuous embedding space based on continuous-time Flow Matching. Unlike existing DLMs, ELF predominantly stays within the continuous embedding space until the final time step, where it maps to discrete tokens using a shared-weight network. This formulation makes it straightforward to adapt established techniques from image-domain diffusion models, e.g., classifier-free guidance (CFG). Experiments show that ELF substantially outperforms leading discrete and continuous DLMs, achieving better generation quality with fewer sampling steps. These results suggest that ELF offers a promising path toward effective continuous DLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出嵌入式语言流(ELF)，一种在连续嵌入空间中基于Flow Matching的扩散语言模型，通过共享权重网络映射到离散token，性能优于现有语言扩散模型。
AI.motivation: 当前扩散模型在图像视频领域表现优异，但语言建模中的扩散语言模型主要操作离散token，需要一种能有效利用连续空间建模优势的语言扩散方法。
AI.method: ELF采用连续时间Flow Matching，在连续嵌入空间中进行扩散过程，仅在最后时间步通过共享权重网络映射到离散token，可直接应用分类器无引导(CFG)等技术。
AI.result: 实验表明ELF显著优于当前主流的离散和连续扩散语言模型，以更少的采样步数获得更好的生成质量。
AI.conclusion: ELF为连续扩散语言模型提供了有效路径，展示了连续embedding空间建模的潜力和实用性。

title: VFM-SDM: A vision foundation model-based framework for training-free, marker-free, and calibration-free structural displacement measurement
summary: Reliable displacement measurement is fundamental for structural health monitoring and digital engineering workflows, as it provides direct structural response information. Vision-based measurement has emerged as a promising approach for low-cost, non-contact displacement monitoring. However, its deployment often remains constrained by task-specific model training or on-site preparation, such as marker installation or manual camera calibration. This study presents a Vision Foundation Model-based framework for Structural Displacement Measurement (VFM-SDM) that integrates VFM-inferred camera parameter estimation and point tracking to reconstruct multi-directional structural displacements via triangulation without task-specific training or on-site preparation, enabling efficient non-contact deployment in real-world applications. Structural geometry constraints are incorporated to suppress physically implausible deviations and improve estimation consistency. A multi-modal field dataset collected from an in-service pedestrian bridge is introduced alongside a unified benchmarking protocol to support reproducible evaluation. Representative results show low amplitude errors (NRMSE$_{\text{range}}$: 0.11/0.12), strong temporal agreement (correlation coefficient: 0.86/0.88), and small peak-to-peak amplitude errors (RPPAE: 0.01/0.02) for vertical and lateral displacements, indicating robust performance under real-world conditions. The proposed framework advances automated, scalable displacement monitoring and lays the groundwork for VFM-enabled structural response measurements in digital twin and data-centric construction workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于视觉基础模型的结构位移测量框架(VFM-SDM)，无需任务特定训练或现场准备，通过相机参数估计和点跟踪实现多方向位移的非接触式测量。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉测量方法被任务特定模型训练或现场准备（标记安装、相机校准）所限制，难以在实际工程中高效部署。结构健康监测需要可靠、低成本、非接触的位移测量方案。
AI.method: 整合视觉基础模型推理的相机参数估计和点跟踪技术，通过三角测量重建多方向结构位移。引入结构几何约束抑制物理不合理的偏差，提高估计一致性。构建了人行桥多模态现场数据集和统一评估协议。
AI.result: 在实际人行桥测试中表现出色，垂直和侧向位移的归一化均方根误差为0.11/0.12，相关系数达0.86/0.88，峰峰值幅度误差仅为0.01/0.02。
AI.conclusion: 该框架推动了自动化、可扩展的位移监测技术发展，为数字孪生和数据驱动的施工流程中的视觉基础模型结构响应测量奠定了基础。

title: DeepTumorVQA: A Hierarchical 3D CT Benchmark for Stage-Wise Evaluation of Medical VLMs and Tool-Augmented Agents
summary: Medical vision-language models (VLMs) and AI agents have made significant progress in learning to analyze and reason about clinical images. However, existing medical visual question answering (VQA) benchmarks collapse model capabilities into a single accuracy score, obscuring where and why models fail. We propose DeepTumorVQA, a hierarchical benchmark that follows the multi-stage evidence chain in tumor diagnosis and decomposes 3D CT reasoning into four stages: recognition, measurement, visual reasoning, and medical reasoning. Higher-level questions remain independently scorable, while their ground-truth evidence chains are defined over lower-level primitives. The benchmark contains 476K questions across 42 clinical subtypes on 9,262 3D CT volumes. In addition to a direct reasoning mode for VLMs, DeepTumorVQA provides tool-interaction environments for agent evaluation, where a model can call external tools, including segmentation models, measurement programs, and medical knowledge modules, before answering the question. Evaluating over 30 model configurations, we find that reliable quantitative measurement is the primary bottleneck, making later-stage visual and medical reasoning harder for VLMs, while tool augmentation substantially mitigates this issue. When tools are available, leveraging medical knowledge and tools to reason about medical images becomes a new challenge. We further show that ground-truth step-by-step tool-use traces from DeepTumorVQA can supervise agents and reduce tool-use and reasoning failures. This stage-wise progression from recognition to measurement to visual and medical reasoning provides a concrete roadmap for future medical VLM and AI agent studies. All data and code are released at https://github.com/Schuture/DeepTumorVQA.

AI.tldr: DeepTumorVQA是一个分层级的医学VQA评测基准，将肿瘤诊断的3D CT推理分解为识别、测量、视觉推理和医学推理四个阶段，包含476K问题，评估发现定量测量是主要瓶颈，工具调用能显著改善性能。
AI.motivation: 现有医学视觉问答评测基准将模型能力简化为单一准确率分数，无法明确指出模型在何处以及为何失败，阻碍了医学VLM和AI代理的发展。
AI.method: 构建了一个分层级评测基准DeepTumorVQA，包含42种临床亚型的9,262个3D CT体积和476K问题，将推理分解为四个阶段：识别、测量、视觉推理和医学推理，提供直接推理和工具交互两种评估模式。
AI.result: 评估了30多种模型配置，发现可靠的定量测量是主要瓶颈，而工具增强能显著缓解此问题，展示了真实工具使用轨迹可以有效监督代理并减少错误。
AI.conclusion: 从识别到测量再到视觉和医学推理的阶段性进展为未来医学VLM和AI代理研究提供了具体路线图，工具调用和医学知识结合成为新的挑战方向。

title: Forcing-KV: Hybrid KV Cache Compression for Efficient Autoregressive Video Diffusion Models
summary: Autoregressive (AR) video diffusion models adopt a streaming generation framework, enabling long-horizon video generation with real-time responsiveness, as exemplified by the Self Forcing training paradigm. However, existing AR video diffusion models still suffer from significant attention complexity and severe memory overhead due to the redundant key-value (KV) caches across historical frames, which limits scalability. In this paper, we tackle this challenge by introducing KV cache compression into autoregressive video diffusion. We observe that attention heads in mainstream AR diffusion models exhibit markedly distinct attention patterns and functional roles that remain stable across samples and denoising steps. Building on our empirical study of head-wise functional specialization, we divide the attention heads into two categories: static heads, which focus on transitions across autoregressive chunks and intra-frame fidelity, and dynamic heads, which govern inter-frame motion and consistency. We then propose Forcing-KV, a hybrid KV cache compression strategy that performs structured static pruning for static heads and dynamic pruning based on segment-wise similarity for dynamic heads. While maintaining output quality, our method achieves a generation speed of over 29 frames per second on a single NVIDIA H200 GPU along with 30% cache memory reduction, delivering up to 1.35x and 1.50x speedups on LongLive and Self Forcing at 480P resolution, and further scaling to 2.82x speedup at 1080P resolution. Code and demo videos are provided at https://zju-jiyicheng.github.io/Forcing-KV-Page.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Forcing-KV方法，通过混合式KV缓存压缩策略解决自回归视频扩散模型中的内存和计算效率问题，在不牺牲生成质量的前提下实现29fps的实时生成速度和30%的内存减少。
AI.motivation: 现有的自回归视频扩散模型虽然能够实现长视频的实时生成，但注意力机制存在显著的计算复杂性和严重的内存开销问题，主要原因是历史帧间存在冗余的键值缓存，限制了模型的扩展性。
AI.method: 基于注意力头的功能特化观察，将注意力头分为两类：静态头（关注块间转换和帧内保真度）和动态头（控制帧间运动和一致性）。提出Forcing-KV混合压缩策略：对静态头执行结构化静态修剪，对动态头基于分段相似性执行动态修剪。
AI.result: 在单个NVIDIA H200 GPU上实现超过29fps的生成速度，减少30%的缓存内存，在480P分辨率下为LongLive和Self Forcing带来1.35x和1.50x的加速，在1080P分辨率下实现2.82x的加速。
AI.conclusion: Forcing-KV成功解决了自回归视频扩散模型中的KV缓存冗余问题，通过区分不同注意力头的功能角色并采用相应的压缩策略，在保持生成质量的同时显著提升了计算效率，为长视频实时生成提供了有效的解决方案。

title: Spatial-Frequency Gated Swin Transformer for Remote Sensing Single-Image Super-Resolution
summary: Remote Sensing (RS) single-image super-resolution aims to reconstruct high-resolution imagery from low-resolution observations while preserving fine spatial structures. Recent Swin Transformer-based models, including Swin2SR, provide strong spatial context modeling throughshifted-window self-attention, but their feed-forward networks remain generic channel-mixing modules and do not separate low-frequency structural content from high-frequency residual detail. To address this limitation, we propose SFG-SwinSR, a Spatial-Frequency Gated Swin Transformer for single-image super-resolution in remote sensing. SFG-SwinSR modifies the original Swin2SR attention block by replacing each transformer block's standard feed-forward network with a lightweight Spatial-Frequency Gated Feed-Forward Network (SFG-FFN). The module estimates low-frequency content via a depthwise-blur branch, extracts high-frequency residuals by subtraction, refines them with a lightweight spatial branch, and adaptively injects detail through a bottleneck gate. Experiments on SpaceNet and SEN2VENμS show that SFG-SwinSR improves reconstruction quality under the evaluated settings. On SpaceNet, it achieves 45.19 dB PSNR and 0.9852 SSIM, indicating effective enhancement of high-frequency details. This demonstrates that spatial-frequency transformation within the transformer feed-forward network improves detail reconstruction in RS super-resolution.

AI.tldr: SFG-SwinSR通过在Swin Transformer前馈网络中引入空间-频域门控机制，有效改进了遥感单图像超分辨率的细节重建能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于Swin Transformer的超分辨率模型（如Swin2SR）虽然具有良好的空间上下文建模能力，但其前馈网络仍然是通用的通道混合模块，无法有效分离低频结构内容和高频残差细节。
AI.method: 提出SFG-SwinSR模型，用轻量级的空间-频域门控前馈网络(SFG-FFN)替代标准前馈网络。该模块通过深度模糊分支估计低频内容，通过减法提取高频残差，使用轻量空间分支进行细化，并通过瓶颈门控自适应注入细节。
AI.result: 在SpaceNet和SEN2VENμS数据集上的实验表明，SFG-SwinSR重建质量得到提升。在SpaceNet上实现45.19 dB PSNR和0.9852 SSIM，有效增强了高频细节。
AI.conclusion: 在Transformer前馈网络内进行空间-频域变换能够改善遥感超分辨率中的细节重建，验证了该方法的有效性。

title: ConFixGS: Learning to Fix Feedforward 3D Gaussian Splatting with Confidence-Aware Diffusion Priors in Driving Scenes
summary: Feedforward 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) often struggles in trajectory-based sparse-view driving scenes. Existing Gaussian repair methods mainly target optimization-based 3DGS, while diffusion-based repair is typically restricted to iterative refinement near observed viewpoints, leaving feedforward 3DGS repair underexplored. We propose ConFixGS, a plug-and-play method that learns to fix feedforward 3DGS with confidence-aware diffusion priors. Starting from a pretrained feedforward model, ConFixGS generates diffusion-enhanced local pseudo-targets and validates them through reprojection-based cross-checking against support views. The resulting dense confidence maps guide refinement, enhancing reliable details while suppressing hallucinated or inconsistent evidence. On Waymo, nuScenes, and KITTI, ConFixGS improves challenging novel view synthesis, with PSNR gains of up to 3.68 dB and FID reduced by nearly half. Our results highlight confidence-aware fusion of generative priors and support-view consistency as a key principle for robust feedforward 3D driving scene reconstruction.

AI.tldr: ConFixGS 是一种即插即用的扩散先验修复方法，用于解决前馈3D高斯泼溅在稀疏视角驾驶场景中的重建问题，通过置信度感知融合实现了显著的质量提升。
AI.motivation: 现有的3D高斯泼溅方法在基于轨迹的稀疏视角驾驶场景中表现不佳，而现有的高斯修复方法主要针对优化型3DGS，前馈3DGS的修复问题尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: ConFixGS从预训练的前馈模型出发，生成扩散增强的局部伪目标，通过基于重投影的支撐视角交叉检验进行验证，生成密集的置信度图指导细化过程，增强可靠细节并抑制幻觉或不一致性。
AI.result: 在Waymo、nuScenes和KITTI数据集上，ConFixGS显著改善了具有挑战性的新视角合成，PSNR提升高达3.68 dB，FID降低近一半。
AI.conclusion: 置信度感知的生成先验与支撐视角一致性融合是鲁棒前馈3D驾驶场景重建的关键原则。

title: EgoMemReason: A Memory-Driven Reasoning Benchmark for Long-Horizon Egocentric Video Understanding
comment: The first two authors contributed equally. Project website: https://egomemreason.github.io/
summary: Next-generation visual assistants, such as smart glasses, embodied agents, and always-on life-logging systems, must reason over an entire day or more of continuous visual experience. In ultra-long video settings, relevant information is sparsely distributed across hours or days, making memory a fundamental challenge: models must accumulate information over time, recall prior states, track temporal order, and abstract recurring patterns. However, existing week-long video benchmarks are primarily designed for perception and recognition, such as moment localization or global summarization, rather than reasoning that requires integrating evidence across multiple days. To address this gap, we introduce EgoMemReason, a comprehensive benchmark that systematically evaluates week-long egocentric video understanding through memory-driven reasoning. EgoMemReason evaluates three complementary memory types: entity memory, tracking how object states evolve and change across days; event memory, recalling and ordering activities separated by hours or days; and behavior memory, abstracting recurring patterns from sparse, repeated observations over the whole week period. EgoMemReason comprises 500 questions across three memory types and six core challenges, with an average of 5.1 video segments of evidence per question and 25.9 hours of memory backtracking. We evaluate EgoMemReason on 17 methods across MLLMs and agentic frameworks, revealing that even the best model achieves only 39.6% overall accuracy. Further analysis shows that the three memory types fail for distinct reasons and that performance degrades as evidence spans longer temporal horizons, revealing that long-horizon memory remains far from solved. We believe EgoMemReason establishes a strong foundation for evaluating and advancing long-context, memory-aware multimodal systems.

AI.tldr: EgoMemReason是一个评估周长第一人称视频理解的综合基准，专注于模型在超长期视觉体验中的记忆驱动的推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的周长视频基准主要针对感知和识别任务（如时刻定位或全局摘要），而非需要跨多天整合证据的推理任务。下一代视觉助手必须能够处理全天或更长的连续视觉体验，但这面临着重大挑战：如何有效积累信息、回忆先前状态、跟踪时间顺序和抽象重复模式。
AI.method: 构建了EgoMemReason基准，系统性地评估三种互补的记忆类型：实体记忆（跟踪物体状态跨天的演变）、事件记忆（回忆和排序间隔数小时或数天的活动）和行为记忆（从整周的稀疏重复观察中抽象重现模式）。基准包含500个问题，平均每个问题需要5.1个视频段作为证据和25.9小时的记忆回溯。
AI.result: 在17种方法（包括MLLMs和代理框架）上的评估显示，即使是最好的模型也仅达到39.6%的整体准确率。三种记忆类型失败的原因各不相同，且随着证据跨越更长时间范围，性能会进一步下降。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明长时程记忆问题远未解决，EgoMemReason为评估和推进长上下文、记忆感知的多模态系统奠定了坚实基础。

title: Do multimodal models imagine electric sheep?
summary: Yes. We find that large multimodal models develop mental imagery when solving spatial puzzles, and they do imagine sheep when solving sheep puzzles. We fine-tune a Qwen3.5 VLM to solve twelve diverse visual reasoning tasks -- including tangram, jigsaw, sokoban, 3D mental rotation, and rush hour -- that require understanding geometry, spatial relationships, and the consequences of actions. By supervising the model to predict the open-loop sequence of actions to solve a puzzle from an initial state, we show that the model's activations after each action encode meaningful visual information about the intermediate state. This finding suggests that an imperfect visual world model begins to form as a byproduct of learning to select correct actions, in the absence of any explicit visual supervision. Building on this observation, we propose two ways to sharpen and use the mental images formed by the model. We find that integrating as few as sixteen visual tokens per step into the chain of thought improves the average solve rate from 83% to 89%, with particularly strong gains on reasoning-heavy tasks such as jigsaw and 3D mental rotation.

AI.tldr: 研究发现大型多模模型在解决空间谜题时会自发形成心理意象，通过行动预测训练的模型 activations 编码了中间状态的视觉信息，利用这些心理意象能显著提升空间推理性能。
AI.motivation: 探索大型多模模型是否能够在解决空间推理任务时自发形成类似人类的心理想象能力，特别是在需要理解几何关系和行动后果的复杂视觉推理任务中。
AI.method: 对Qwen3.5 VLM进行微调，通过监督模型预测从初始状态解决12种视觉推理谜题的开环动作序列，分析模型每次行动后的activations以检测视觉信息编码。
AI.result: 模型activations确实编码了有意义的中间状态视觉信息；在思维过程中整合少量视觉token(每步16个)可将平均解决率从83%提升至89%，在拼图和3D心理旋转等推理密集型任务上效果显著。
AI.conclusion: 大型多模模型在学习选择正确动作的过程中，会在没有任何显式视觉监督的情况下自发形成不完美但有用的视觉世界模型和心理想象能力，这为理解和增强模型的空间推理能力提供了新思路。

title: MolSight: Molecular Property Prediction with Images
summary: Every molecule ever synthesised can be drawn as a 2D skeletal diagram, yet in modern property prediction this universally available representation has received less focus in favour of molecular graphs, 3D conformers, or billion-parameter language models, each imposing its own computational and data-engineering overhead. We present $\textbf{MolSight}$, the first systematic large-scale study of vision-based Molecular Property Prediction (MPP). Using 10 vision architectures, 7 pre-training strategies, and $2\,M$ molecule images, we evaluate performance across 10 downstream tasks spanning physical-property regression, drug-discovery classification, and quantum-chemistry prediction. To account for the wide variation in structural complexity across pre-training molecules, we further propose a $\textbf{chemistry-informed curriculum}$: five structural complexity descriptors partition the corpus into five tiers of increasing chemical difficulty, consistently outperforming non-curriculum baselines. We show that a single rendered bond-line image, processed by a vision encoder, is sufficient for competitive molecular property prediction, i.e. $\textit{chemical insight from sight alone}$. The best curriculum-trained configuration achieves the top result on $\textbf{5 of 10}$ benchmarks and top two on $\textbf{all 10}$, at $\textbf{$\textit{80$\times$ lower}$}$ FLOPs than the nearest multi-modal competitor.

AI.tldr: MolSight是一项大规模的基于视觉的分子性质预测研究，通过使用分子图像和化学知情课程学习，在多个基准测试中达到了竞争性性能，且计算效率比多模态模型高出80倍。
AI.motivation: 尽管每个分子都可以绘制为2D骨架图，但现代分子性质预测研究中，这种普遍可用的表示方法相比分子图、3D构象或大规模语言模型受到了较少关注，后者都存在计算和数据工程开销大的问题。
AI.method: 使用10种视觉架构、7种预训练策略和200万分子图像进行实验；提出化学知情课程学习，基于5个结构复杂性描述符将语料库划分为5个递增的化学难度等级。
AI.result: 课程训练配置在10个基准测试中获得5个第一、全部10个进入前二名的成绩，FLOPs比最近的多模态竞争者低80倍；证明了单一的渲染线条图像足以进行竞争性分子性质预测。
AI.conclusion: 视觉编码器处理的分子线条图能够实现

title: Discriminative Span as a Predictor of Synthetic Data Utility via Classifier Reconstruction
summary: In many real-world computer vision applications, including medical imaging and industrial inspection, binary classification tasks are characterized by a severe scarcity of positive samples. A widely adopted solution is to generate synthetic positive data using image-to-image transformations applied to negative samples. However, a fundamental challenge remains: how can we reliably assess whether such synthetic data will improve downstream model performance? In this work, we propose a geometry-driven metric that predicts the utility of synthetic data without requiring model training. Our approach operates in the embedding space of a pre-trained foundation model and represents the dataset through difference vectors between samples. We evaluate whether the weight vector of a linear classifier can be expressed within the subspace spanned by these variations by measuring the relative projection error. Intuitively, if the variations induced by synthetic data capture task-relevant directions, their span can approximate the classifier, resulting in low projection error. Conversely, poor synthetic data fails to span these directions, leading to higher error. Across multiple datasets and architectures, we show that this metric exhibits strong correlation with downstream classification performance of CNNs trained on mixtures of real negative and synthetic positive data. These findings suggest that the proposed metric serves as a practical and informative tool for evaluating synthetic data quality in data-scarce settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种几何驱动的度量方法，无需模型训练即可预测合成数据对下游模型性能的提升效果，通过在预训练模型的嵌入空间中测量线性分类器权重向量的相对投影误差来评估合成数据质量。
