AI.motivation: 在实际计算机视觉应用中，如医学成像和工业检测，二分类任务面临正样本严重稀缺的问题。虽然可以通过对负样本应用图像到图像变换生成合成正样本数据，但如何可靠评估这些合成数据是否能提升下游模型性能仍是一个根本性挑战。
AI.method: 方法在预训练基础模型的嵌入空间中操作，通过样本间的差分向量表示数据集。通过测量线性分类器权重向量在这些变换所张成的子空间中的相对投影误差来评估合成数据的效用。如果合成数据捕获了任务相关的方向，其张成空间可以近似分类器，投影误差较低；反之则误差较高。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和架构上的实验表明，该度量指标与CNN在真实负样本和合成正样本混合数据上训练的下游分类性能表现出强相关性。
AI.conclusion: 研究发现表明，所提出的度量标准是数据稀缺情况下评估合成数据质量的实用且有效的工具，为评估合成数据提供了无需训练的高效解决方案。

title: V-ABS: Action-Observer Driven Beam Search for Dynamic Visual Reasoning
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable success in general perception, yet complex multi-step visual reasoning remains a persistent challenge. Although recent agentic approaches incorporate tool use, they often neglect critical execution feedback. Consequently, they suffer from the imagination-action-observer (IAO) bias, a misalignment between prior imagination and observer feedback that undermines reasoning stability and optimality. To bridge this gap, we introduce V-ABS, an action-observer driven beam search framework that enables deliberate reasoning through thinker-actor-observer iterations. We also propose an entropy-based adaptive weighting algorithm to mitigate the IAO bias by dynamically balancing the confidence scores between the policy priors and the observational feedback. Moreover, we construct a large-scale supervised fine-tuning (SFT) dataset comprising over 80k samples to guide the model to assign higher prior confidence to correct action paths. Extensive experiments across eight diverse benchmarks show that V-ABS achieves state-of-the-art performance, delivering an average improvement of 19.7% on the Qwen3-VL-8B baseline and consistent gains across both open-source and proprietary models.

AI.tldr: V-ABS是一个基于动作-观察者驱动的光束搜索框架，通过思考者-执行者-观察者迭代机制和自适应加权算法来解决多模态大语言模型中的推理偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的代理方法忽视执行反馈，导致想象-行动-观察者(IAO)偏差，即先验想象与观察者反馈之间的不一致，影响了多模态大语言模型在复杂多步视觉推理中的稳定性和最优性。
AI.method: 提出V-ABS框架，包含三个核心组件：1) 基于思考者-执行者-观察者迭代的推理机制；2) 基于熵的自适应加权算法，动态平衡策略先验和观察反馈之间的置信度分数；3) 构建包含8万多个样本的大规模监督微调数据集。
AI.result: 在8个多样化基准测试中，V-ABS达到最先进的性能，相比Qwen3-VL-8B基线平均提升19.7%，在开源和专有模型上都展现出一致的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: V-ABS通过有效整合执行反馈和动态调整置信度平衡，成功解决了IAO偏差问题，显著提升了多模态大语言模型在复杂视觉推理任务中的表现。

title: DriveFuture: Future-Aware Latent World Models for Autonomous Driving
summary: Existing latent world models for autonomous driving have opened a promising path toward future-aware driving intelligence. However, they typically treat future latent states as prediction targets or auxiliary signals, rather than directly conditioning trajectory planning. This can entangle current and future features in latent space. In this work, we propose DriveFuture, a future-aware latent world modeling framework for autonomous driving that explicitly learns planning-oriented foresight by conditioning the current latent state modeling process on future world states. Specifically, during training, the model first predicts future latent world states from the current latent state and ego action, and then refines the prediction against the ground-truth future latent state via cross-attention. The resulting future-aware latent serves as an explicit condition for a diffusion-based trajectory planner. During inference, DriveFuture conditions on the predicted future latent state instead of the ground-truth future state. DriveFuture achieves SOTA performance on the public NAVSIM benchmarks, reaching \textbf{55.5} EPDMS on NAVSIM-v2 {\textcolor{blue}{\textit{navhard}}}, \textbf{89.9} EPDMS on NAVSIM-v2 {\textcolor{blue}{\textit{navtest}}}, and \textbf{90.7} PDMS on NAVSIM-v1 {\textcolor{blue}{\textit{navtest}}}, respectively. These results suggest that the key to latent world modeling lies not merely in simulating future states, but more importantly in conditioning current decision-making on future states. Notably, as of April 2026, DriveFuture ranks \textbf{1st} on the \href{https://huggingface.co/spaces/AGC2025/e2e-driving-navhard}{NAVSIM-v2 {\textcolor{blue}{\textit{navhard}}}} leaderboard and achieves SOTA performance on \href{https://huggingface.co/spaces/AGC2024-P/e2e-driving-navtest}{NAVSIM-v1 {\textcolor{blue}{\textit{navtest}}}}.

AI.tldr: DriveFuture是一个面向规划的自动驾驶世界模型框架，通过将未来状态作为显式条件来指导当前轨迹规划，在NAVSIM基准测试中取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的潜在世界模型通常将未来潜在状态视为预测目标或辅助信号，而不是直接用于条件化轨迹规划，这会导致当前和未来特征在潜在空间中相互纠缠。
AI.method: 提出DriveFuture框架，训练时先从当前潜在状态预测未来世界状态，然后通过交叉注意力与真实未来潜在状态进行对齐优化，最终将未来感知潜在状态作为基于扩散的轨迹规划器的显式条件。
AI.result: 在NAVSIM-v2 navhard上达到55.5 EPDMS，NAVSIM-v2 navtest上达到89.9 EPDMS，NAVSIM-v1 navtest上达到90.7 PDMS，在相关排行榜上排名第1。
AI.conclusion: 潜在世界建模的关键不仅在于模拟未来状态，更重要的是将当前决策建立在基于未来状态的条件上，这为实现真正具有前瞻性的自动驾驶智能提供了新方向。

title: BabelDOC: Better Layout-Preserving PDF Translation via Intermediate Representation
summary: As global cross-lingual communication intensifies, language barriers in visually rich documents such as PDFs remain a practical bottleneck. Existing document translation pipelines face a tension between linguistic processing and layout preservation: text-oriented Computer-Assisted Translation (CAT) systems often discard structural metadata, while document parsers focus on extraction and do not support faithful re-rendering after translation. We introduce BabelDOC, an Intermediate Representation (IR)-based framework for layout-preserving PDF translation. BabelDOC decouples visual layout metadata from semantic content, enabling document-level translation operations such as terminology extraction, cross-page context handling, glossary-constrained generation, and formula placeholdering. The translated content is then re-anchored to the original layout through an adaptive typesetting engine. Experiments on a curated 200-page benchmark, together with human evaluation and multimodal LLM-as-a-judge evaluation, show that BabelDOC improves layout fidelity, visual aesthetics, and terminology consistency over representative baselines, while maintaining competitive translation precision. The open-source toolkit and its interactive downstream applications are publicly available and have attracted over 8.4K GitHub stars and 17 contributors at the time of writing. A demonstration video is also available.

AI.tldr: BabelDOC是一种基于中间表示(IR)的PDF文档翻译框架，能够在保持原有布局的同时实现高质量的跨语言翻译，支持术语一致性、跨页面上下文处理等功能。
AI.motivation: 随着全球跨语言交流日益频繁，PDF等视觉丰富文档的语言障碍成为实际瓶颈。现有的文档翻译管道在语言处理和布局保存之间存在矛盾：文本导向的CAT系统经常丢失结构元数据，而文档解析器专注于提取但不支持翻译后的忠实重渲染。
AI.method: BabelDOC通过中间表示框架将视觉布局元数据与语义内容解耦，支持文档级翻译操作（如术语提取、跨页面上下文处理、词汇表约束生成和公式占位符），然后通过自适应排版引擎将翻译内容重新锚定到原始布局。
AI.result: 在200页基准测试上的实验表明，BabelDOC在布局保真度、视觉美感和术语一致性方面优于代表性基线，同时保持了竞争性的翻译精度。该开源工具包已获得超过8.4K GitHub星标和17个贡献者。
AI.conclusion: BabelDOC成功解决了PDF翻译中布局保存与语言处理的矛盾问题，为跨语言文档交流提供了实用的技术解决方案，获得了社区的广泛认可和应用。

title: MOTOR-Bench: A Real-world Dataset and Multi-agent Framework for Zero-shot Human Mental State Understanding
summary: Understanding human mental states from natural behavior is crucial for intelligent systems in the real world. However, most current research focuses on predicting isolated mental state labels, lacking structured annotations of complex interpersonal interactions. To support structured analysis, we introduce MOTOR-Bench, a carefully-designed benchmark with a real-world dataset MOTOR-dataset, containing 1,440 multimodal video clips in collaborative learning scenarios, reflecting key real-world data challenges including natural class imbalance, visual noise, and domain-specific language. Each sample is labeled by educational experts based on self-regulated learning theory. We further evaluate several state-of-the-art multimodal large language models and multi-agent systems in a zero-shot setting on our MOTOR-Bench. However, their performance on this task remains limited, suggesting that existing methods still struggle with structured reasoning from observable behavior to deeper mental states. To address this challenge, we propose a reasoning multi-agent framework, named MOTOR-MAS. It coordinates multiple agents through a structured agent coordination mechanism to infer explicit behaviors, internal cognitions, and psychological emotions. Experimental results show that our MOTOR-MAS outperforms the best single-model benchmark by 15.93 points in Macro-F1 scores for the three labels of behavior, cognition, and emotion, and outperforms the general multi-agent benchmark by 10.2 points in internal cognition prediction.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了MOTOR-Bench基准数据集和MOTOR-MAS多智能体框架，用于从自然行为中理解人类的心理状态，在协作学习场景中实现了15.93点的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 当前大多数研究专注于预测孤立的心理状态标签，缺乏对复杂人际互动的结构化注释，无法有效处理现实世界中的数据挑战，如自然类别不平衡、视觉噪声和特定领域语言。
AI.method: 构建包含1,440个多模态视频片段的MOTOR-dataset，设计MOTOR-Bench基准，并提出MOTOR-MAS推理多智能体框架，通过结构化的智能体协调机制推断显式行为、内在认知和心理情绪。
AI.result: MOTOR-MAS在行为、认知和情绪三个标签的Macro-F1得分上比最佳单模型基准提升15.93分，在内在认知预测上比通用多智能体基准提升10.2分。
AI.conclusion: 现有方法在从可观察行为到深层心理状态的结构化推理方面仍存在困难，而MOTOR-MAS通过多智能体协调机制有效解决了这一挑战，为理解人类心理状态提供了新的解决方案。

title: Distilling 3D Spatial Reasoning into a Lightweight Vision-Language Model with CoT
summary: Large-scale 3D vision-language models (VLMs) like LLaVA-3D offer strong spatial reasoning but are difficult to deploy due to high computational costs. We propose a knowledge distillation framework that transfers spatial reasoning from a 7B teacher to a 2.29B student model. Our approach achieves 8.7x lower inference latency and a 3x reduction in model size while retaining 54-72% of the teacher's performance. The framework utilizes VGGT as the vision encoder and a multi-task distillation pipeline with uncertainty-aware loss weighting. To improve reasoning without chain-of-thought (CoT) data, we introduce "Hidden CoT": learnable latent tokens that serve as an internal scratchpad before answer generation. This is the first use of latent scratchpad reasoning in distilled 3D VLMs. The student model jointly performs spatial description, depth estimation, and object detection. Experiments on ScanNet and 3D-FRONT show strong spatial understanding, reaching 68-72% accuracy on proximity and contact tasks. Our framework enables efficient 3D scene QA on resource-constrained platforms.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种知识蒸馏框架，将3D视觉语言模型从70亿参数压缩至23亿参数，实现8.7倍推理加速，同时保留54-72%的性能，并首次在蒸馏3D VLM中引入隐藏思维链隐式推理机制。
AI.motivation: 大规模3D视觉语言模型如LLaVA-3D具有强大的空间推理能力，但计算成本高昂，难以在实际场景中部署，需要在性能和效率之间找到平衡点。
AI.method: 采用VGGT作为视觉编码器的多任务知识蒸馏框架，设计了不确定性感知损失权重机制，并创新性地提出
AI.result: 学生模型实现了8.7倍的推理延迟降低和3倍的模型大小减少，在空间描述、深度估计和目标检测任务上表现良好，在ScanNet和3D-FRONT数据集上的邻近关系和接触关系任务达到68-72%的准确率
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功地将大型3D VLM的空间推理能力压缩为轻量级模型，为资源受限平台的3D场景问答应用提供了可行方案，隐式推理机制的引入为蒸馏模型提升了推理效果开辟了新途径

title: On-Policy Distillation with Best-of-N Teacher Rollout Selection
summary: On-policy distillation (OPD), which supervises a student on its own sampled trajectories, has emerged as a data-efficient post-training method for improving reasoning while avoiding the reward dependence of reinforcement learning and the catastrophic forgetting often observed in standard supervised fine-tuning. However, standard OPD typically computes teacher supervision under noisy student-generated contexts and often relies on a single stochastic teacher rollout per prompt. As a result, the supervision signal can be high-variance: the sampled teacher trajectory can be incorrect, uninformative, or poorly matched to the student's current reasoning behavior. To address this limitation, we propose BRTS, a Best-of-N Rollout Teacher Selection framework for on-policy distillation. BRTS augments standard student-context OPD with a teacher-context supervision branch constructed from the curated teacher trajectory. Rather than distilling from the first sampled teacher rollout, BRTS samples a small pool of teacher trajectories and selects the auxiliary trajectory using a simple priority rule: correctness first, student alignment second. When multiple correct teacher trajectories are available, BRTS chooses the one most aligned with the student's current behavior; when unconditioned teacher samples fail on harder prompts, it invokes a ground-truth-conditioned recovery step to elicit a natural derivation. The selected trajectory is then used to provide reliable teacher-context supervision inside the OPD loop, augmented with an auxiliary loss on the teacher trajectory. Experiments on AIME 2024, AIME 2025, and AMC 2023 show that BRTS improves over standard OPD on challenging reasoning benchmarks, with the largest gains on harder datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/BWGZK-keke/BRTS.

AI.tldr: BRTS是一个改进的同策略蒸馏框架，通过选择最佳教师轨迹来减少监督信号的高方差问题，提升模型在复杂数学推理任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 标准同策略蒸馏(OPD)存在监督信号高方差的问题：教师轨迹可能在嘈杂的学生上下文中计算，且通常依赖单个随机的教师滚动轨迹，导致采样轨迹可能出现错误、信息不足或与学生当前推理行为不匹配。
AI.method: 提出BRTS框架，通过采样多个教师轨迹并采用简单优先规则选择（正确性优先，学生对齐次之）；当存在多个正确轨迹时，选择与学生当前行为最一致的；当无条件教师样本失败时，启动真实条件恢复步骤。选定的轨迹用于提供可靠的教师上下文监督，并添加辅助损失。
AI.result: 在AIME 2024、AIME 2025和AMC 2023上的实验表明，BRTS在复杂数学推理基准测试中均优于标准OPD，在更难的数据集上提升最为显著。
AI.conclusion: BRTS通过优化教师轨迹选择机制，有效解决了同策略蒸馏中的监督信号高方差问题，提升了学生在复杂数学推理任务上的表现，为后续研究提供了有效改进方向。

title: Fetal Brain Imaging: A Composite Neural Network Approach for Keyframe Detection in Ultrasound Videos
summary:
This article presents a novel approach to keyframe detection in ultrasound videos, with a particular focus on fetal brain imaging. The proposed model is a composite neural network architecture that combines a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) with a Recurrent Neural Network (RNN). The CNN extracts spatial features from individual video frames, while the RNN captures temporal dependencies between consecutive frames within each video sequence.
  The proposed model may improve the efficiency and accuracy of fetal brain ultrasound analysis, thereby supporting earlier detection, diagnosis, and treatment planning for selected fetal brain conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合CNN和RNN的新型复合神经网络架构，用于胎儿脑部超声视频的关键帧检测，旨在提高胎儿脑部超声分析的效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 胎儿脑部超声分析面临效率和准确性挑战，需要更有效的关键帧检测方法来支持早期诊断和治疗规划。
AI.method: 采用复合神经网络架构，使用CNN提取单个视频帧的空间特征，利用RNN捕捉视频序列中连续帧之间的时间依赖关系。
AI.result: 提出的模型有望改善胎儿脑部超声分析的效率和准确性，为特定胎儿脑部疾病的早期检测、诊断和治疗规划提供支持。
AI.conclusion: 该CNN-RNN复合模型为胎儿脑部超声视频分析提供了一个有效的解决方案，具有临床应用潜力。

title: DRIVE-C: A Controlled Corruption Dataset for Autonomous Driving
summary: DRIVE-C is a controlled corruption dataset designed to evaluate visual perception robustness in autonomous driving systems. It is built from real-world forward-facing driving videos collected across daytime, nighttime, urban, rural, freeway, and parking environments. Clean clips are anonymized via localized face and license plate blurring, then transformed with physics-inspired synthetic degradations. The dataset contains 10 clean clips and 600 corrupted clips spanning 12 camera degradation types across five severity levels, with per-clip metadata and Global Sensor Health Index (GSHI) annotations. DRIVE-C supports robustness benchmarking, degradation-aware modeling, uncertainty estimation, out-of-distribution (OOD) detection, and sensor health monitoring for Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS). By providing pixel-aligned clean and degraded video clips with fully reproducible corruption parameters, DRIVE-C offers a structured testbed for studying perception reliability under controlled camera degradation.

AI.tldr: DRIVE-C是一个用于评估自动驾驶系统视觉感知鲁棒性的可控 corruption数据集，包含10个干净视频片段和600个经过12种物理启发的合成降级处理的视频片段，支持鲁棒性基准测试、传感器健康监测等多种应用。
AI.motivation: 为解决自动驾驶系统在真实环境中面临的摄像头降级问题，需要建立一个可控的测试基准来评估视觉感知系统的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 收集真实驾驶视频数据，对视频进行匿名化处理，然后应用12种物理启发的合成降级方法，每个降级类型设置5个严重程度级别，并提供元数据和全局传感器健康指数标注。
AI.result: 构建了包含10个干净片段和600个降级片段的数据集，覆盖昼夜、城乡、高速公路、停车场等多种驾驶环境，提供像素对齐的干净与降级视频片段。
AI.conclusion: DRIVE-C为研究受控摄像头降级下的感知可靠性提供了结构化测试平台，能够促进自动驾驶系统中鲁棒性建模、不确定性估计和传感器健康监测等相关研究领域的发展。

title: CrossVL: Complexity-Aware Feature Routing and Paired Curriculum for Cross-View Vision-Language Detection
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. Code available at https://github.com/1nyourlife/Crossvl_cvpr2026
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) enable text-guided object detection but degrade severely under cross-view scenarios where ground and aerial viewpoints differ in altitude, scale, and spatial layout. These geometric changes introduce systematic complexity variations between viewpoints, e.g., ground view images contain dense and highly occluded structures, while aerial images are sparse and globally organized. Fixed VLM fusion mechanisms cannot handle this discrepancy. We propose CrossVL, a framework combining Complexity-Aware Pathway Aggregation (CPA) and Paired Curriculum Learning (PCL) for enhanced cross-view detection for VLM. CPA estimates scene complexity from multimodal statistics and routes visual features through multiple pathways to obtain view-specific representations. PCL leverages semantic consistency of synchronized ground-aerial pairs to provide stable early supervision and then gradually shifts toward randomized sampling. On MAVREC, CrossVL improves Florence-2's aerial mAP from 58.66% to 61.03% and reduces the ground-aerial performance gap from 8.63pp to 6.65pp, while also achieving a 3.3x reduction in variance across random seeds. CPA provides stable complexity-aware feature aggregation, and PCL enhances optimization dynamics. Together, they demonstrate that coordinated architectural and training adaptations are crucial for robust cross-view VLM detection.

AI.tldr: CrossVL通过复杂度感知路径聚合和配对课程学习，显著提升了视觉语言模型在跨视图目标检测中的性能，缩小了地面与空中视图间的性能差距。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉语言模型在跨视图场景下性能严重下降，因为地面视图和空中视图在高度、尺度和空间布局上存在几何变化，导致复杂度的系统性差异，而固定的融合机制无法处理这种差异。
AI.method: 提出CrossVL框架，包含：1)复杂度感知路径聚合(CPA)：根据多模态统计估计场景复杂度，通过多路径获取视图特定表示；2)配对课程学习(PCL)：利用同步地面-空中对的语义一致性提供早期监督，然后逐渐转向随机采样。
AI.result: 在MAVREC数据集上，CrossVL将Florence-2的空中mAP从58.66%提升至61.03%，地面-空中性能差距从8.63个百分点降至6.65个百分点，同时随机种子的方差降低了3.3倍。
AI.conclusion: CPA提供了稳定的复杂度感知特征聚合，PCL优化了训练动态，证明了协调的架构和训练改编对于鲁棒的跨视图VLM检测至关重要。

title: Fashion Florence: Fine-Tuning Florence-2 for Structured Fashion Attribute Extraction
summary: We present Fashion Florence, a Florence-2 vision-language model fine-tuned with LoRA to extract structured fashion attributes from clothing images. Given a single photograph, the model generates a JSON object containing category, color, material, style tags, and occasion tags, structured output suitable for direct programmatic consumption by downstream recommendation and retrieval systems. Fine-tuning data is derived from the iMaterialist Fashion dataset (228 labels), where we collapse fine-grained annotations into a compact 6-category, 16-color, 19-style schema via rule-based label engineering. We apply LoRA (r=16, alpha=32) to all decoder linear layers, training for 3 epochs on 3,688 examples. On a held-out test set of 461 images, Fashion Florence achieves 94.6% category accuracy and 63.0% material accuracy, compared to 89.3% / 43.3% for GPT-4o-mini and 87.4% for Gemini 2.5 Flash. Fashion Florence produces valid JSON in 99.8% of outputs while running at 0.77B parameters on a single GPU at zero marginal inference cost. Style tag F1 reaches 0.753 vs. 0.612 (Gemini) and 0.398 (GPT-4o-mini). The model is deployed as a Hugging Face Space and integrated into Loom, an open-source outfit recommendation system.

AI.tldr: Fashion Florence是一个基于Florence-2微调的视觉语言模型，能从服装图像中提取结构化属性，生成可直接用于下游系统的JSON格式输出，在多个指标上超越了GPT-4o-mini和Gemini 2.5 Flash。
AI.motivation: 为了解决服装图像属性自动提取的问题，为推荐和检索系统提供可直接程序化消费的结构化数据，同时超越现有大型语言模型的性能。
AI.method: 使用Florence-2作为基础模型，采用LoRA微调技术(r=16, alpha=32)对所有解码器线性层进行微调，基于iMaterialist Fashion数据集，通过规则将228个细粒度标签简化为6类别、16颜色、19样式的紧凑模式。
AI.result: 在461张测试图像上，Fashion Florence达到94.6%类别准确率和63.0%材料准确率，JSON输出有效率达99.8%，样式标签F1分数0.753，均显著优于GPT-4o-mini和Gemini 2.5 Flash。
AI.conclusion: Fashion Florence是一个高效轻量级的服装属性提取解决方案，具有零边际推理成本和实际部署可行性，已成功集成到Loom开源服装推荐系统中。

title: Probing Routing-Conditional Calibration in Attention-Residual Transformers
summary: Post-hoc calibration is usually evaluated as a function of logits or softmax confidence alone, even as routing-augmented architectures increasingly accompany predictions with sample-specific internal routing traces and pair them with claims of calibration-relevant uncertainty. We ask a basic question: do these traces provide stable routing-specific evidence for post-hoc calibration beyond confidence? We study this in Attention-Residual transformers (Kimi Team, 2026) through a matched-confidence diagnostic suite that stratifies examples by routing-derived state, compares subgroup gaps against within-bin routing-permutation nulls, and evaluates matched post-hoc probes differing only in their auxiliary feature. Across our completed AR runs, scalar routing summaries do not provide stable evidence of routing-conditional miscalibration: weighted gaps remain small or seed-sensitive, and only $1$ of $30$ within-bin permutation tests rejects the conditional-null at $α=0.05$ (only on one seed; not stable across seeds in that cell). AR-CondCal, a minimal $2$-D Nadaraya--Watson probe on confidence and routing-depth variance, lies within the seed-variance band of matched confidence-only and predictive-entropy controls and does not reliably improve worst-routing-tertile ECE; bandwidth-sensitivity checks (Scott multiples, CV-NLL, global-ECE oracle) do not change this. A full-vector MLP over $(c, H_1, \ldots, H_L)$ can appear to improve over a linear confidence baseline, but the apparent gain disappears once a capacity-matched confidence-only MLP is included as a control, and shuffled routing profiles achieve comparable performance. Apparent routing-aware calibration gains in this AR setting should not be read as internal-state calibration until matched-confidence, bandwidth, capacity, and permutation controls rule out common confounds.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，在Attention-Residual transformers模型中，样本间路由轨迹提供的路由特定证据并不能为后hoc校准提供超出置信度的稳定增益，需要通过严格对照实验来排除常见混杂因素。
AI.motivation: 随着路由增强架构的发展，预测结果常伴随内部路由轨迹，这些轨迹被认为与校准相关的不确定性有关，但这些路由轨迹是否能提供独立于置信度的稳定路由特定证据尚不清楚。
AI.method: 研究采用匹配置信度诊断套件，通过路由衍生状态分层、比较子组间隙与箱内置换零假设、评估仅辅助特征不同的后hoc探测器等方法进行分析，包括加权间隙分析、内置换测试、AR-CondCal探测器和全向量MLP等实验设计。
AI.result: 标量路由摘要未能提供稳定的路由条件误校准证据；AR-CondCal探测器相对于置信度对照组无可靠改进；全向量MLP表面增益在加入容量匹配对照组后消失；洗牌路由轮廓可获得可比性能。
AI.conclusion: 在AR设置中，表观的路由感知校准增益不应被解读为内部状态校准，必须通过匹配置信度、带宽、容量和置换对照来排除常见混杂因素才能得出可靠结论。

title: MoPO: Incorporating Motion Prior for Occluded Human Mesh Recovery
summary: Although recent studies have made remarkable progress in human mesh recovery, they still exhibit limited robustness to occlusions and often produce inaccurate poses and severe motion jitter due to the insufficient spatial features for occluded body parts. Inspired by the rapid advancements in human motion prediction, we discover that compared to occluded image features, pose sequence inherently contains reliable motion prior for estimating occluded body parts. In this paper, we incorporate Motion Prior for Occluded human mesh recovery, called MoPO. Our MoPO mainly consists of two components: 1) The motion de-occlusion module, where we propose a spatial-temporal occlusion detector to detect joint visibility, and then we propose a lightweight motion predictor to complete the occluded body parts by predicting the most plausible joint positions based on history poses. 2) The motion-aware fusion and refinement module, which fuses the completed joint sequence with image features to estimate human shape and initial human pose. Moreover, the completed joint sequence is further used to refine the final human pose through inverse kinematics, which provides the occlusion-free motion prior for regressing human poses. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MoPO achieves state-of-the-art performance on both occlusion-specific and standard benchmarks, significantly enhancing the accuracy and temporal consistency of occluded human mesh recovery. Our code and demo can be found in the supplementary material.

AI.tldr: MoPO是一种结合运动先验的人体网格恢复方法，通过时空遮挡检测和运动预测来处理被遮挡的身体部位，显著提升了遮挡情况下的人体姿态估计精度和时序一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有的人体网格恢复方法对遮挡的鲁棒性有限，由于遮挡身体部位的空间特征不足，常产生不准确的姿态和严重的运动抖动。研究发现，与遮挡的图像特征相比，姿态序列本身就包含估计遮挡身体部位的可靠运动先验。
AI.method: MoPO主要由两个组件构成：1)运动去遮挡模块，提出时空遮挡检测器检测关节可见性，并使用轻量级运动预测器基于历史姿态预测最合理的关节位置来完成遮挡部位；2)运动感知融合和优化模块，将完成的关节序列与图像特征融合来估计人体形状和初始姿态，并通过逆运动学进一步优化最终姿态。
AI.result: MoPO在遮挡专用和标准基准测试上都达到了最先进的性能，显著提升了遮挡人体网格恢复的准确性和时序一致性。
AI.conclusion: 通过将运动先验引入到人体网格恢复任务中，MoPO有效解决了遮挡情况下姿态估计不准确和运动抖动的问题，为处理现实场景中的遮挡问题提供了新的解决思路。

title: Clip-level Uncertainty and Temporal-aware Active Learning for End-to-End Multi-Object Tracking
comment: Accepted to 2026 IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP). Copyright 2026 IEEE. Published in 2026 IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP), scheduled for 13-17 September 2026 in Tampere, Finland
summary: Multi-Object Tracking (MOT) in dynamic environments relies on robust temporal reasoning to maintain consistent object identities over time. Transformer-based end-to-end MOT models achieve strong performance by explicitly modeling temporal dependencies, yet training them requires extensive bounding-box and identity annotations. Given the high labeling cost and strong redundancy in videos, Active Learning (AL) is an effective approach to improve annotation efficiency. However, existing AL methods for MOT primarily operate at the frame level, which is structurally misaligned with modern end-to-end trackers whose inference and training rely on multi-frame clips. To bridge this gap, we formulate clip-level active learning and propose Clip-level Uncertainty and Temporal-aware Active Learning (CUTAL). In contrast to frame-based approaches, CUTAL scores each clip using uncertainty metrics derived from multi-frame predictions to capture inter-frame correspondence ambiguities, while enforcing temporal diversity to select an informative and non-redundant subset. Experiments show that CUTAL achieves stronger overall performance than baselines at the same label budgets across MeMOTR and SambaMOTR. Notably, CUTAL achieves performance comparable to full supervision for MeMOTR on both datasets using only 50% of the labeled training data.

AI.tldr: CUTAL提出了一种基于片段级的多目标跟踪主动学习方法，通过不确定性评分和时间多样性选择，仅用50%标注数据即可达到全监督性能。
AI.motivation: Transformer端到端多目标跟踪模型性能优异但训练依赖大量标注，而传统基于帧的主动学习方法与现代基于片段的跟踪器结构不匹配，需要新的主动学习策略。
AI.method: 提出CUTAL方法，在片段级进行主动学习：1)利用多帧预测的不确定性指标评分捕获帧间对应歧义；2)强制执行时间多样性选择信息丰富且非冗余的片段 subset。
AI.result: 在MeMOTR和SambaMOTR上，CUTAL在相同标注预算下显著优于基线方法；MeMOTR仅需50%标注数据即可达到全监督性能。
AI.conclusion: 片段级主动学习能更好地适应现代端到端跟踪器，CUTAL通过结合不确定性和时间感知有效提升了多目标跟踪的标注效率。

title: Learning to Align Generative Appearance Priors for Fine-grained Image Retrieval
summary: Fine-grained image retrieval (FGIR) typically relies on supervision from seen categories to learn discriminative embeddings for retrieving unseen categories. However, such supervision often biases retrieval models toward the semantics of seen categories rather than the underlying appearance characteristics that generalize across categories, thereby limiting retrieval performance on unseen categories. To tackle this, we propose GAPan, a Generative Appearance Prior alignment network that reformulates the learning objective from category prediction toward appearance modeling. Technically, GAPan treats retrieval features with an invertible density model based on normalizing flows. In the forward direction, the flow maps all instance features into a latent density space, where each seen category is modeled by a class-conditional Gaussian prior and optimized via exact likelihood estimation. This formulation preserves richer appearance details by leveraging the invertible property of the flows. In the reverse direction, samples from the high-density regions of these learned priors are mapped back to the feature space to produce appearance-aware anchors that reflect intra-category variation. These anchors supervise a prior-driven alignment objective that aligns retrieval embeddings with category-specific appearance distributions, thereby improving generalization to unseen categories. Evaluations demonstrate that our GAPan achieves state-of-the-art performance on both widely-used fine- and coarse-grained benchmarks.

AI.tldr: GAPan是一种基于生成外观先验对齐网络的方法，通过将特征视为可逆密度模型来学习类别间外观分布，从而提升细粒度图像检索的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统的细粒度图像检索方法依赖于已见类别的监督，这会导致模型偏向于已见类别的语义而非可泛化的外观特征，限制了在未见类别上的检索性能。
AI.method: GAPan使用基于归一化流的可逆密度模型处理检索特征：前向将实例特征映射到隐空间，每个类别用条件高斯先验建模并通过精确似然估计优化；反向将先验高密度区域样本映射回特征空间生成感知外观的锚点，监督先验驱动的对齐目标。
AI.result: GAPan在广泛使用的细粒度和粗粒度基准测试中都取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过将学习目标从类别预测转向外观建模，GAPan有效地解决了传统方法的语义偏差问题，显著提升了模型在未见类别上的检索泛化能力。

title: DA-SegFormer: Damage-Aware Semantic Segmentation for Fine-Grained Disaster Assessment
comment: Accepted for 2026 IEEE International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium (IGARSS 2026)
summary: Rapid and accurate damage assessment following natural disasters is critical for effective emergency response. However, identifying fine-grained damage levels (e.g., distinguishing minor from major roof damage) in UAV imagery remains challenging due to the degradation of texture cues during resizing and extreme class imbalance. We propose DA-SegFormer, a damage-aware adaptation of the SegFormer architecture optimized for high-resolution disaster imagery. Our method introduces a Class-Aware Sampling strategy to guarantee exposure to rare damage features, and it integrates Online Hard Example Mining (OHEM) with Dice Loss to dynamically focus on underrepresented classes. In addition, we employ a resolution-preserving inference protocol that maintains native texture details. Evaluated on the RescueNet dataset, DA-SegFormer achieves 74.61\% mIoU, outperforming the baseline by 2.55\%. Notably, our improvements yield double-digit gains in critical damage classes: Minor Damage (+11.7%) and Major Damage (+21.3%).

AI.tldr: DA-SegFormer是一种专为高分辨率灾害图像优化的语义分割模型，通过类感知采样、困难样本挖掘和分辨率保持推理解决了灾害损害评估中的纹理退化和类别不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 自然灾害后快速准确的损害评估对应急响应至关重要，但现有方法在处理UAV图像时面临纹理线索丢失和极端类别不平衡的挑战，特别是在识别细粒度损害级别方面。
AI.method: 提出DA-SegFormer模型，集成了Class-Aware Sampling策略确保罕见损害特征的暴露，结合OHEM与Dice Loss动态关注代表性不足的类别，并采用保持原始纹理细节的分辨率保留推理协议。
AI.result: 在RescueNet数据集上达到74.61%的mIoU，比基线提升2.55%，在关键损害类别上获得双位数增长：轻微损害(+11.7%)和重大损害(+21.3%)。
AI.conclusion: DA-SegFormer通过针对性解决纹理退化和类别不平衡问题，显著提高了UAV灾害图像中细粒度损害识别的准确性，为应急响应提供了更可靠的损害评估支持。

title: The Cartesian Shortcut: Re-evaluate Vision Reasoning in Polar Coordinate Space
summary: As current Multimodal Large Language Models rapidly saturate canonical visual reasoning benchmarks, a key question emerges: do these strong scores genuinely reflect robust visual understanding? We identify a pervasive vulnerability, the \textbf{Cartesian Shortcut}: visual reasoning benchmarks prevalently build on orthogonal grid-based layouts that can be readily discretized into explicit textual coordinates. Models systematically exploit this property, heavily leveraging text-based deductive reasoning to assist visual problem-solving. To systematically dismantle this shortcut, we introduce \textbf{Polaris-Bench}, which re-formulates 53 visual reasoning tasks in Polar coordinate space with paired Cartesian counterparts as reference, while preserving consistent logical constraints and task semantics -- thus fundamentally breaking the orthogonal prior that models exploit. Comprehensive evaluation across $14$ state-of-the-art MLLMs reveals that frontier models achieving $70$--$83\%$ on Cartesian layouts collapse to $31$--$39\%$ on Polar equivalents, with degradation persisting even under complete logical equivalence. Moreover, reasoning gains observed on Cartesian layouts are severely diminished on Polar equivalents. These findings expose a critical deficiency in current MLLMs: the lack of topology-invariant visual reasoning.

AI.tldr: 研究发现当前多模态大语言模型在视觉推理基准测试中的高分主要依赖于笛卡尔坐标系的文本捷径，而非真正的视觉理解能力。通过引入极坐标空间的Polaris-Bench测试集，暴露了模型缺乏拓扑不变视觉推理能力的根本缺陷。
AI.motivation: 当现有的多模态大语言模型在传统视觉推理基准上接近饱和时，研究者质疑这些高分是否真实反映了鲁棒的视觉理解能力，发现模型普遍利用笛卡尔坐标系的文本捷径进行推理而非真正的视觉处理。
AI.method: 创建Polaris-Bench测试集，将53个视觉推理任务重新构建为极坐标空间形式，同时保留笛卡尔坐标系作为对照，确保任务语义和逻辑约束的一致性，从根本上打破模型利用的正交网格先验。
AI.result: 14个最先进的MLLM在笛卡尔布局上达到70-83%准确率的模型，在极坐标等价版本上急剧下降至31-39%，即使在完全逻辑等价的情况下性能下降仍然存在，且在笛卡尔布局上观察到的推理收益在极坐标等价版本中大幅减弱。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果揭示了当前MLLM存在关键缺陷：缺乏拓扑不变视觉推理能力，表明模型的高分更多依赖于文本推理捷径而非真正的视觉理解能力。

title: Hyperbolic Distillation: Geometry-Guided Cross-Modal Transfer for Robust 3D Object Detection
comment: Current version has been subbmitted to IEEE Transactions on Multimedia. Now, this manuscript's status is Under Review
summary: Cross-modal knowledge distillation has emerged as an effective strategy for integrating point cloud and image features in 3D perception tasks. However, the modality heterogeneity, spatial misalignment, and the representation crisis of multiple modalities often limit the efficient of these cross-modal distillation methods. To address these limitations in existing approaches, we propose a hyperbolic constrained cross-modal distillation method for multimodal 3D object detection (HGC-Det). The proposed HGC-Det framework includes an image branch and a point cloud branch to extract semantic features from two different modalities. The point cloud branch comprises three core components: a 2D semantic-guided voxel optimization component (SGVO), a hyperbolic geometry constrained cross-modal feature transfer component (HFT), and a feature aggregation-based geometry optimization component (FAGO). Specifically, the SGVO component adaptively refines the spatial representation of the 3D branch by leveraging semantic cues from the image branch, thereby mitigating the issue of inadequate representation fusion. The HFT component exploits the intrinsic geometric properties of hyperbolic space to alleviate semantic loss during the fusion of high-dimensional image features and low-dimensional point cloud features. Finally, the FAGO compensates for potential spatial feature degradation introduced by the 2D semantic-guided voxel optimization component. Extensive experiments on indoor datasets (SUN RGB-D, ARKitScenes) and outdoor datasets (KITTI, nuScenes) demonstrate that our method achieves a better trade-off between detection accuracy and computational cost.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为HGC-Det的双曲几何约束跨模态蒸馏方法，用于解决多模态3D目标检测中的模态异质性、空间不对齐和表示危机问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的跨模态知识蒸馏方法在整合点云和图像特征时面临模态异质性、空间不对齐以及多模态表示危机等挑战，这些局限限制了方法的效率。
AI.method: HGC-Det框架包含图像和点云两个分支。点云分支包含三个核心组件：2D语义引导体素优化组件(SGVO)利用语义线索自适应优化3D分支的空间表示；双曲几何约束跨模态特征传输组件(HFT)利用双曲空间的几何性质缓解高维图像特征与低维点云特征融合时的语义损失；基于特征聚合的几何优化组件(FAGO)补偿空间特征退化。
AI.result: 在SUN RGB-D、ARKitScenes、KITTI和nuScenes等多个数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法在检测精度和计算成本之间实现了更好的平衡。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入双曲几何约束和创新的组件设计，HGC-Det有效解决了多模态3D目标检测中的关键技术挑战，为实现高精度、高效率的3D感知提供了新的解决方案。

title: Adversarial Attacks Against MLLMs via Progressive Resolution Processing and Adaptive Feature Alignment
summary: Adversarial perturbations can mislead Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) recognize a benign image as a specific target object, posing serious risks in safety-critical scenarios such as autonomous driving and medical diagnosis. This makes transfer-based targeted attacks crucial for understanding and improving black-box MLLM robustness. Existing transfer-based targeted attack methods typically rely on the final global features of the surrogate encoder and anchor optimization to original-resolution target crops, leading to their limited transferability and robustness. To address these challenges, we propose Progressive Resolution Processing and Adaptive Feature Alignment (PRAF-Attack), a targeted transfer-based attack framework that integrates multi-scale global semantic guidance with robust intermediate-layer local alignment. Unlike prior methods that align only the surrogate encoder's final layer, we design an adaptive feature alignment strategy that leverages intermediate representations to enhance transferability. Specifically, we introduce an adaptive intermediate layer selection mechanism to identify transferable hierarchical features across surrogate ensembles via gradient consistency, along with an adaptive patch-level optimization strategy that preserves highly correlated local regions through efficient patch filtering. To overcome the reliance on fixed original-resolution target crops, we propose a progressive resolution processing strategy that gradually refines optimization from coarse to fine, enabling the attack to better exploit target information at multiple scales and achieve stronger transferability. We evaluate PRAF-Attack on a diverse suite of black-box MLLMs, including six open-source models and six closed-source commercial APIs. Compared with seven state-of-the-art targeted attack baselines, the proposed PRAF-Attack consistently achieves superior transferability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PRAF-Attack的新型多模态大语言模型目标攻击框架，通过渐进式分辨率处理和自适应特征对齐来显著提升对抗攻击的可迁移性。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于迁移的目标攻击方法存在局限性，主要依赖于替代编码器的最终全局特征和固定分辨率的目标裁剪，导致可迁移性和鲁棒性不足，无法有效评估黑盒多模态大语言模型的安全性。
AI.method: PRAF-Attack集成了两个关键策略：1）自适应特征对齐策略，利用梯度一致性选择可迁移的中间层特征，并通过自适应块级优化保留高相关性局部区域；2）渐进式分辨率处理策略，从粗到细逐步优化，更好地利用多尺度目标信息。
AI.result: 在6个开源模型和6个闭源商业API的评估中，PRAF-Attack相比7个最先进的目标攻击基线方法，始终展现出更优越的可迁移性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效克服了现有技术的局限性，通过多层次特征对齐和多分辨率处理策略，显著提升了对抗攻击在黑盒多模态大语言模型上的迁移效果，为理解和改进模型鲁棒性提供了重要工具。

title: TOC-Bench: A Temporal Object Consistency Benchmark for Video Large Language Models
summary: Video large language models (Video-LLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in general video understanding, yet their ability to maintain temporal object consistency remains insufficiently explored. Existing benchmarks primarily focus on event recognition, action understanding, or coarse temporal reasoning, but rarely evaluate whether a model can consistently preserve the identity, state, and temporal continuity of the same object across occlusion, disappearance, reappearance, state transitions, and cross-object interactions. As a result, current evaluations may overestimate temporal reasoning ability while overlooking failures in object-centric temporal coherence. To address this issue, we introduce TOC-Bench, a diagnostic benchmark specifically designed to evaluate temporal object consistency in Video-LLMs. TOC-Bench is explicitly object-track grounded, where each queried subject is associated with a per frame object trajectory and structured temporal event timeline. To ensure that benchmark items depend on temporally ordered visual evidence rather than language priors, single-frame shortcuts, or unordered frame cues, we propose a three-layer temporal-necessity filtering protocol that removes 60.7% of candidate QA pairs and retains 17,900 temporally dependent items spanning 10 diagnostic dimensions. From this filtered pool, we further construct a human-verified benchmark containing 2,323 high-quality QA pairs over 1,951 videos. Experiments on representative Video-LLMs show that temporal object consistency remains a major unsolved challenge. Current models exhibit substantial weaknesses in event counting, event ordering, identity-sensitive reasoning, and hallucination-aware verification, despite strong performance on general video understanding benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 研究人员提出了TOC-Bench，一个专门评估视频大语言模型时序对象一致性的诊断基准，发现当前模型在跨帧保持对象一致性方面存在严重不足。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频理解基准主要关注事件识别和动作理解，忽略了评估模型在遮挡、消失重现、状态转换等复杂场景下是否能够一致地保持同一对象的身份、状态和时间连续性，导致评估结果可能高估了模型的时序推理能力。
AI.method: 构建了基于对象轨迹跟踪的TOC-Bench基准，每个查询主体都与逐帧对象轨迹和结构化时序事件时间线相关联。提出了三层时序必要性过滤协议，移除了60.7%的候选问答对，保留了17,900个时序相关的项目，并从中构建了包含2,323个高质量问答对、覆盖1,951个视频的人工验证基准。
AI.result: 实验表明，时序对象一致性仍是当前视频大语言模型面临的主要未解决挑战。尽管在通用视频理解基准上表现良好，现有模型在事件计数、事件排序、身份敏感推理和幻觉感知验证方面存在显著弱点。
AI.conclusion: TOC-Bench为评估视频大语言模型的时序对象一致性提供了新的诊断工具，揭示了当前模型在保持对象跨帧连续性方面的局限性，为未来模型改进指明了方向。

title: Frequency Adapter with SAM for Generalized Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Medical image segmentation is a critical task in computer-aided diagnosis and treatment planning. However, deep learning models often struggle to generalize across datasets due to domain shifts arising from variations in imaging protocols, scanner types, and patient populations. Traditional domain generalization (DG) methods utilize causal feature learning, adversarial consistency, and style augmentation to improve segmentation robustness. While effective, these approaches rely on explicit feature alignment, adversarial objectives, or handcrafted augmentations, which may not fully exploit the capabilities of foundation models. Recently, the Segment Anything Model (SAM) has demonstrated strong generalization capabilities in segmentation tasks. SAM-based DG methods attempt to improve medical image segmentation. However, these approaches primarily operate in the spatial domain and overlook frequency-based discrepancies that significantly affect model robustness. In this work, we propose Frequency-based Domain Generalization with SAM (FSAM), a novel framework that integrates Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) for efficient fine-tuning and a frequency adapter to incorporate frequency-domain representations for single-source domain generalization. FSAM enhances SAM's segmentation robustness by extracting domain-invariant high-frequency features, mitigating frequency-related domain shifts. Experimental results on fundus and prostate datasets demonstrate that FSAM outperforms existing traditional DG and SAM-based DG approaches in domain generalization. Codes and pre-trained models will be made available on GitHub.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FSAM框架，结合SAM模型、LoRA微调和频域适配器，通过提取领域不变的高频特征来提升医学图像分割的领域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割中深度模型面临领域泛化难题，现有传统DG方法和基于SAM的方法未能充分利用频域信息来处理领域偏移，影响模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出Frequency-based Domain Generalization with SAM (FSAM)框架，集成了LoRA高效微调和频域适配器，通过提取领域不变的高频特征来缓解频域相关的领域偏移，实现单源领域泛化。
AI.result: 在眼底图像和前列腺数据集上的实验表明，FSAM在领域泛化性能上超越了传统DG方法和基于SAM的DG方法。
AI.conclusion: FSAM成功将频域表示与SAM模型结合，为医学图像分割的领域泛化提供了新的解决方案，证明了频域信息在提升模型鲁棒性方面的重要价值。

title: Evidence-based Decision Modeling for Synthetic Face Detection with Uncertainty-driven Active Learning
summary: With the rapid development of deep generative models, forged facial images are massively exploited for illegal activities. Although existing synthetic face detection methods have achieved significant progress, they suffer from the inherent limitation of overconfidence due to their reliance on the Softmax activation function. Thus, these methods often lead to unreliable predictions when encountering unknown Out-of-Distribution (OOD) images, and cannot ascertain the model's uncertainty in its prediction. Meanwhile, most existing methods require massive high-quality annotated data, which greatly limits their practicability across diverse scenarios. To address these limitations, we propose EMSFD (Evidence-based decision Modeling for Synthetic Face Detection with uncertainty-driven active learning), an approach designed to enhance detection reliability and generalizability. Specifically, EMSFD models class evidence using the Dirichlet distribution and explicitly incorporates model uncertainty into the prediction process. Furthermore, during training, the estimated uncertainty is exploited to prioritize more informative samples from the unlabeled pool for annotation, thereby reducing labeling cost and improving model generalization. Extensive experimental evaluations demonstrate that our method enhances the interpretability of synthetic face detection. Meanwhile, our method yields a 15\% increase in accuracy compared to existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) baselines, which demonstrates the superior detection performance and generalizability of our approach. Our code is available at: https://github.com/hzx111621/EMSFD.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EMSFD方法，通过基于狄利克雷分布的证据建模和不确定性驱动的主动学习，解决了合成人脸检测中的过度自信问题，在减少标注成本的同时提高了15%的检测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有合成人脸检测方法存在过度自信的固有限制，对未知分布图像预测不可靠，且需要大量高质量标注数据，限制了实际应用场景的适用性。
AI.method: EMSFD采用狄利克雷分布建模类别证据，显式地将模型不确定性融入预测过程；在训练过程中利用估计的不确定性从未标记池中优先选择信息量更大的样本进行标注，实现不确定性驱动的主动学习。
AI.result: 实验表明EMSFD增强了合成人脸检测的可解释性，相比现有SOTA基线方法准确率提升15%，展现出卓越的检测性能和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: EMSFD通过证据建模和不确定性驱动的主动学习有效解决了传统方法的局限性，为合成人脸检测提供了更可靠、更实用的解决方案。

title: Urban-ImageNet: A Large-Scale Multi-Modal Dataset and Evaluation Framework for Urban Space Perception
summary: We present Urban-ImageNet, a large-scale multi-modal dataset and evaluation benchmark for urban space perception from user-generated social media imagery. The corpus contains over 2 Million public social media images and paired textual posts collected from Weibo across 61 urban sites in 24 Chinese cities across 2019-2025, with controlled benchmark subsets at 1K, 10K, and 100K scale and a full 2M corpus for large-scale training and evaluation. Urban-ImageNet is organized by HUSIC, a Hierarchical Urban Space Image Classification framework that defines a 10-class taxonomy grounded in urban theory. The taxonomy is designed to distinguish activated and non-activated public spaces, exterior and interior urban environments, accommodation spaces, consumption content, portraits, and non-spatial social-media content. Rather than treating urban imagery as generic scene data, Urban-ImageNet evaluates whether machine perception models can capture spatial, social, and functional distinctions that are central to urban studies. The benchmark supports three tasks within one standardized library: (T1) urban scene semantic classification, (T2) cross-modal image-text retrieval, and (T3) instance segmentation. Our experiments evaluate representative vision, vision-language, and segmentation models, revealing strong performance on supervised scene classification but more challenging behavior in cross-modal retrieval and instance-level urban object segmentation. A multi-scale study further examines how model performance changes as balanced training data increases from 1K, 10K to 100K images. Urban-ImageNet provides a unified, theory-grounded, multi-city benchmark for evaluating how AI systems perceive and interpret contemporary urban spaces across modalities, scales, and task formulations. Dataset and benchmark are available at: huggingface.co/datasets/Yiwei-Ou/Urban-ImageNet and github.com/yiasun/dataset-2.

AI.tldr: Urban-ImageNet是一个来自社交媒体的大规模城市空间感知数据集和评估基准，包含200万张图片配对文本，支持分类、检索和分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有城市图像数据集缺乏理论基础和城市学研究视角，需要构建能够捕获城市空间、社会和功能差异的多模态评估基准来推动AI城市感知发展。
AI.method: 基于HUSIC分级分类框架构建10类城市空间分类体系，收集2019-2025年中国24个城市61个地点的微博图片和文本，提供1K、10K、100K和2M规模的子集，设置标准化的分类、检索和分割三大任务评估。
AI.result: 监督场景分类表现良好，但跨模态检索和实例级别的城市物体分割更具挑战性；多尺度研究显示模型性能随训练数据量增加而提升。
AI.conclusion: Urban-ImageNet为评估AI系统如何感知和解读当代城市空间提供了统一的、有理论支撑的跨模态、跨尺度基准，促进了城市计算与计算机视觉的融合。

title: SDTalk: Structured Facial Priors and Dual-Branch Motion Fields for Generalizable Gaussian Talking Head Synthesis
summary: High-quality, real-time talking head synthesis remains a fundamental challenge in computer vision. Existing reconstruction- and rendering-based methods typically rely on identity-specific models, limiting cross-identity generalization. To address this issue, we propose SDTalk, a one-shot 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS)-based framework that generalizes to unseen identities without personalized training or fine-tuning. Our framework comprises two modules with a two-stage training strategy. In the first stage, we incorporate structured facial priors into the reconstruction module and separately predict 3DGS parameters for visible and occluded regions, enabling complete head reconstruction from a single image. In the second stage, we introduce a dual-branch motion field to model coarse and fine facial dynamics, improving detail fidelity and lip synchronization. Experiments demonstrate that SDTalk surpasses existing methods in both visual quality and inference efficiency.

AI.tldr: SDTalk是一个基于3D高斯散布的单图像说话头合成框架，能够泛化到未见过的身份，无需个性化训练。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于重建和渲染的说话头合成方法通常依赖特定身份的模型，限制了跨身份的泛化能力，而高质量、实时的说话头合成仍然是计算机视觉中的基本挑战。
AI.method: 提出包含两个模块的两阶段训练策略：第一阶段在重建模块中融入结构化面部先验，分别预测可见和遮挡区域的3DGS参数，实现从单张图像的完整头部重建；第二阶段引入双分支运动场建模粗粒度和细粒度的面部动态，提高细节保真度和唇同步精度。
AI.result: 实验表明SDTalk在视觉质量和推理效率方面都超越了现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SDTalk通过单次训练即可泛化到新身份的3D高斯散布框架，有效解决了现有方法的身份泛化限制，在保持高质量的同时实现了高效的实时说话头合成。

title: Learning to Perceive "Where": Spatial Pretext Tasks for Robust Self-Supervised Learning
summary: Existing self-supervised learning (SSL) methods primarily learn object-invariant representations but often neglect the spatial structure and relationships among object parts. To address this limitation, we introduce Spatial Prediction (SP), a spatially aware pretext regression task that predicts the relative position and scale between a pair of disentangled local views from the same image. By modeling part-to-part relationships in a continuous geometric space, SP encourages representations to capture fine-grained spatial dependencies beyond invariant categorical semantics, thereby learning the compositional structure of visual scenes. SP is implemented as a decoupled plug-in and can be seamlessly integrated into diverse SSL frameworks. Extensive experiments show consistent improvements across image recognition, fine-grained classification, semantic segmentation, and depth estimation, as well as substantial gains in out-of-distribution robustness for object recognition. To evaluate spatial reasoning, we introduce (1) a position and scale prediction task on image patch pairs and (2) a jigsaw understanding task requiring patch reordering and recognition after reconstruction. Strong performance on these tasks indicates improved spatial structure and geometric awareness. Overall, explicitly modeling spatial information provides an effective inductive bias for SSL, leading to more structured representations and better generalization. Code and models will be released.

AI.tldr: 这项研究提出了Spatial Prediction(SP)方法，通过预测图像局部视图间的相对位置和尺度关系，为自监督学习引入空间感知能力，显著提升了多个视觉任务的性能和空间推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法主要学习对象不变的表示，但忽视了物体部分之间的空间结构和关系，这限制了对视觉场景组合结构的学习能力。
AI.method: Spatial Prediction(SP)是一个空间感知的预训练回归任务，通过预测同一图像中解耦的局部视图对之间的相对位置和尺度，在连续几何空间中建模部分到部分的关系。SP作为解耦插件可无缝集成到多种SSL框架中。
AI.result: 在图像识别、细粒度分类、语义分割和深度估计等任务上展现出一致的改进，在对象识别的分布外鲁棒性方面获得显著提升。新引入的patch对位置尺度预测和拼图理解任务也验证了空间结构感知能力的增强。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模空间信息为SSL提供了有效的归纳偏置，能够学习到更有结构的表示并实现更好的泛化能力，证明了空间感知在自监督学习中的重要作用。

title: Towards Generalist Game Players: An Investigation of Foundation Models in the Game Multiverse
summary: The real world unfolds along a single set of physics laws, yet human intelligence demonstrates a remarkable capacity to generalize experiences from this singular physical existence into a multiverse of games, each governed by entirely different rules, aesthetics, physics, and objectives. This omni-reality adaptability is a hallmark of general intelligence. As Artificial Intelligence progresses towards Artificial General Intelligence, the multiverse of games has evolved from mere entertainment into the ultimate ground for training and evaluating AGI. The pursuit of this generality has unfolded across four eras: from environment-specific symbolic and reinforcement learning agents, to current large foundation models acting as generalist players, and toward a future creator stage where agent both creates new game worlds and continually evolves within them. We trace the full lifecycle of a generalist game player along four interdependent pillars: Dataset, Model, Harness, and Benchmark. Every advance across these pillars can be read as an attempt to break one of five fundamental trade-offs that currently bound the whole system. Building on this end-to-end view, we chart a five-level roadmap, progressing from single-game mastery to the ultimate creator stage in which the agent simultaneously creates and evolves within theoretical game multiverse. Taken together, our work offers a unified lens onto a rapidly shifting field,and a principled path toward the omnipotent generalist agent capable of seamlessly mastering any challenge within the multiverse of games, thereby paving the way for AGI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个通向通用人工智能的五级路线图，通过分析游戏智能体的数据、模型、接口和基准这四大支柱，旨在实现能够在多宇宙游戏中同时创造和进化的全能代理。
AI.motivation: 人类智能能够将单一物理世界的经验泛化到多宇宙游戏中的惊人能力，体现了通用智能的核心特征。随着AI向AGI发展，游戏多宇宙已成为训练和评估AGI的终极试验场。
AI.method: 通过追踪通用游戏玩家在数据集、模型、接口和基准四个相互依赖支柱上的完整生命周期，识别并突破限制系统的五个基本权衡问题，构建从单游戏精通到创造者阶段的五级路线图。
AI.result: 提出了统一的框架视角和分阶段的发展路径，为实现能够在游戏多宇宙中无缝掌握任何挑战、同时创造新游戏世界的全能通用代理提供了理论基础。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为快速发展的游戏AI领域提供了统一的视角，并为AGI的发展开辟了原则性路径，最终目标是培养全能的通用代理，掌握多宇宙游戏中的任何挑战。

title: OZ-TAL: Online Zero-Shot Temporal Action Localization
summary: Online Temporal Action Localization (On-TAL) aims to detect the occurrence time and category of actions in untrimmed streaming videos immediately upon their completion. Recent advancements in this field focus on developing more sophisticated frameworks, shifting from Online Action Detection (OAD)-based aggregation paradigm to instance-level understanding. However, existing approaches are typically trained on specific domains and often exhibit limited generalization capabilities when applied to arbitrary videos, particularly in the presence of previously unseen actions. In this paper, we introduce a new task called Online Zero-shot Temporal Action Localization (OZ-TAL), which aims to detect previously unseen actions in an online fashion. Furthermore, we propose a training-free framework that leverages off-the-shelf Vision-Language Models (VLMs) while introducing additional mechanisms to enhance visual representations and mitigate their inherent biases. We establish new benchmarks and representative baselines for OZ-TAL on THUMOS14 and ActivityNet-1.3, and extensive experiments demonstrate that our method substantially outperforms existing state-of-the-art approaches under both offline and online zero-shot settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了在线零样本时序动作定位(OZ-TAL)新任务，并开发了一个基于视觉语言模型的免训练框架，能够在流视频中检测未见过的动作，效果显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的在线时序动作定位方法存在领域特定性和泛化能力有限的问题，当遇到先前未见过的动作时表现不佳，这促使研究者探索零样本学习的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出一个无需训练的框架，利用现成的视觉语言模型(VLMs)，同时引入额外机制来增强视觉表示并减轻模型固有偏差，建立了新的基准测试。
AI.result: 在THUMOS14和ActivityNet-1.3数据集上建立了OZ-TAL的新基准，实验表明该方法在离线和在线零样本设置下都显著超越当前最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功地将零样本学习引入在线时序动作定位领域，为处理视频中未见动作检测提供了有效解决方案，具有重要的理论价值和实际应用前景。

title: INFANiTE: Implicit Neural representation for high-resolution Fetal brain spatio-temporal Atlas learNing from clinical Thick-slicE MRI
summary: Spatio-temporal fetal brain atlases are important for characterizing normative neurodevelopment and identifying congenital anomalies. However, existing atlas construction pipelines necessitate days for slice-to-volume reconstruction (SVR) to generate high-resolution 3D brain volumes and several additional days for iterative volume registration, thereby rendering atlas construction from large-scale cohorts prohibitively impractical. We address these limitations with INFANiTE, an Implicit Neural Representation (INR) framework for high-resolution Fetal brain spatio-temporal Atlas learNing from clinical Thick-slicE MRI scans, bypassing both the costly SVR and the iterative non-rigid registration steps entirely, thereby substantially accelerating atlas construction. Extensive experiments demonstrate that INFANiTE outperforms existing baselines in subject consistency, reference fidelity, intrinsic quality and biological plausibility, even under challenging sparse-data settings. Additionally, INFANiTE reduces the end-to-end processing time (i.e., from raw scans to the final atlas) from days to hours compared to the traditional 3D volume-based pipeline (e.g., SyGN), facilitating large-scale population-level fetal brain analysis. Our code is publicly available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/INFANiTE-5D74

AI.tldr: INFANiTE是一种基于隐式神经表示的胎儿大脑时空图谱构建框架，能够直接从临床厚切片MRI扫描快速构建高质量图谱，将处理时间从几天缩短到几小时。
AI.motivation: 现有的胎儿大脑图谱构建流程需要耗费数天时间进行切片到体积重建(SVR)和迭代体积配准，这使得大规模队列研究变得不切实际，亟需要一种更高效的方法。
AI.method: 提出INFANiTE框架，利用隐式神经表示(INR)技术，直接从临床厚切片MRI数据学习高分辨率胎儿大脑时空图谱，完全绕过了昂贵的SVR和迭代非刚性配准步骤。
AI.result: 实验表明INFANiTE在主体一致性、参考保真度、内在质量和生物学合理性方面都优于现有基线方法，即使在稀疏数据设置下也表现出色，处理时间从传统方法的数天缩短到数小时。
AI.conclusion: INFANiTE显著加速了胎儿大脑图谱构建过程，使得大规模人群水平的胎儿脑分析成为可能，为正常神经发育特征化和先天性异常识别提供了有力工具。

title: ERASE: Eliminating Redundant Visual Tokens via Adaptive Two-Stage Token Pruning
summary: Recent advancements in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) enable large language models (LLMs) to process high-resolution images, significantly improving real-world multimodal understanding. However, this capability introduces a large number of vision tokens, resulting in substantial computational overhead. To mitigate this issue, various vision token pruning methods have been proposed. Nevertheless, existing approaches predominantly rely on learned semantic features within the model to capture visual redundancy. Moreover, they lack adaptive mechanisms to adjust pruning strategies according to the complexity of the input image. In this paper, we propose ERASE, a two-stage vision token pruning framework that identifies and retains salient tokens through pruning strategies adaptive to image complexity. Experiment results demonstrate that ERASE significantly reduces vision tokens while preserving accuracy. For Qwen2.5-VL-7B, at a token pruning ratio of 85\%, ERASE retains 89.46% of the original model accuracy, whereas the best prior method retains only 78.1%. Our code is available at https://github.com/Tuna-Luna/ERASE.

AI.tldr: ERASE提出一种两阶段视觉token剪枝框架，能根据图像复杂度自适应调整剪枝策略，在大幅减少视觉token的同时保持模型精度。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型处理高分辨率图像时产生大量视觉token，计算开销巨大；现有剪枝方法主要依赖模型内部语义特征且缺乏对图像复杂度的自适应机制。
AI.method: ERASE采用两阶段框架，通过识别和保留显著tokens，并实现根据输入图像复杂度自适应调整的剪枝策略。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-VL-7B模型上，85% token剪枝率下ERASE保留89.46%原始精度，而此前最佳方法仅保留78.1%。
AI.conclusion: ERASE有效解决了视觉语言模型中token冗余问题，实现了高效的自适应剪枝，在大幅减少计算开销的同时保持了良好的模型性能。

title: Geometric 4D Stitching for Grounded 4D Generation
summary: Recent 4D generation methods complete scene-level missing information using generative models and reconstruct the scene into radiance-based representations. However, these pipelines often present geometric inconsistencies in the generated content, and the radiance-based reconstruction requires expensive optimization. Furthermore, radiance-based representations often absorb these geometric inconsistencies into their view-dependent nature, failing to enforce the grounded geometric consistency. To address these issues, we propose Geometric 4D Stitching, an efficient framework that explicitly identifies missing geometric regions and complements them with geometrically grounded 4D stitches. As a result, our method constructs 4D scene representations in under 10 minutes on a single NVIDIA RTX 5090 GPU per one-step scene expansion, while improving geometric consistency. Moreover, we demonstrate that our explicit 4D stitching supports interative expansion of 4D mesh as well as 4D scene editing.

AI.tldr: 几何4D拼接(Geometric 4D Stitching)是一种高效的4D场景生成框架，能快速识别并补充几何缺失区域，在10分钟内完成构建且提升几何一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有4D生成方法存在几何不一致性问题，基于辐射度的重建优化成本高昂，且无法有效 enforce 几何一致性约束。
AI.method: 提出显式识别几何缺失区域，通过几何基础的4D拼接技术进行补充，构建高效4D场景表示框架。
AI.result: 单张RTX 5090 GPU上每步场景扩展耗时不到10分钟，显著提升几何一致性，支持4D网格迭代扩展和场景编辑。
AI.conclusion: 该框架解决了传统方法的核心痛点，为快速、一致的4D场景生成和编辑提供了有效解决方案。

title: Omni-Persona: Systematic Benchmarking and Improving Omnimodal Personalization
summary: While multimodal large language models have advanced across text, image, and audio, personalization research has remained primarily vision-language, with unified omnimodal benchmarking that jointly covers text, image, and audio still limited, and lacking the methodological rigor to account for absent-persona scenarios or systematic grounding studies. We introduce Omni-Persona, the first comprehensive benchmark for omnimodal personalization. We formalize the task as cross-modal routing over the \emph{Persona Modality Graph}, encompassing 4 task groups and 18 fine-grained tasks across ${\sim}750$ items. To rigorously diagnose grounding behavior, we propose \emph{Calibrated Accuracy ($\mathrm{Cal}$)}, which jointly rewards correct grounding and appropriate abstention, incorporating absent-persona queries within a unified evaluation framework. On our dedicated experiments, three diagnostic findings emerge: (i) open-source models show a consistent audio-vs-visual grounding gap that RLVR partially narrows via dense rule-based supervision; (ii) answerable recall and parameter scale are incomplete diagnostics, since strong recall can coexist with absent-persona hallucination and larger models do not always achieve higher $\mathrm{Cal}$, exposing calibration as a separate evaluation axis; and (iii) SFT is bounded by the difficulty of constructing annotated ground-truth supervision at scale, while RLVR generalizes more consistently through outcome-level verifiable feedback yet drifts toward conservative behavior and lower generation quality under our reward design. Omni-Persona thus serves as a diagnostic framework that surfaces the pitfalls of omnimodal personalization, guiding future post-training and reward design.

AI.tldr: Omni-Persona是首个全模态个性化基准测试，包含文本、图像、音频三大模态，通过校准准确率等新方法揭示了现有模型的个性化缺陷。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型个性化研究主要集中在视觉-语言领域，缺乏统一的全模态基准测试，无法系统评估跨文本、图像、音频的个性化能力，且对缺失人物场景缺乏严谨的方法论支撑。
AI.method: 建立了Omni-Persona基准测试，将任务形式化为人物模态图的跨模态路由，包含4个任务组和18个细粒度任务，涵盖约750个项目。提出校准准确率(Cal)指标，同时奖励正确推理和适当弃权，将缺失人物查询纳入统一评估框架。
AI.result: 实验发现：(1)开源模型存在音频vs视觉推理差距，RLVR通过密集规则监督部分缩小差距；(2)可解答召回率和参数规模是不完整的诊断指标，强召回可能与缺失人物幻觉共存，大模型Cal不一定更高；(3)SFT受大规模标注困难限制，RLVR通过结果级可验证反馈泛化更一致但趋于保守。
AI.conclusion: Omni-Persona作为诊断框架揭示了全模态个性化的陷阱，为未来后训练和奖励设计提供了指导方向。

title: Med-StepBench: A Hierarchical Reasoning Framework for Evaluating Hallucinations in Medical Vision-Language Models
summary: Large vision-language models (VLMs) demonstrate strong performance in medical image understanding, but frequently generate clinically plausible yet incorrect statements, raising significant safety concerns. Existing medical hallucination benchmarks primarily focus on 2D imaging with one-shot diagnostic questions, offering limited insight into whether predictions are grounded in correct localization and abnormality identification, allowing critical reasoning errors to remain hidden behind seemingly correct diagnoses. We introduce Med-StepBench, the first large-scale benchmark for step-wise hallucination detection in 3D oncological PET/CT, comprising over 12,000 images and more than 1,000,000 image-statement pairs across volumetric and multi-view 2D data, which decomposes clinical reasoning into four expert-designed diagnostic stages. Using clinician-verified annotations, we perform the first step-level evaluation of general-purpose and medical VLMs, revealing systematic failure modes obscured by aggregate accuracy metrics. Furthermore, we show that current VLMs are highly susceptible to adversarial yet clinically plausible intermediate explanations, which significantly amplify hallucinations despite contradictory visual evidence. Together, our findings highlight fundamental limitations in grounding multi-step clinical reasoning and establish Med-StepBench as a rigorous benchmark for developing safer and more reliable medical VLMs.

AI.tldr: Med-StepBench是首个针对3D肿瘤PET/CT图像的分步式幻觉检测基准，包含12,000多张图像和100万个图文对，揭示了当前视觉语言模型在多步临床推理中的根本性局限。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型视觉语言模型在医学图像理解中表现强劲，但经常生成临床上看似合理却错误的陈述，引发严重的安全隐患。现有的医学幻觉基准主要关注2D成像和一次性诊断问题，无法检测模型在定位和异常识别方面的错误，让关键推理错误隐藏在看似正确的诊断背后。
AI.method: 构建Med-StepBench基准，将临床推理分解为四个专家设计的诊断阶段，使用临床医生验证的注释对通用和医学视觉语言模型进行首次分步级别评估，并测试模型对对抗性但临床合理的中间解释的敏感性。
AI.result: 发现了被聚合准确性指标掩盖的系统性失效模式，证明当前视觉语言模型极易受到对抗性中间解释的影响，即使在视觉证据矛盾的情况下仍会显著放大幻觉。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果突出了 grounding 多步临床推理的根本性限制，Med-StepBench可作为开发更安全、更可靠医学视觉语言模型的严格基准。

title: Hystar: Hypernetwork-driven Style-adaptive Retrieval via Dynamic SVD Modulation
summary: Query-based image retrieval (QBIR) requires retrieving relevant images given diverse and often stylistically heterogeneous queries, such as sketches, artworks, or low-resolution previews. While large-scale vision--language representation models (VLRMs) like CLIP offer strong zero-shot retrieval performance, they struggle with distribution shifts caused by unseen query styles. In this paper, we propose the Hypernetwork-driven Style-adaptive Retrieval (Hystar), a lightweight framework that dynamically adapts model weights to each query's style. Hystar employs a hypernetwork to generate singular-value perturbations ($ΔS$) for attention layers, enabling flexible per-input adaptation, while static singular-value offsets on MLP layers ensure cross-style stability. To better handle semantic confusions across styles, we design StyleNCE as part of Hystar, an optimal-transport-weighted contrastive loss that emphasizes hard cross-style negatives. Extensive experiments on multi-style retrieval and cross-style classification benchmarks demonstrate that Hystar consistently outperforms strong baselines, achieving state-of-the-art performance while being parameter-efficient and stable across styles.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Hystar框架，通过超网络动态适应查询图像风格，结合StyleNCE损失函数，实现了高效的多风格图像检索。
AI.motivation: 现有大规模视觉语言模型（如CLIP）在处理草图、艺术品等不同风格的查询时，因风格分布差异导致检索性能下降的问题。
AI.method: Hystar采用超网络生成注意力层的奇异值扰动进行动态适应，在MLP层使用静态奇异值偏移保证跨风格稳定性，并设计StyleNCE损失函数强调跨风格困难负样本。
AI.result: 在多风格检索和跨风格分类基准测试中，Hystar超越了强基线模型，实现了参数效率高、跨风格稳定的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: Hystar通过轻量级的风格自适应机制和优化的对比学习，有效解决了不同风格查询下的图像检索挑战，为实际应用提供了高效的解决方案。

title: MUSDA: Multi-source Multi-modality Unsupervised Domain Adaptive 3D Object Detection for Autonomous Driving
summary: With the advancement of autonomous driving, numerous annotated multi-modality datasets have become available. This presents an opportunity to develop domain-adaptive 3D object detectors for new environments without relying on labor-intensive manual annotations. However, traditional domain adaptation methods typically focus on a single source domain or a single modality, limiting their effectiveness in multi-source, multi-modality scenarios. In this paper, we propose a novel framework for multi-source, multi-modality unsupervised domain adaptation in 3D object detection for autonomous driving. Given multiple labeled source domains and one unlabeled target domain, our framework first introduces hierarchical spatially-conditioned (HSC) domain classifiers, which jointly align features from both camera and LiDAR modalities at two distinct levels for each source-target domain pair. To effectively leverage information from multiple source domains, we construct a prototype graph between each pair of domains. Based on this, we develop a prototype graph weighted (PGW) multi-source fusion strategy to aggregate predictions from multiple source detection heads. Experimental results on three widely used 3D object detection datasets - Waymo, nuScenes, and Lyft - demonstrate that our proposed framework effectively integrates information across both modalities and source domains, consistently outperforming state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于自动驾驶3D目标检测的多源多模态无监督域自适应框架，通过分层空间条件域分类器和原型图加权融合策略，有效利用多源域信息，在三个主流数据集上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 随着自动驾驶技术发展，大量标注的多模态数据集为无需人工标注的新环境自适应3D目标检测提供了机遇。然而传统域自适应方法局限于单源域或单模态，在多源多模态场景下效果受限。
AI.method: 1) 引入分层空间条件(HSC)域分类器，对每个源-目标域对，在两个不同层级联合对齐相机和LiDAR模态特征；2) 构建各域对间的原型图；3) 基于原型图开发加权(PGW)多源融合策略，聚合多个源检测头的预测结果。
AI.result: 在Waymo、nuScenes和Lyft三个广泛使用的3D目标检测数据集上的实验结果表明，所提框架能有效整合跨模态和跨源域信息，持续优于最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功解决了多源多模态无监督域自适应的挑战，为自动驾驶场景下的3D目标检测提供了一种更有效的域自适应解决方案。

title: Slum Detection and Density Mapping with AlphaEarth Foundations: A Representation Learning Evaluation Across 12 Global Cities
summary: Pixel-level slum mapping has long been constrained by limited cross-city generalisation, the absence of continuous density estimation, and weak global comparability. AlphaEarth Foundations (AEF), a globally consistent 64-dimensional annual surface embedding at 10 m, offers a new analysis-ready basis for lightweight slum monitoring, but its applicability to slum detection - an indirectly coupled task shaped by both built form and socio-economic processes - remains untested. We evaluate AEF on slum classification and sub-pixel density estimation across 12 cities and 69 city-year pairs (2017-2024), using GRAM pseudo-masks as supervisory labels. The evaluation spans four training strategies, two protocols (random split and 3x3 spatial block cross-validation), six auxiliary feature configurations, and five baseline models, complemented by representation-level analyses (PCA, SHAP) and full-AOI mapping. Five findings emerge. (1) Same-city cross-year training is optimal under both protocols (median spatial F1 = 0.616, R^2 = 0.466); temporal expansion outperforms cross-city transfer, indicating city-scale representational drift. (2) Regression R^2 is driven primarily by zero/non-zero boundary discrimination: positive-pixel R^2 is consistently negative across all cities, revealing limited capacity to model intra-pixel density gradients at 10 m. (3) PC36 is consistently top-ranked across tasks; classification saturates at k = 32 while regression remains unsaturated at k = 64. (4) POI features yield the largest density gain (Delta R^2 = +0.064). (5) For six cities meeting dual-task usability thresholds, full-AOI inference across 2017-2024 preserves slum cluster structure (mean SSIM = 0.926). The study delineates the capabilities and complementarity needs of foundation-model embeddings for slum monitoring.

AI.tldr: AlphaEarth Foundations在贫民窟监测任务中表现出中等性能，同城市跨年份训练效果最佳，但难以建模10米分辨率下的密度梯度，仍需补充特征以提升精度。
AI.motivation: 针对传统像素级贫民窟制图存在的跨城市泛化能力有限、缺乏连续密度估计和全球可比性弱的问题，需要在统一的嵌入表示基础上评估贫民窟检测和密度估计的可行性。
AI.method: 使用AlphaEarth Foundations的64维年度地表嵌入在12个城市进行贫民窟分类和亚像素密度估计，采用4种训练策略、2种验证协议和6种辅助特征配置，结合PCA和SHAP进行分析。
AI.result: 同城市跨年份训练效果最优（空间F1中位数0.616，R²=0.466），密度估计主要受零/非零边界识别驱动，POI特征能显著提升密度估计精度（ΔR²=+0.064），完整AOI制图能保持贫民窟聚类结构。
AI.conclusion: AlphaEarth Foundations为轻量级贫民窟监测提供了基础框架，但需要补充特征来提升建模精度，特别是在密度梯度估计方面仍有改进空间，为全球贫民窟监测提供了新的分析就绪基础。

title: Only Train Once: Uncertainty-Aware One-Class Learning for Face Authenticity Detection
summary:
The rapid evolution of generative paradigms has enabled the creation of highly realistic imagery, which escalating the risks of identity fraud and the dissemination of disinformation. Most existing approaches frame face forgery detection as a fully supervised binary classification problem. Consequently, these models typically exhibit significant performance decay when tasked with detecting forgeries from previously unseen generative paradigms. Furthermore, these methods focus exclusively on either DeepFakes or fully synthesized faces, thereby failing to provide a generalized framework for universal face forgery detection. In this paper, we address this challenge by introducing FADNet (Face Authenticity Detector Net),
  % a self-supervised framework that
  which reformulates face forgery detection as a one-class classification (OCC) task. By training exclusively on authentic facial data to capture their intrinsic representations, FADNet flags any image whose feature embedding deviates significantly from the learned distribution of real faces as a forgery. The framework incorporates Evidential Deep Learning (EDL) to quantify predictive uncertainty and utilizes a plug-and-play pseudo-forgery image generator (PFIG) to tighten decision boundaries around authentic data. Extensive experimental evaluations on the DF40 and ASFD benchmarks demonstrate that FADNet achieves superior performance and generalization capabilities. Specifically, FADNet substantially outperforms existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods, yielding a remarkable average accuracy of 96.63\% and an average precision of 98.83\%.

AI.tldr: FADNet是一种自监督的面部伪造检测网络，通过将检测问题重构为单类分类任务，仅使用真实人脸数据进行训练，在DF40和ASFD基准测试中达到96.63%的平均准确率和98.83%的平均精确率。
AI.motivation: 现有的人脸伪造检测方法大多采用全监督二元分类，对未见过的生成范式泛化能力差，且只能处理DeepFakes或全合成人脸中的一种，缺乏通用的检测框架。随着生成技术的发展，身份欺诈和虚假信息传播风险加剧，亟需更通用的解决方案。
AI.method: FADNet将人脸伪造检测重构为单类分类任务，仅用真实人脸数据训练学习内禀表示。集成证据深度学习量化预测不确定性，采用即插即用的伪伪造图像生成器收紧真实数据的决策边界。任何特征嵌入与真实人脸分布显著偏离的图像均被标记为伪造。
AI.result: 在DF40和ASFD基准测试中，FADNet达到96.63%的平均准确率和98.83%的平均精确率，显著优于现有最先进方法，展现出卓越的性能和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: FADNet通过单类分类的自监督框架有效解决了现有人脸伪造检测方法的泛化性局限，为通用人脸伪造检测提供了新的解决方案，在多个基准上达到了最先进性能。

title: ExtraVAR: Stage-Aware RoPE Remapping for Resolution Extrapolation in Visual Autoregressive Models
summary: Visual Autoregressive (VAR) models have emerged as a strong alternative to diffusion for image synthesis, yet their fixed training resolution prevents direct generation at higher resolutions. Naively transferring training-free extrapolation methods from LLMs or diffusion models to VAR yields three characteristic failure modes: global repetition, local repetition, and detail degradation. We trace them to a unified band-stage mismatch: VAR generates images in a coarse-to-fine, scale-wise process where each stage is driven by a distinct dominant RoPE frequency band, and each failure mode emerges when the dominant band of a particular stage is disrupted. Building on this insight, we propose Stage-Aware RoPE Remapping, a training-free strategy that assigns each frequency band a stage-specific remapping rule, jointly suppressing all three failure modes. We further observe that attention becomes systematically dispersed as the image resolution increases. Existing methods typically depend on predefined attention scaling factors, which are neither adaptive to the target resolution nor capable of faithfully capturing the actual extent of attention dispersion. We therefore propose Entropy-Driven Adaptive Attention Calibration, which quantifies dispersion via a resolution-invariant normalized entropy and yields a closed-form per-head scaling factor that realigns the extrapolated-resolution attention entropy with its training-resolution counterpart. Extensive experiments show that our method consistently outperforms prior resolution-extrapolation methods in both structural coherence and fine-detail fidelity. Our code is available at https://github.com/feihongyan1/ExtraVAR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ExtraVAR方法，通过阶段感知的RoPE重映射和基于熵的自适应注意力校准，解决了视觉自回归模型在高分辨率推理时的三个典型失效模式。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉自回归模型虽然在图像合成方面表现优异，但因其固定训练分辨率限制，无法直接生成更高分辨率的图像。将现有无训练外推方法移植到VAR模型时会出现全局重复、局部重复和细节退化三个典型问题。
AI.method: 基于对VAR模型从粗到细、按尺度生成过程的深入理解，识别出统一的频带-阶段不匹配问题，提出了阶段感知的RoPE重映射策略；同时针对分辨率增加导致注意力分散的问题，提出了基于熵的自适应注意力校准方法
AI.result: 在结构连贯性和细节保真度方面，所提方法一致性地优于先前的分辨率外推方法，成功抑制了三种失效模式
AI.conclusion: 本文解决了视觉自回归模型高分辨率推理的核心挑战，为训练自由分辨率外推提供了新的技术路径

title: PixelFlowCast: Latent-Free Precipitation Nowcasting via Pixel Mean Flows
summary: Precipitation nowcasting aims to forecast short-term radar echo sequences for extreme weather warning, where both prediction fidelity and inference efficiency are critical for real-world deployment. However, diffusion-based models, despite their strong generative capability, suffer from slow inference due to multi-step sampling trajectories, limiting their practical usability. Conditional Flow Matching (CFM) improves efficiency via straightened trajectories, but relies on latent space compression, which inevitably discards high-frequency physical details and degrades fine-grained prediction quality. To address these limitations, we propose PixelFlowCast, a two-stage probabilistic forecasting framework that achieves both high-efficiency and high-fidelity prediction without latent compression. Specifically, in the first stage, a deterministic model first produces coarse forecasts to capture global evolution trends. In the subsequent stage, the proposed KANCondNet extracts deep spatiotemporal evolution features to provide accurate conditional guidance. Based on this, a latent-free, few-step Pixel Mean Flows (PMF) predictor employs an $x$-prediction mechanism to generate high-quality predictions, effectively preserving fine-grained structures while maintaining fast inference. Experiments on the publicly available SEVIR dataset demonstrate that PixelFlowCast outperforms existing mainstream methods in both prediction accuracy and inference efficiency, particularly for long sequence forecasting, highlighting its strong potential for real-world operational deployment.

AI.tldr: PixelFlowCast是一个无需潜在空间压缩的两阶段降雨临近预报框架，通过确定性粗预测和KANCondNet条件引导，结合像素平均流动预测器，实现了高保真度和高效率的短时雷达回波序列预测。
AI.motivation: 降雨临近预报需要同时满足预测保真度和推理效率的要求。基于扩散的模型虽然生​​成能力强，但推理速度慢；条件流匹配(CFM)虽然提高了效率，但依赖潜在空间压缩会丢失高频物理细节，影响细粒度预测质量。
AI.method: 提出PixelFlowCast两阶段框架：第一阶段使用确定性模型生成粗预测捕获全局演化趋势；第二阶段KANCondNet提取深度时空演化特征提供准确条件引导；基于此采用潜在自由的少量步骤像素平均流动(PMF)预测器通过x预测机制生成高质量预测。
AI.result: 在SEVIR数据集上的实验表明，PixelFlowCast在预测准确性和推理效率方面都优于现有主流方法，特别在长序列预测中表现突出，展现了在实际业务部署中的强大潜力。
AI.conclusion: PixelFlowCast成功解决了扩散模型推理慢和CFM依赖潜在压缩的问题，通过两阶段设计和创新的条件引导机制，实现了无潜在空间压缩的高效高保真降雨临近预报，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

title: EchoPrune: Interpreting Redundancy as Temporal Echoes for Efficient VideoLLMs
summary: Long-form video understanding remains challenging for Video Large Language Models (VideoLLMs), as the dense frame sampling introduces massive visual tokens while sparse sampling risks missing critical temporal evidence and leading to LLM hallucination. Existing training-free token reduction methods either treat videos equally as static images or rely on segment-level merging heuristics, which weaken fine-grained spatiotemporal modeling and introduce additional overhead. In this paper, we propose EchoPrune, a lightweight and training-free token pruning method that improves temporal resolution under a fixed LLM-side visual token budget. Our core idea is to interpret redundant video tokens as temporal echoes: if a token is well reconstructed from the previous frame, it is merely a temporally redundant echo; otherwise, it may capture new events, motion, or query-relevant visual evidence. Based on this insight, EchoPrune scores visual tokens by (i) query-guided crossmodal relevance and (ii) temporal reconstruction error, measured by correspondence matching and echo matching across consecutive frames. The selected tokens preserve task-relevant cues and temporal novelty while suppressing predictable redundancy, allowing VideoLLMs to observe more frames without increasing the decoding budget. Extensive experiments on LLaVA-OV, Qwen2.5VL, and Qwen3VL across six video understanding benchmarks show that EchoPrune enables VideoLLMs to process up to 20x frames under the same token budget, yielding improved performance (+8.6%) and inference speedup (5.6x for prefilling) on Qwen2.5VL-7B.

AI.tldr: EchoPrune是一种无需训练的视频token剪枝方法，通过识别时间回声冗余，在固定token预算下提升视频大模型的时序分辨率，实现20倍帧数处理能力和8.6%的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有视频大模型在处理长视频时面临两难：密集采样导致视觉token数量爆炸，稀疏采样则可能丢失关键时间信息并引发LLM幻觉。现有的token削减方法要么将视频视为静态图像，要么依赖段级合并启发式规则，削弱了细粒度时空建模能力。
AI.method: EchoPrune的核心是将冗余视频token解释为时间回声。通过两个维度评分tokens：(i) 查询引导的跨模态相关性；(ii) 基于连续帧间对应匹配和回声匹配的时间重建误差。选择保留任务相关线索和时间新颖性，抑制可预测冗余的tokens。
AI.result: 在LLaVA-OV、Qwen2.5VL和Qwen3VL上，跨越六个视频理解基准测试，EchoPrune使VideoLLMs在相同token预算下能处理多达20倍帧数，性能提升8.6%，Qwen2.5VL-7B的推理速度提升5.6倍(预填充阶段)。
AI.conclusion: EchoPrune通过识别和修剪时间回声冗余，有效解决了视频大模型处理长视频时的token预算约束问题，实现了更高的时序分辨率和更好的理解性能，同时保持轻量级和无训练的优势。

title: Explanation-Aware Learning for Enhanced Interpretability in Biomedical Imaging
comment: Under review at IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics (JBHI)
summary: Deep neural networks for medical image diagnosis often achieve high predictive accuracy while relying on spurious or clinically irrelevant visual cues, limiting their trustworthiness in practice. Post-hoc explanation methods are widely used to visualize model decisions in the form of saliency maps; however, these explanations do not influence how models learn during training, allowing non-causal or confounding features to persist. This motivates the incorporation of explanation supervision directly into the training objective to guide model attention toward clinically meaningful regions and promote clinically grounded decision-making. This paper presents a systematic approach to integrate explanation loss into model training and analyzes how different explanation loss designs and supervision strengths influence both predictive performance and spatial faithfulness of explanations. To quantitatively assess interpretability, two complementary explanation performance metrics-annotation coverage and saliency precision-are introduced, enabling rigorous evaluation beyond qualitative visualization. Our experimental results reveal a clear trade-off between explanation quality and explanation loss coefficients. Furthermore, quantitative statistical analysis yields consistently improved explanation alignment while maintaining comparable accuracy. Experiments were conducted on annotated chest X-ray datasets; however, the proposed framework is applicable to a broad range of annotated biomedical imaging modalities. Overall, these findings demonstrate that explanation supervision is not a monolithic design choice and provide practical guidance for incorporating explanation loss into training objectives under noisy clinical annotations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将解释监督直接融入医学图像诊断模型的训练目标，通过设计可量化的解释性能指标来平衡模型准确性与解释质量，实现更可靠的临床决策。
