AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在医学图像诊断中虽然预测准确度高，但常依赖虚假或临床无关的视觉线索，限制了其在实际应用中的可信度。现有的解释方法无法影响模型训练过程，无法消除非因果特征。
AI.method: 将解释损失项集成到模型训练目标中，引导模型关注临床有意义的区域；引入标注覆盖率和显著性精度两个互补的解释性能指标进行定量评估；在不同解释损失设计和监督强度下进行系统分析。
AI.result: 在胸部X光数据集上的实验揭示了解释质量与解释损失系数之间的权衡，定量统计分析显示在保持相当准确性的同时，解释对齐度得到持续改善。
AI.conclusion: 解释监督并非单一的设计选择，需要在噪声临床标注下平衡准确性和解释质量，该框架为多种生物医学成像模态提供了实用的训练指导。

title: MFVLR: Multi-domain Fine-grained Vision-Language Reconstruction for Generalizable Diffusion Face Forgery Detection and Localization
summary: The swift advancement in photo-realistic face generation technology has sparked considerable concerns across society and academia, emphasizing the requirement of generalizable face forgery detection and localization methods. Prior works tend to capture face forgery patterns across multiple domains using image modality, other modalities like fine-grained texts are not comprehensively investigated, which restricts the generalization capability of models. Besides, they usually analyze facial images created by GAN, but struggle to identify and localize those synthesized by diffusion. To solve the problems, in this paper, we devise a novel multi-domain fine-grained vision-language reconstruction (MFVLR) model, which explores comprehensive and diverse visual forgery traces via language-guided face forgery representation learning, to achieve generalizable diffusion-synthesized face forgery detection and localization (DFFDL). Specifically, we devise a fine-grained language transformer that studies general fine-grained language embeddings using language reconstruction. We propose a multi-domain vision encoder to capture general and complementary visual forgery patterns across the image and residual domains. A vision decoder is designed to reconstruct image appearance and achieve forgery localization. Besides, we propose an innovative plug-and-play vision injection module to enhance the interaction between the vision and language embeddings. Extensive experiments and visualizations demonstrate that our network outperforms the state of the art on different settings like cross-generator, cross-forgery, and cross-dataset evaluations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的多域细粒度视觉-语言重建模型(MFVLR)，通过语言引导的表征学习实现通用的扩散合成人脸伪造检测与定位。
AI.motivation: 随着逼真人脸生成技术的快速发展，传统基于图像模态的方法在跨领域泛化能力上存在局限，且对扩散模型合成的伪造人脸检测效果不佳，亟需更通用的检测方法。
AI.method: 构建包含细粒度语言Transformer、多域视觉编码器、视觉解码器和视觉注入模块的框架，通过语言重建学习通用细粒度语言表征，在图像和残差域捕获互补视觉伪造模式，并增强视觉-语言交互。
AI.result: 在跨生成器、跨伪造类型和跨数据集等多种评估设置下，所提网络性能均优于现有最先进方法，验证了模型的有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合视觉和语言信息的互补优势，MFVLR模型有效提升了人脸伪造检测的泛化能力，为检测扩散模型生成的伪造人脸提供了新的解决思路。

title: SocialDirector: Training-Free Social Interaction Control for Multi-Person Video Generation
summary: Video generation has advanced rapidly, producing photorealistic videos from text or image prompts. Meanwhile, film production and social robotics increasingly demand multi-person videos with rich social interactions, including conversations, gestures, and coordinated actions. However, existing models offer no explicit control over interactions, such as who performs which action, when it occurs, and toward whom it is directed. This often results in wrong person performing unintended actions (actor-action mismatch), disordered social dynamics, and wrong action targets. To address these challenges, we present SocialDirector, a training-free interaction controller that enhances the generation model by modulating cross-attention maps. SocialDirector contains two modules: Social Actor Masking and Directional Reweighting. Social Actor Masking constrains each person's visual tokens to attend only to their own textual descriptions via a spatiotemporal mask, avoiding actor-action mismatch and disordered social dynamics. Directional Reweighting amplifies attention to directional words (e.g., "leftward", "right"), leading each action towards its intended target. To evaluate generated social interactions, we annotate existing datasets with interaction descriptions and build a fully automated evaluation pipeline powered by open-source VLMs. Experiments on different video generation models show that SocialDirector significantly improves interaction fidelity and approaches the upper bound set by real videos.

AI.tldr: SocialDirector是一个无训练的交互控制器，通过调节交叉注意力图来改进视频生成模型，实现对多人视频中社交互动的精确控制。
AI.motivation: 当前视频生成技术快速发展，但现有模型无法对多人视频中的社交互动进行显式控制，导致演员动作错配、社交动态混乱和动作目标错误等问题，这在影视制作和社交机器人应用中是一个重要挑战。
AI.method: SocialDirector包含两个模块：社交演员遮罩（Social Actor Masking）通过时空遮罩限制每个人的视觉标记只关注自己的文本描述；方向重加权（Directional Reweighting）放大对方向词的注意力，使动作朝向预期目标。该方法无需训练，可直接调制现有模型的交叉注意力图。
AI.result: 实验表明SocialDirector显著提升了交互保真度，在不同视频生成模型上都表现优异，接近真实视频的上限。研究者还构建了基于开源VLM的全自动评估流程。
AI.conclusion: SocialDirector为多人视频生成中的社交互动控制提供了有效的解决方案，通过创新的注意力调制机制解决了演员动作错配和目标错误等关键问题，为影视制作和社交机器人应用提供了技术支撑。

title: Initiation of Interaction Detection Framework using a Nonverbal Cue for Human-Robot Interaction
summary: This paper describes an initiation of interaction(IoI) detection framework without keywords for human-robot interaction(HRI) based on audio and vision sensor fusion in a domestic environment. In the proposed framework, the robot has its own audio and vision sensors, and can employ external vision sensor for stable human detection and tracking. When the user starts to speak while looking at the robot, the robot can localize his or her position by its sound source localization together with human tracking information. Then the robot can detect the IoI if it perceives the face of the speaker faces the robot. In case that the user does not speak directly, the robot can also detect the IoI if he or she looks at the robot for more than predefined periods of time. A state transition model for the proposed IoI detection framework is designed and verified by experiments with a mobile robot. In order to implement and associate our model in a robot architecture, all the components are implemented and integrated in the Robot Operating System(ROS) environment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于音视觉融合的无关键词人机交互意向检测框架，通过声源定位、人脸跟踪和注视时间判断来检测用户的交互意图。
AI.motivation: 在家庭环境中，机器人需要能够自然地检测用户的交互意向，而不依赖于特定的关键词触发，以实现更自然的人机交互体验。
AI.method: 融合机器人的音频和视觉传感器，使用声源定位结合人体跟踪信息定位说话者位置，通过检测说话者面部朝向和注视时间来判断交互意向，并在ROS环境中实现状态转换模型。
AI.result: 通过移动机器人实验验证了所提出的IoI检测框架的有效性，成功实现了基于音视觉融合的交互意向检测。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够在家庭环境中有效检测用户的交互意图，不依赖关键词触发，为自然的人机交互提供了技术支持，所有组件已成功集成到ROS架构中。

title: HYPERPOSE: Hyperbolic Kinematic Phase-Space Attention for 3D Human Pose Estimation
summary: We introduce HYPERPOSE, a novel 3D human pose estimation framework that performs spatio-temporal reasoning entirely within the Lorentz model of hyperbolic space $\mathbb{H}^d$ to natively preserve the hierarchical tree topology of the human skeleton. Current state-of-the-art pose estimators aim to capture complex joint dynamics by relying on transformers and graph convolutional networks. Since these architectures operate exclusively in Euclidean space which fundamentally mismatches the inherent tree structure of the human body, these methods inevitably suffer from exponential volume distortion and struggle to maintain structural coherence. To this end, we depart from flat spaces and aim to improve geometric fidelity with Hyperbolic Kinematic Phase-Space Attention (HKPSA), natively embedding complex joint relationships without distortion, alongside a multi-scale windowed hyperbolic attention mechanism that efficiently models temporal dynamics in $O(TW)$ complexity. Furthermore, to overcome the well-known instability of training non-Euclidean manifolds, HYPERPOSE introduces a novel Riemannian loss suite and an uncertainty-weighted curriculum, enforcing physical geodesic constraints like bone length and velocity consistency. Extensive evaluations on the Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP datasets demonstrate that HYPERPOSE achieves state-of-the-art structural and temporal coherence, significantly reducing both volume distortion and velocity error, while establishing new state-of-the-art benchmarks in overall positional accuracy.

AI.tldr: HYPERPOSE是一个创新的3D人体姿态估计框架，首次在双曲空间中完整处理时空推理，自然保持人体骨骼的树状拓扑结构，显著提升了结构保真度和时间一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有最优的姿态估计方法在欧几里得空间中使用transformer和图卷积网络，与人体固有的树状结构存在根本性几何不匹配，导致指数级体积失真和结构连贯性问题，难以有效建模复杂的关节动力学。
AI.method: 提出双曲运动相位空间注意力(HKPSA)机制，在双曲空间中原生嵌入复杂关节关系，配合多尺度窗口双曲注意力高效建模时间动态。引入黎曼损失组合和不确定性加权课程学习，强制骨骼长度和速度一致性等物理测地线约束。
AI.result: 在Human3.6M和MPI-INF-3DHP数据集上，HYPERPOSE实现了SOTA的结构和时间连贯性，显著降低了体积失真和速度误差，同时在整体位置精度上建立了新的基准。
AI.conclusion: 通过将3D人体姿态估计从平坦的欧几里得空间转换到双曲空间，HYPERPOSE有效解决了几何不匹配问题，为处理具有层次树状结构的人体运动数据提供了新的几何建模范式。

title: ViSRA: A Video-based Spatial Reasoning Agent for Multi-modal Large Language Models
summary: Recent advances in Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) target 3D spatial intelligence, yet the progress has been largely driven by post-training on curated benchmarks, leaving the inference-time approach relatively underexplored. In this paper, we take a training-free perspective and introduce ViSRA, a human-aligned Video-based Spatial Reasoning Agent, as a framework to probe the spatial reasoning mechanism of MLLMs. ViSRA elicits spatial reasoning in a modular and extensible manner by leveraging explicit spatial information from expert models, enabling a plug-and-play flexible paradigm. ViSRA offers two key advantages: (1) human-aligned and transferable 3D understanding rather than task-specific overfitting; and (2) no post-training computational cost along with heavy manual curation of spatial reasoning datasets. Experimental results demonstrate consistent improvement across a set of MLLMs on both existing benchmarks and unseen 3D spatial reasoning tasks, with ViSRA outperforming baselines by up to a 15.6% and 28.9% absolute margin respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ViSRA，一个基于视频的空间推理代理框架，通过无需训练的方法利用专家模型的显式空间信息来增强多模态大语言模型的3D空间推理能力，在多个基准测试中显著提升了性能。
AI.motivation: 目前多模态大语言模型在3D空间智能方面的进展主要依赖于在精心策划的基准测试上进行后训练，而推理时的方法相对未得到充分探索，存在训练成本高昂和任务特定的过拟合问题。
AI.method: ViSRA采用无训练的方法，通过模块化和可扩展的方式，从专家模型中提取显式空间信息来激发空间推理，实现即插即用的灵活范式，避免了后训练的计算成本和大量的空间推理数据集人工策划。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，ViSRA在现有基准测试和未见过的3D空间推理任务中均能持续提升多个MLLM的性能，相比基线方法分别提高了15.6%和28.9%的绝对准确率。
AI.conclusion: ViSRA为增强MLLM的空间推理能力提供了一个有效且实用的解决方案，其人类对齐的3D理解和免训练特性使其具有很好的可迁移性和适用性，为空间推理机制的研究提供了新思路。

title: Think as Needed: Geometry-Driven Adaptive Perception for Autonomous Driving
summary: Autonomous driving scenes range from empty highways to dense intersections with dozens of interacting road users, yet current 3D detection models apply a fixed computation budget to every frame, wasting resources on simple scenes while lacking capacity for complex ones. Existing approaches compound this problem: Transformer-based interaction models scale quadratically with the number of detected objects, and frame-by-frame processing causes the system to immediately forget objects the moment they become occluded. We propose Enhanced HOPE, an adaptive perception architecture that measures the geometric complexity of each incoming LiDAR frame using an unsupervised statistical estimator and routes it through a shallow or deep processing path accordingly, requiring no manual scene labels. To keep interaction modeling efficient, we replace quadratic pairwise attention with a linear-time subspace-based network that groups nearby objects into clusters and processes them jointly. The computational savings from these two mechanisms free up resources for a persistent temporal memory module that retains previously detected objects and traffic rules across frames, enabling the system to recall occluded objects seconds after they disappear from view. On the nuScenes and CARLA benchmarks, Enhanced HOPE reduces latency by 38% on simple scenes with no accuracy loss, improves mean Average Precision by 2.7 points on rare long-tail scenarios, and tracks objects through occlusions lasting over 5 seconds, where all tested baselines fail.

AI.tldr: 提出一个自适应感知架构Enhanced HOPE，通过几何复杂度估计分配计算资源，使用线性子空间网络替代二次注意力，并结合时序记忆模块，实现38%延迟降低和2.7点mAP提升。
AI.motivation: 现有3D检测模型对每个场景使用固定计算预算，在简单场景浪费资源，复杂场景能力不足；基于Transformer的交互模型计算复杂度呈二次增长；逐帧处理导致遮挡目标立即被遗忘。
AI.method: 1) 使用无监督统计估计器测量LiDAR帧几何复杂度，自适应分配浅层或深层处理路径；2) 用线性的子空间网络替代二次注意力，将邻近对象聚类并联合处理；3) 引入持久时序记忆模块保留历史检测对象和交通规则。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和CARLA基准测试上：简单场景延迟降低38%且精度无损失；罕见长尾场景mAP提升2.7点；成功跟踪持续5秒以上的遮挡目标，所有基线方法均失败。
AI.conclusion: 通过自适应计算分配、高效交互建模和时序记忆，Enhanced HOPE在保证精度的同时显著提升计算效率，并解决了遮挡目标跟踪难题，为自动驾驶感知系统提供了有效的解决方案。

title: MicroWorld: Empowering Multimodal Large Language Models to Bridge the Microscopic Domain Gap with Multimodal Attribute Graph
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) show remarkable potential for scientific reasoning, yet their performance in specialized domains such as microscopy remains limited by the scarcity of domain-specific training data and the difficulty of encoding fine-grained expert knowledge into model parameters. To bridge the gap, we introduce MicroWorld, a framework that constructs a multimodal attributed property graph (MAPG) from large-scale scientific image--caption corpora and leverages it to augment MLLM reasoning at inference time without any domain-specific fine-tuning. MicroWorld extracts biomedical entities and relations via scispaCy or LLM-based triplet mining, aligns images and entities in a shared embedding space using Qwen3-VL-Embedding, and assembles a knowledge graph comprising approximately 111K nodes and 346K typed edges spanning eight relation categories. At inference time, a graph-augmented retrieval pipeline matches query entities to the MAPG and injects structured knowledge context into the MLLM prompt. On the MicroVQA benchmark, MicroWorld improves the reasoning performance of Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct by 37.5%, outperforming GPT-5 by 13.0% to achieve a new state-of-the-art. Furthermore, it yields a 6.0% performance gain on the MicroBench benchmark. Extensive experiments demonstrate the enhanced generalization capability introduced by MicroWorld. A qualitative case study further reveals both the mechanisms through which structured knowledge improves reasoning and the failure modes that point to promising future directions. Code and data are available at https://github.com/ieellee/MicroWorld.

AI.tldr: MicroWorld框架通过构建多模态属性知识图谱(MAPG)，在无需领域特定微调的情况下，显著提升了大语言模型在显微镜领域的推理性能。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在显微镜等专业领域的应用受到训练数据稀缺和专家知识编码困难的限制，需要找到一种无需微调即可增强模型领域知识的方法。
AI.method: MicroWorld从科学图像-标题语料库构建包含111K节点和346K边的多模态属性知识图谱，通过scispaCy或LLM三元组挖掘提取实体关系，使用Qwen3-VL-Embedding对齐图像和实体，在推理时通过图增强检索管道将结构化知识注入MLLM提示中。
AI.result: 在MicroVQA基准上，MicroWorld将Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct的推理性能提升37.5%，超过GPT-5达13.0%达到新的最先进水平，在MicroBench基准上获得6.0%的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: MicroWorld证明了结构化知识图谱增强大语言模型推理的有效性，为专业领域的AI应用提供了无需微调的知识增强新范式，同时也揭示了未来改进的方向。

title: Fashion130K: An E-commerce Fashion Dataset for Outfit Generation with Unified Multi-modal Condition
summary: Recent research work on fashion outfit generation focuses on promoting visual consistency of garments by leveraging key information from reference image and text prompt. However, the potential of outfit generation remains underexplored, requiring comprehensive e-commercial dataset and elaborative utilization of multi-modal condition. In this paper, we propose a brand-new e-commerce dataset, named Fashion130k, with various occasions, models, and garment types. For the consistent generation of garment, we design a framework with Unified Multi-modal Condition (UMC) to align and integrate the text and visual prompts into generation model. Specifically, we explore an embedding refiner to extract the unified embeddings of multi-modal prompts, within which a Fusion Transformer is proposed to align the multi-modal embeddings by adjusting the modality gap between text and image. Based on unified embeddings, the attention in generation model is redesigned to emphasis the correlations between prompts and noise image, inducing that the noise image can select the pivotal tokens of prompts for consistent outfit generation. Our dataset and proposed framework offer a general and nuanced exploration of multi-modal prompts for generation models. Extensive experiments on real-world applications and benchmark demonstrate the effectiveness of UMC in visual consistency, achieving promising result than that of SoTA methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Fashion130k电商数据集和统一多模态条件(UMC)框架，通过融合Transformer对齐文本和图像嵌入，显著提升了服装搭配生成的视觉一致性。
AI.motivation: 当前时尚服装生成研究仅关注参考图像和文本提示的视觉一致性，但未充分挖掘服装生成潜力，缺乏全面的电商数据集和对多模态条件的精细利用。
AI.method: 1) 构建包含各种场合、模特和服装类型的Fashion130k数据集；2) 设计UMC框架统一多模态条件，其中嵌入细化器提取统一嵌入；3) 提出Fusion Transformer调整文本与图像的模态间隙；4) 重设计生成模型的注意力机制，强调提示与噪声图像的相关性。
AI.result: 在真实应用和基准测试上，UMC框架在视觉一致性方面优于现有最先进方法，取得了显著成果。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的数据集和框架为生成模型的多模态提示提供了通用而精细的探索方案，有效解决了服装搭配生成的视觉一致性问题。

title: Thermal-Det: Language-Guided Cross-Modal Distillation for Open-Vocabulary Thermal Object Detection
summary: Existing open-vocabulary detectors focus on RGB images and fail to generalize to thermal imagery, where low texture and emissivity variations challenge RGB-based semantics. We present Thermal-Det, the first large language model (LLM) supervised open-vocabulary detector tailored for thermal images. To enable large-scale training, we develop a synthetic dataset by converting GroundingCap-1M into the thermal domain and filtering captions to remove RGB-specific terms, yielding over one million thermally aligned samples with bounding boxes, grounding texts, and detailed captions. Thermal-Det jointly optimizes detection, captioning, and cross-modal distillation objectives. A frozen RGB teacher provides geometric and semantic pseudo-supervision for paired but unlabeled RGB-thermal data, transferring open-vocabulary knowledge without manual annotation. The model further employs a Thermal-Text Alignment Head for text calibration and a Modality-Fused Cross-Attention module for dual-modality reasoning. Unlike prior domain-adaptation methods, the detector is fully fine-tuned to internalize thermal contrast patterns while preserving language alignment. Experiments on public benchmarks show consistent 2-4% AP gains over existing open-vocabulary detectors, establishing a strong foundation for scalable, language-driven thermal perception.

AI.tldr: Thermal-Det是首个针对热成像的大语言模型监督开放词汇检测器，通过合成数据集和跨模态蒸馏技术，在热成像检测任务上实现了2-4%的AP提升。
AI.motivation: 现有开放词汇检测器专注于RGB图像，无法泛化到热成像领域。热成像的低纹理和发射率变化对基于RGB的语义构成了挑战。
AI.method: 1) 将GroundingCap-1M数据集转换为热成像领域并过滤RGB特定词汇，构建包含100万+样本的合成数据集；2) 联合优化检测、字幕生成和跨模态蒸馏目标；3) 利用力冻RGB教师为无标注RGB-热成像数据提供伪监督；4) 设计热力-文本对齐头和模态融合交叉注意力模块。
AI.result: 在公共基准测试上，相比现有开放词汇检测器获得了2-4%的AP提升，为可扩展的语言驱动热成像感知奠定了坚实基础。
AI.conclusion: Thermal-Det通过全微调内化热成像对比模式同时保持语言对齐，实现了热成像领域的开放词汇检测，为语言驱动的热成像感知提供了强有力的基础。

title: Scaling Vision Models Does Not Consistently Improve Localisation-Based Explanation Quality
summary: Artificial intelligence models are increasingly scaled to improve predictive accuracy, yet it remains unclear whether scale improves the quality of post-hoc explanations. We investigate this relationship by evaluating 11 computer vision models representing increasing levels of depth and complexity within the ResNet, DenseNet, and Vision Transformer families, trained from scratch or pretrained, across three image datasets with ground-truth segmentation masks. For each model, we generate explanations using five post-hoc explainable AI methods and quantify mask alignment using two localisation metrics: Relevance Rank Accuracy (Arras et al., 2022) and the proposed Dual-Polarity Precision, which measures positive attributions inside the class mask and negative attributions outside it. Across datasets and methods, increasing architectural depth and parameter count does not improve explanation quality in most statistical comparisons, and smaller models often match or exceed deeper variants. While pretraining typically improves predictive performance and increases the dependence of explanations on learned weights, it does not consistently increase localisation scores. We also observe scenarios in which models achieve strong predictive performance while localisation precision is near zero, suggesting that performance metrics alone may not indicate whether predictions are based on the annotated regions. These results indicate that larger models do not reliably provide higher-quality explanations, and that explainability should therefore be assessed explicitly during model selection for safety-sensitive deployments.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，更大规模的AI模型并不能提供更好质量的解释，解释质量需要独立评估而非依赖模型性能指标
AI.motivation: 随着AI模型规模不断扩大以提升预测准确性，但尚不清楚这种规模化是否能提升事后解释的质量，这对安全关键部署至关重要
AI.method: 评估了11个不同深度的计算机视觉模型（ResNet、DenseNet、Vision Transformer），使用5种解释AI方法，通过相关性排名准确性和提出的双极性精度两个指标量化解释质量
AI.result: 增加架构深度和参数数量在大多数统计比较中并不能提升解释质量，较小模型经常匹配或超过更深变体；预训练虽提升预测性能但不能一致提高定位分数；存在高预测性能但定位精度接近零的情况
AI.conclusion: 更大模型不能可靠提供更高质量解释，在安全敏感部署中应在模型选择时明确评估可解释性

title: MicroViTv2: Beyond the FLOPS for Edge Energy-Friendly Vision Transformers
summary: The Vision Transformer (ViT) achieves remarkable accuracy across visual tasks but remains computationally expensive for edge deployment. This paper presents MicroViTv2, a lightweight Vision Transformer optimized for real-device efficiency. Built upon the original MicroViT, the proposed model is designed based on reparameterized design, specifically Reparameterized Patch Embedding (RepEmbed) and Reparameterized Depth-Wise convolution mixer (RepDW) for faster inference, and introduces the Single Depth-Wise Transposed Attention (SDTA) to capture long-range dependencies with minimal redundancy. Despite slightly higher FLOPs, MicroViTv2 improves accuracy up to 0.5% compared to its predecessor and surpassing MobileViTv2, EdgeNeXt, and EfficientViT while maintaining fast inference and high energy efficiency on Jetson AGX Orin. Experiments on ImageNet-1K and COCO demonstrate that hardware-aware design and structural re-parameterization are key to achieving high accuracy and low energy consumption, validating the need to evaluate efficiency beyond FLOPs. Code is available at https://github.com/novendrastywn/MicroViT.

AI.tldr: MicroViTv2是一种轻量级视觉Transformer，通过重参数化设计和单深度转置注意力机制，在保持高效推理的同时提升了精度，适用于边缘设备部署。
AI.motivation: 视觉Transformer(ViT)在各种视觉任务中表现优异，但计算开销大，难以在边缘设备上高效部署。现有的轻量级模型在精度和效率之间存在权衡，需要更好的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出基于重参数化设计的MicroViTv2，包括Reparameterized Patch Embedding(RepEmbed)和Reparameterized Depth-Wise卷积混合器(RepDW)来加速推理，引入Single Depth-Wise Transposed Attention(SDTA)以最小冗余捕获长距离依赖关系。
AI.result: 虽然FLOPs略高，但MicroViTv2相比前代精度提升0.5%，超越了MobileViTv2、EdgeNeXt和EfficientViT，在Jetson AGX Orin上保持快速推理和高能效。ImageNet-1K和COCO实验验证了效果。
AI.conclusion: 硬件感知设计和结构重参数化是实现高精度和低能耗的关键，需要超越FLOPs来评估效率，为边缘设备的Vision Transformer部署提供了有效方案。

title: Improving Temporal Action Segmentation via Constraint-Aware Decoding
summary: Temporal action segmentation (TAS) divides untrimmed videos into labeled action segments. While fully supervised methods have advanced the field, challenges such as action variability, ambiguous boundaries, and high annotation costs remain, especially in new or low-resource domains. Grammar-based approaches improve segmentation with structural priors but rely on complex parsing limiting scalability. In this work, we propose a lightweight, constraint-based refinement framework that enhances TAS predictions by integrating statistical structural priors such as transition confidence, action boundary sets, and per-class duration, that can be directly extracted from annotated data. These constraints are integrated into a modified Viterbi decoding algorithm, allowing inference-time refinement without retraining or added model complexity. Our approach improves both fully and semi-supervised TAS models by correcting structural prediction errors while maintaining high efficiency. Code is available at https://github.com/LUNAProject22/CAD

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于约束的时间动作分割优化框架，通过统计结构先验改进预测，无需重新训练即可提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 时间动作分割面临动作可变性、边界模糊和标注成本高的问题，现有的基于语法的方法依赖复杂解析限制了可扩展性。
AI.method: 设计了一个轻量级的约束优化框架，集成了转移置信度、动作边界集合和每类动作持续时间等统计结构先验，并将其融入改进的维特比解码算法中进行推理时优化。
AI.result: 该方法能够有效修正结构预测错误，在全监督和半监督TAS模型上都实现了性能提升，同时保持高效率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法为时间动作分割提供了一种高效实用的优化方案，通过结构约束在推理时改进预测，避免了模型重新训练的复杂性。

title: Active-SAOOD: Active Sparsely Annotated Oriented Object Detection in Remote Sensing Images
summary: Reducing the annotation cost of oriented object detection in remote sensing remains a major challenge. Recently, sparse annotation has gained attention for effectively reducing annotation redundancy in densely remote sensing scenes. However, (1) the sparse data reliance on class-dependent sampling, and (2) the lack of in-depth investigation into the characteristics of sparse samples hinders its further development. This paper proposes an active learning-based sparsely annotated oriented object detection (SAOOD) method, termed Active-SAOOD. Based on a model state observation module, Active-SAOOD actively selects the most valuable sparse samples at the instance level that are best suited to the current model state, by jointly considering orientation, classification, and localization uncertainty, as well as inter- and intra-class diversity. This design enables SAOOD to operate stably under completely randomly initialized sparse annotations and extends its applicability to broader real-world. Experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that Active-SAOOD significantly improves both performance and stability of existing SAOOD methods under various random sparse annotation. In particular, with only 1\% annotated ratios, it achieves a 9\% performance gain over the baseline, further enhancing the practical value of SAOOD in remote sensing. The code will be public.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于主动学习的稀疏标注方向目标检测方法Active-SAOOD，通过智能选择最有价值的样本，在仅1%标注率下实现9%的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 遥感图像方向目标检测的标注成本高昂，现有稀疏标注方法存在两个问题：1)依赖于类别相关的采样策略，2)缺乏对稀疏样本特性的深入研究，限制了其在实际应用中的发展。
AI.method: Active-SAOOD方法包含模型状态观察模块，在实例级别主动选择最适合当前模型状态的最有价值稀疏样本。该方法联合考虑方向、分类和定位的不确定性，以及类间和类内多样性，使SAOOD能够在完全随机初始化的稀疏标注下稳定运行。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，Active-SAOOD在各种随机稀疏标注条件下显著提高了现有SAOOD方法的性能和稳定性。特别是在仅1%标注率下，相比基线方法获得了9%的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: Active-SAOOD成功解决了现有稀疏标注方法的局限性，增强了SAOOD在遥感领域的实用价值，为实际应用提供了更有效的解决方案。

title: Task-Agnostic Noisy Label Detection via Standardized Loss Aggregation
comment: Accepted to IEEE ISBI 2026. The final published version will appear in IEEE Xplore
summary: Noisy labels are common in large-scale medical imaging datasets due to inter-observer variability and ambiguous cases. We propose a statistically grounded and task-agnostic framework, Standardized Loss Aggregation (SLA), for detecting noisy labels at the sample level. SLA quantifies label reliability by aggregating standardized fold-level validation losses across repeated cross-validation runs. This formulation generalizes discrete hard-counting schemes into a continuous estimator that captures both the frequency and magnitude of performance deviations, yielding interpretable and statistically stable noisiness scores. Experiments on a public fundus dataset demonstrate that SLA consistently outperforms the hard-counting baseline across all noise levels and converges substantially faster, especially under low noise ratios where subtle loss variations are informative. Samples with high SLA scores indicate potentially ambiguous or mislabeled cases, guiding efficient re-annotation and improving dataset reliability for any classification task.

AI.tldr: SLA是一种基于统计的噪声标签检测框架，通过聚合交叉验证的标准化损失来量化标签可靠性，能够识别医学图像数据集中的错误标签。
AI.motivation: 大规模医学影像数据集中普遍存在由观察者间变异性和模糊病例引起的噪声标签问题，影响模型训练性能。
AI.method: 提出标准化损失聚合(SLA)方法，通过重复交叉验证运行来聚合各折的标准化验证损失，将离散的硬计数方案推广为连续估计器。
AI.result: 在公开眼底数据集上，SLA在所有噪声水平下均优于硬计数基线方法，收敛速度更快，特别是在低噪声比例下表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 高SLA分数的样本表明可能是模糊或错误标记的病例，该方法能有效指导重新标注，提高任何分类任务的数据集可靠性。

title: BathyFacto: Refraction-Aware Two-Media Neural Radiance Fields for Bathymetry
comment: 16 pages, 8 figures, 3 tables. Submitted to ISPRS Open Journal of Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing, Special Issue "3D Underwater Mapping from Above and Below"
summary: Through-water photogrammetry based on UAV imagery enables shallow-water bathymetry, but refraction at the air-water interface violates the straight-ray assumption of Structure-from-Motion and causes systematic depth bias. We present BathyFacto, a refraction-aware two-media extension of Nerfacto integrated into Nerfstudio that targets metrically precise underwater point clouds. BathyFacto uses a shared hash-grid-based density field with a medium-conditioned color head that receives a one-bit medium flag (air or water) and traces each camera ray as two segments: a straight segment in air up to a planar water surface and a refracted segment in water computed via Snell's law with known refractive indices. To allocate samples efficiently across the air-water boundary, we employ a single proposal-network sampler that operates on a virtual straight ray spanning both media, combined with a kinked density wrapper that transparently corrects water-segment positions along the refracted direction before density evaluation. A data adaptation pipeline converts photogrammetric reconstructions to a Nerfstudio-compatible format, estimates the water plane from boundary markers, and provides per-pixel medium masks to gate refraction. We also extend the point cloud export with refraction-corrected backprojection and reversible coordinate transforms to world and global frames. On a simulated two-media scene with known ground truth, BathyFacto with refraction achieves a Cloud-to-Mesh mean distance of 0.06 m and 87 % completeness, compared to 0.52 m / 29 % for the Nerfacto baseline and 0.36 m / 21% for conventional MVS without refraction correction.

AI.tldr: BathyFacto是一种基于折射感知的双媒质NeRF扩展，能够通过无人机水面图像实现精确的水下三维重建，显著减少了传统方法中的深度偏差。
AI.motivation: 基于无人机影像的水下摄影测量技术可以实现浅海测深，但空气-水界面的折射违反了运动恢复结构中的直线光线假设，导致系统性的深度偏差问题。
AI.method: BathyFacto在Nerfstudio框架中扩展了Nerfacto，使用共享的基于哈希网格的密度场和媒质条件化颜色头。该系统将每条相机光线追踪为两段：空气中直线段和经斯涅尔定律计算的水中折射段。采用单一提案网络采样器和密度包装器高效分配样本，并提供数据适配管道进行格式转换、水平面估计和媒质掩码生成。
AI.result: 在模拟双媒质场景中，BathyFacto实现了0.06米的云到网格平均距离和87%的完整性，显著优于Nerfacto基线（0.52米/29%）和传统多视立体方法（0.36米/21%）。
AI.conclusion: BathyFacto通过精确的折射校正和高效的双媒质光线追踪，为水下摄影测量提供了度量精确的点云重建方案，解决了传统方法中折射导致的系统误差问题。

title: MTA-RL: Robust Urban Driving via Multi-modal Transformer-based 3D Affordances and Reinforcement Learning
summary: Robust urban autonomous driving requires reliable 3D scene understanding and stable decision-making under dense interactions. However, existing end-to-end models lack interpretability, while modular pipelines suffer from error propagation across brittle interfaces. This paper proposes MTA-RL, the first framework that bridges perception and control through Multi-modal Transformer-based 3D Affordances and Reinforcement Learning (RL). Unlike previous fusion models that directly regress actions, RGB images and LiDAR point clouds are fused using a transformer architecture to predict explicit, geometry-aware affordance representations. These structured representations serve as a compact observation space, enabling the RL policy to operate purely on predicted driving semantics, which significantly improves sample efficiency and stability. Extensive evaluations in CARLA Town01-03 across varying densities (20-60 background vehicles) show that MTA-RL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. Trained solely on Town03, our method demonstrates superior zero-shot generalization in unseen towns, achieving up to a 9.0% increase in Route Completion, an 11.0% increase in Total Distance, and an 83.7% improvement in Distance Per Violation. Furthermore, ablation studies confirm that our multi-modal fusion and reward shaping are critical, significantly outperforming image-only and unshaped variants, demonstrating the effectiveness of MTA-RL for robust urban autonomous driving.

AI.tldr: MTA-RL是一个结合多模态Transformer和强化学习的自动驾驶框架，通过预测几何感知的驾驶能力表示来连接感知和控制，显著提升了样本效率、稳定性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的端到端自动驾驶模型缺乏可解释性，而模块化管道在不同阶段间存在错误传播问题，需要一种既能保证可靠性又能实现稳定决策的新方法来解决城市自动驾驶中的密集交互挑战。
AI.method: 提出MTA-RL框架，首先使用多模态Transformer融合RGB图像和LiDAR点云，预测显式的几何感知驾驶能力表示；然后将这些结构化表示作为强化学习策略的紧凑观测空间，使策略能够基于预测的驾驶语义进行决策。
AI.result: 在CARLA Town01-03的密集交通环境下，MTA-RL始终优于现有基线方法；仅在Town03训练的模型在未见城镇中实现了零样本泛化，路线完成率提升9.0%，总距离增加11.0%，违规间隔距离改善83.7%。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合和奖励塑造对系统性能至关重要，MTA-RL有效证明了通过结构化语义表示连接感知和控制的方法能够实现鲁棒的城市自动驾驶。

title: What Concepts Lie Within? Detecting and Suppressing Risky Content in Diffusion Transformers
summary: The rise of text-to-image (T2I) models has increasingly raised concerns regarding the generation of risky content, such as sexual, violent, and copyright-protected images, highlighting the need for effective safeguards within the models themselves. Although existing methods have been proposed to eliminate risky concepts from T2I models, they are primarily developed for earlier U-Net architectures, leaving the state-of-the-art Diffusion-Transformer-based T2I models inadequately protected. This gap stems from a fundamental architectural shift: Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) entangle semantic injection and visual synthesis via joint attention, which makes it difficult to isolate and erase risky content within the generation. To bridge this gap, we investigate how semantic concepts are represented in DiTs and discover that attention heads exhibit concept-specific sensitivity. This property enables both the detection and suppression of risky content. Building on this discovery, we propose AHV-D\&S, a training-free inference-time safeguard for image generation in DiTs. Specifically, AHV-D\&S quantifies each textual token's sensitivity across all attention heads as an Attention Head Vector (AHV), which serves as a discriminative signature for detecting risky generation tendencies. In the inference stage, we propose a momentum-based strategy to dynamically track token-wise AHVs across denoising steps, and a sensitivity-guided adaptive suppression strategy that suppresses the attention weights of identified risky tokens based on head-specific risk scores. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AHV-D\&S effectively suppresses sexual, copyrighted-style, and various harmful content while preserving visual quality, and further exhibits strong robustness against adversarial prompts and transferability across different DiT-based T2I models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AHV-D&S方法，这是一种无需训练的推理时安全保护机制，用于防止基于Diffusion Transformer的文本生成图像模型产生有害内容，通过关注头向量来检测和压制风险概念。
AI.motivation: 现有文本生成图像模型的安全防护方法主要针对早期的U-Net架构，而最新的Diffusion-Transformer缺乏有效保护，存在生成性、暴力、版权保护等风险内容的安全隐患。
AI.method: 发现注意力头具有概念特异性敏感度，提出AHV-D&S方法：将每个文本标记在所有注意力头上的敏感度量化为注意力头向量(AHV)作为风险检测特征，采用动量策略动态跟踪去噪步骤中的AHV，并通过敏感性引导的自适应压制策略压制风险标记的注意力权重。
AI.result: 实验表明AHV-D&S能有效抑制性内容、版权保护风格和各种有害内容，同时保持图像视觉质量，并且对对抗性提示具有强鲁棒性，可迁移到不同基于DiT的文本生成图像模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用注意力头的概念特异性敏感度，AHV-D&S为Diffusion-Transformer文本生成图像模型提供了一种有效的无训练安全防护方案，填补了现有方法在先进架构上的空白。

title: A Comparative Study of Machine Learning and Deep Learning for Out-of-Distribution Detection
comment: Accepted to IEEE ISBI 2026. The final published version will appear in IEEE Xplore
summary: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is essential for building reliable AI systems, as models that produce outputs for invalid inputs cannot be trusted. Although deep learning (DL) is often assumed to outperform traditional machine learning (ML), medical imaging data are typically acquired under standardized protocols, leading to relatively constrained image variability in OOD detection tasks. This motivates a direct comparison between ML and DL approaches in this setting. The two approaches are evaluated on open datasets comprising over 60,000 fundus and non-fundus images across multiple resolutions. Both approaches achieved an AUROC of 1.000 and accuracies between 0.999 and 1.000 on internal and external validation sets, showing comparable detection performance. The ML approach, however, exhibited substantially lower end-to-end latency while maintaining equivalent accuracy, indicating greater computational efficiency. These results suggest that for OOD detection tasks of limited visual complexity, lightweight ML approaches can achieve DL-level performance with significantly reduced computational cost, supporting practical real-world deployment.

AI.tldr: 在医学成像的OOD检测任务中，传统机器学习方法与深度学习性能相当，但计算效率更高，更适合实际部署。
AI.motivation: 医学成像数据通常在标准化协议下采集，导致视觉变异有限，这为比较传统ML和DL在OOD检测任务中的表现提供了动机。虽然人们普遍认为DL优于传统ML，但在这种特定场景下这种假设需要验证。
AI.method: 在包含超过60,000张眼底和非眼底图像的开放数据集上评估ML和DL方法，涵盖多种分辨率。比较两种方法在内部和外部验证集上的AUROC、准确率和端到端延迟。
AI.result: 两种方法在内部和外部验证集上都达到了1.000的AUROC和0.999-1.000的准确率，检测性能相当。但ML方法的端到端延迟显著降低，在保持相同准确率的同时具有更高的计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 对于视觉复杂度有限的OOD检测任务，轻量级ML方法可以达到DL水平的性能，同时显著降低计算成本，这支持了在现实世界中的应用部署。

title: Developing a foundation model for high-resolution remote sensing data of the Netherlands
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures, under review in a journal
summary: We develop a foundation model using 1.2m high resolution satellite images of the Netherlands. By combining a Convolutional Neural Network and a Vision Transformer, the model captures both low- and high-frequency landscape features, such as fine textures, edges, and small objects as well as large terrain structures, elevation patterns, and land-cover distributions. Leveraging temporal data as input, the model learns from broader contextual information across time, allowing the model to exploit the temporal dependencies, such as topographic features, land-cover changes, and seasonal dynamics. These additional constraints reduce feature ambiguity, improve representation learning, and enable better generalization with fewer labeled samples. The foundation model is evaluated on multiple downstream tasks, ranging from use cases within the Netherlands to global benchmarking datasets. On the vegetation monitoring dataset of the Netherlands, the model shows clear performance improvements by incorporating temporal information instead of relying on a single time point. Despite using a smaller model and less pretraining data limited to the Netherlands, it achieves competitive results on global benchmarks when compared to state-of-the-art models. These results demonstrate that the model can learn rich, generalizable representations from limited data, achieving competitive performance on global benchmarks while using a fraction of the parameters of larger state-of-the-art remote sensing models. To maximize reproducibility and reuse, we made the scripts and the model accessible on GitHub.

AI.tldr: 研究人员基于荷兰120万张高分辨率卫星图像开发了一个基础模型，该模型结合CNN和Vision Transformer，并利用时间信息，在有限数据和较小模型规模下实现了全球基准数据集上的竞争性性能。
AI.motivation: 旨在开发一个能够从有限的地理区域数据中学习通用表示的遥感基础模型，减少对大规模预训练数据和大模型的依赖，同时提高下游任务的泛化能力和准确性。
AI.method: 结合卷积神经网络(CNN)和视觉Transformer(ViT)来捕获低频和高频景观特征；利用时间序列数据作为输入，学习跨时间的上下文信息和依赖关系；在荷兰的120万张高分辨率卫星图像上进行预训练。
AI.result: 在荷兰植被监测数据集上，使用时间信息的模型相比单时间点有显著性能提升；在较小的模型规模和仅限荷兰的预训练数据条件下，在全球基准数据集上达到了与最先进模型竞争的结果。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了通过融合CNN和ViT架构以及利用时间约束，即使使用有限的数据和较小的模型规模，也能学习到丰富且可泛化的表示，为资源受限的遥感建模提供了新的可能性。

title: DynGhost: Temporally-Modelled Transformer for Dynamic Ghost Imaging with Quantum Detectors
summary: Ghost imaging reconstructs spatial information from a single-pixel bucket detector by correlating structured illumination patterns with scalar intensity measurements. While deep learning approaches have achieved promising results on static scenes, two critical limitations remain unaddressed: existing architectures fail to exploit temporal coherence across frames, leaving dynamic ghost imaging largely unsolved, and they assume additive Gaussian noise models that do not reflect the true Poissonian statistics of real single-photon hardware. We present DynGhost (Dynamic Ghost Imaging Transformer), a transformer architecture that addresses both limitations through alternating spatial and temporal attention blocks. Our quantum-aware training framework, based on physically accurate detector simulations (SNSPDs, SPADs, SiPMs) and Anscombe variance-stabilizing normalization, resolves the distribution shift that causes classical models to fail under realistic hardware constraints. Experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that DynGhost outperforms both traditional reconstruction methods and existing deep learning architectures, with particular gains in dynamic and photon-starved settings.

AI.tldr: DynGhost是一种动态幽灵成像Transformer架构，通过时空注意力机制和量子感知训练框架，解决了传统方法在动态场景和真实硬件噪声下的成像问题。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在静态幽灵成像中表现良好，但存在两个关键局限：未能利用帧间时间相干性处理动态场景，以及基于高斯噪声假设的模型无法反映真实单光子硬件的泊松统计特性。
AI.method: 提出DynGhost架构，采用空间和时间注意力交替模块；设计量子感知训练框架，基于物理准确的探测器模拟(SNSPDs、SPADs、SiPMs)和Anscombe方差稳定归一化解决分布偏移问题。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，DynGhost优于传统重建方法和现有深度学习架构，在动态和光子受限环境下表现尤为突出。
AI.conclusion: 该工作首次在单光子硬件限制下实现了动态幽灵成像的高质量重建，为实际应用提供了可行的深度学习解决方案。

title: SciVQR: A Multidisciplinary Multimodal Benchmark for Advanced Scientific Reasoning Evaluation
summary: Scientific reasoning is a key aspect of human intelligence, requiring the integration of multimodal inputs, domain expertise, and multi-step inference across various subjects. Existing benchmarks for multimodal large language models (MLLMs) often fail to capture the complexity and traceability of reasoning processes necessary for rigorous evaluation. To fill this gap, we introduce SciVQR, a multimodal benchmark covering 54 subfields in mathematics, physics, chemistry, geography, astronomy, and biology. SciVQR includes domain-specific visuals, such as equations, charts, and diagrams, and challenges models to combine visual comprehension with reasoning. The tasks range from basic factual recall to complex, multi-step inferences, with 46% including expert-authored solutions. SciVQR not only evaluates final answers but also examines the reasoning process, providing insights into how models reach their conclusions. Our evaluation of leading MLLMs, including both proprietary and open-source models, reveals significant limitations in handling complex multimodal reasoning tasks, underscoring the need for improved multi-step reasoning and better integration of interdisciplinary knowledge in advancing MLLMs toward true scientific intelligence. The dataset and evaluation code are publicly available at https://github.com/CASIA-IVA-Lab/SciVQR.

AI.tldr: SciVQR是一个涵盖6个学科54个分支的多模态科学推理基准，用于评估MLLMs处理复杂的跨学科推理任务能力。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型基准缺乏对科学推理复杂性和可追溯性的评估，无法充分测试模型在真实科学场景中的推理能力。
AI.method: 构建包含数学、物理、化学、地理、天文、生物6大学科54个分支的数据集，包含公式、图表、示意图等专业视觉元素，设计从基础事实回忆到复杂多步推理的任务，46%的题目包含专家编写的解题过程。
AI.result: 评估显示当前领先的MLLMs在处理复杂多模态推理任务时存在显著局限，表明模型需要改进多步推理能力和跨学科知识整合。
AI.conclusion: SciVQR填补了科学推理评估的空白，为推动MLLMs向真正科学智能方向发展提供了重要的评估工具和数据支撑。

title: DetRefiner: Model-Agnostic Detection Refinement with Feature Fusion Transformer
summary: Open-vocabulary object detection (OVOD) aims to detect both seen and unseen categories, yet existing methods often struggle to generalize to novel objects due to limited integration of global and local contextual cues. We propose DetRefiner, a simple yet effective plug-and-play framework that learns to fuse global and local features to refine open-vocabulary detection. DetRefiner processes global image features and patch-level image features from foundational models (e.g., DINOv3) through a lightweight Transformer encoder. The encoder produces a class vector capturing image-level attributes and patch vectors representing local region attributes, from which attribute reliability is inferred to recalibrate the base model's confidence. Notably, DetRefiner is trained independently of the base OVOD model, requiring neither access to its internal features nor retraining. At inference, it operates solely on the base detector's predictions, producing auxiliary calibration scores that are merged with the base detector's scores to yield the final refined confidence. Despite this simplicity, DetRefiner consistently enhances multiple OVOD models across COCO, LVIS, ODinW13, and Pascal VOC, achieving gains of up to +10.1 AP on novel categories. These results highlight that learning to fuse global and local representations offers a powerful and general mechanism for advancing open-world object detection. Our codes and models are available at https://github.com/hitachi-rd-cv/detrefiner.

AI.tldr: DetRefiner是一个即插即用的框架，通过融合全局和局部特征来优化开放词汇目标检测，在不重新训练基础模型的情况下使新类别检测性能显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有的开放词汇目标检测方法由于缺乏全局和局部上下文信息的有效集成，在检测新类别物体时泛化能力有限，需要一种简单有效的方法来提升检测性能。
AI.method: DetRefiner使用轻量级Transformer编码器处理基础模型的全局图像特征和局部补丁特征，生成类别向量和补丁向量，通过属性可靠性推断重新校准基础模型的置信度，训练独立于基础OVOD模型进行。
AI.result: 在COCO、LVIS、ODinW13和Pascal VOC数据集上，DetRefiner一致地提升了多个OVOD模型的性能，在新类别上最高获得+10.1 AP的显著增益。
AI.conclusion: 学习融合全局和局部表示是一种强大且通用的机制，能够有效推进开放世界目标检测的性能提升，为OVOD领域提供了新的解决思路。

title: 3DReflecNet: A Large-Scale Dataset for 3D Reconstruction of Reflective, Transparent, and Low-Texture Objects
comment: This paper has been accepted by CVPR 2026 Oral
summary: Accurate 3D reconstruction of objects with reflective, transparent, or low-texture surfaces still remains notoriously challenging. Such materials often violate key assumptions in multi-view reconstruction pipelines, such as photometric consistency and the availability on distinct geometric texture cues. Existing datasets primarily focus on diffuse, textured objects, and therefore provide limited insight into performance under real-world material complexities. We introduce 3DReflecNet, a large-scale hybrid dataset exceeding 22 TB that is specifically designed to benchmark and advance 3D vision methods for these challenging materials. 3DReflecNet combines two types of data: over 120,000 synthetic instances generated via physically-based rendering of more than 12,000 shapes, and over 1,000 real-world objects captured using consumer devices. Together, these data consist of more than 7 million multi-view frames. The dataset spans diverse materials, complex lighting conditions, and a wide range of geometric forms, including shapes generated from both real and LLM-synthesized 2D images using diffusion-based pipelines. To support robust evaluation, we design benchmarks for five core tasks: image matching, structure-from-motion, novel view synthesis, reflection removal, and relighting. Extensive experiments demonstrate that state-of-the-art methods struggle to maintain accuracy across these settings, highlighting the need for more resilient 3D vision models.

AI.tldr: 3DReflecNet是一个面向反射、透明和低纹理物体的3D重建大型混合数据集，包含超过22TB的数据、700万多视图帧，并设计了5个核心任务基准测试。
AI.motivation: 准确重建具有反射性、透明或低纹理表面的物体仍然极具挑战性，这些材料违反了多视图重建管道的关键假设，而现有数据集主要关注漫射纹理物体，无法评估真实世界复杂材料环境下的算法性能。
AI.method: 构建大规模混合数据集，包括通过物理渲染生成的12万多个合成实例和消费设备捕获的1000多个真实物体，涵盖多样化材料、复杂光照条件和几何形状，并为图像匹配、运动恢复结构、新视角合成、反射移除和重新光照设计基准测试。
AI.result: 创建了一个超过22TB的大规模数据集，包含700万多视图帧，覆盖从真实图像和LLM合成图像生成的形状，实验表明现有最先进方法在这些复杂环境下难以保持准确性能。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集填补了复杂材料3D重建研究的数据空白，通过系统评估揭示了现有方法的局限性，为开发更具鲁棒性的3D视觉模型提供了重要基础和评估基准。

title: VPD-100K: Towards Generalizable and Fine-grained Visual Privacy Protection
comment: Accepted at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
summary: Privacy protection has become a critical requirement in the era of ubiquitous visual data sharing, imposing higher demands on efficient and robust privacy detection algorithms. However, current robust detection models are severely hindered by the lack of comprehensive datasets. Existing privacy-oriented datasets often suffer from limited scale, coarse-grained annotations, and narrow domain coverage, failing to capture the intricate details of sensitive information in realworld environments. To bridge this gap, we present a large-scale, fine-grained Visual Privacy Dataset (VPD-100K), designed to facilitate generalized privacy detection. We establish a holistic taxonomy comprising four primary domains: Human Presence, On-Screen Personally Identifiable Information (PII), Physical Identifiers, and Location Indicators, containing 100,000 images annotated with 33 fine-grained classes and over 190,000 object instances. Statistical analysis reveals that our dataset features long-tailed distributions, small object scales, and high visual complexity. These characteristics make the dataset particularly valuable for demanding, unconstrained applications such as live streaming, where actors frequently face unintentional, realtime information leakage. Furthermore, we design an effective frequency-enhanced lightweight module consisting of frequency-domain attention fusion and adaptive spectral gating mechanism that breaks the limitations of spatial pixel intensity to better capture the subtle details of sensitive information. Extensive experiments conducted on both diverse image and streaming videos benchmarks consistently demonstrate the effectiveness of our VPD-100K dataset and the wellcurated frequency mechanism. The code and dataset are available at https://vpd-100k.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 研究者构建了一个大规模细粒度视觉隐私数据集VPD-100K，包含10万张图像和33个细粒度类别，并设计了频率增强轻量级模块来提升隐私检测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有隐私检测算法受限于缺乏综合性数据集的问题。现有隐私导向数据集存在规模有限、注释粒度粗糙、领域覆盖狭窄等缺陷，无法捕捉真实环境中敏感信息的复杂细节。
AI.method: 建立了包含人类出现、屏幕个人信息、物理标识符和位置指示器四大主域的完整分类体系，构建了VPD-100K数据集。设计了频率增强轻量级模块，包含频域注意力融合和自适应频谱门控机制。
AI.result: 数据集具有长尾分布、小物体尺度和高视觉复杂性特征。在多样化图像和流媒体视频基准测试中，VPD-100K数据集和频率机制都展现出有效性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了隐私检测领域缺乏大规模细粒度数据集的空白，为直播等非约束应用场景中的实时信息泄露检测提供了重要基础工具和方法。

title: AdaptSplat: Adapting Vision Foundation Models for Feed-Forward 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: This work explores a simple yet powerful lightweight adapter design for feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS). Existing methods typically apply complex, architecture-specific designs on top of the generic pipeline of image feature extraction $\rightarrow$ multi-view interaction $\rightarrow$ feature decoding. However, constrained by the scale bottleneck of 3D training data and the low-pass filtering effect of deep networks, these methods still fall short in cross-domain generalization and high-frequency geometric fidelity. To address these problems, we propose AdaptSplat, which demonstrates that without complex component engineering, introducing a single adapter of only 1.5M parameters into the generic architecture is sufficient to achieve superior performance. Specifically, we design a lightweight Frequency-Preserving Adapter (FPA) that extracts direction-aware high-frequency structural priors from the shallow features of a powerful vision foundation model backbone, and seamlessly integrates them into the generic pipeline via high-frequency positional encodings and adaptive residual modulation. This effectively compensates for the high-frequency attenuation caused by over-smoothing in deep features, improving the fitting accuracy of Gaussian primitives on complex surfaces and sharp boundaries. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AdaptSplat achieves state-of-the-art feed-forward reconstruction performance on multiple standard benchmarks, with stable generalization across domains. Code available at: https://github.com/xmw666/AdaptSplat.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种名为AdaptSplat的轻量级适配器设计，通过仅添加1.5M参数的频率保持适配器(FPA)，显著提升了3D高斯泼溅的跨域泛化能力和高频几何保真度。
AI.motivation: 现有的前馈3D高斯泼溅方法在图像特征提取、多视图交互和特征解码的传统流水线上采用复杂的特定架构设计，但由于3D训练数据规模瓶颈和深度网络的低通滤波效应，这些方法在跨域泛化和高频几何保真度方面仍存在不足。
AI.method: 设计了一个轻量级的频率保持适配器(FPA)，从强大的视觉基础模型骨干网络的浅层特征中提取方向感知的高频结构先验，并通过高频位置编码和自适应残差调制将其无缝集成到通用流水线中。
AI.result: 在多个标准基准测试中实现了最先进的前馈重建性能，并在跨域泛化方面表现出稳定的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 证明无需复杂的组件工程，在通用架构中引入单个轻量级适配器就足以实现优越性能，有效补偿了深度特征过度平滑导致的高频衰减，提高了高斯原语在复杂表面和锐利边界上的拟合精度。

title: Efficient Hybrid CNN-GNN Architecture for Monocular Depth Estimation
summary:
We present GraphDepth, a monocular depth estimation architecture that synergistically integrates Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) within a convolutional encoder-decoder framework. Our approach embeds efficient GraphSAGE layers at multiple scales of a ResNet-101 U-Net backbone, enabling explicit modeling of long-range spatial relationships that lie beyond the receptive field of local convolutions. Key technical contributions include: (1) batch-parallelized graph construction with configurable k-NN and
  grid-based adjacency for scalable training; (2) multi-scale GraphSAGE integration at bottleneck and decoder stages
  (1/32, 1/16, 1/8 resolution) to propagate global context
  throughout the feature hierarchy; (3) channel-attention gated skip connections that adaptively weight encoder
  features before fusion; and (4) heteroscedastic uncertainty estimation via a dedicated aleatoric
  uncertainty head, enabling confidence-aware loss weighting during
  optimization. Unlike transformer-based hybrids, which suffer from quadratic complexity in sequence length, GraphDepth scales linearly with spatial resolution while achieving comparable global receptive fields through iterative message passing. Experiments on NYU Depth V2, WHU Aerial, ETH3D, and Mid-Air benchmarks demonstrate competitive accuracy within 4.6\% of state-of-the-art transformers on indoor scenes with substantially lower computational cost (25 FPS vs 9 FPS, 3.8 GB vs 8.8 GB VRAM). GraphDepth achieves the best reported result on WHU Aerial (RMSE 8.24 m) and exhibits superior zero-shot cross-domain transfer to the Mid-Air synthetic aerial dataset, validating the generalization power of explicit relational reasoning for depth estimation.

AI.tldr: GraphDepth是一种将图神经网络集成到卷积编码器-解码器框架中的单目深度估计方法，通过多尺度图结构建模长距离空间关系，在保持线性计算复杂度的同时实现了与transformer相当的精度，并显著降低了计算成本。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络在单目深度估计中受限于局部感受野，而基于transformer的混合方法虽然能捕获全局信息但存在二次方计算复杂度问题。因此需要一种既能建模长距离空间关系又能保持计算效率的新架构。
AI.method: 在ResNet-101 U-Net骨干网络的多尺度特征中嵌入GraphSAGE层，采用批并行图构造和可配置的k-NN与网格邻接关系，在瓶颈层和解码器阶段(1/32, 1/16, 1/8分辨率)集成多尺度图神经网络，并使用通道注意力门控的跳跃连接和异方差不确定性估计进行优化。
AI.result: 在NYU Depth V2、WHU Aerial、ETH3D和Mid-Air基准测试中，精度达到最先进transformer方法的4.6%以内，计算成本显著降低(25 FPS vs 9 FPS, 3.8 GB vs 8.8 GB VRAM)，在WHU Aerial上获得最佳结果(RMSE 8.24 m)，并在跨域迁移到Mid-Air数据集上表现出色。
AI.conclusion: GraphDepth通过显式关系推理实现了高效的单目深度估计，证明了图神经网络在深度估计中的有效性，为平衡全局信息捕获和计算效率提供了新的解决方案，具有出色的泛化性能。

title: Increasing the Efficiency of DETR for Maritime High-Resolution Images
comment: Accepted to IEEE ITSC 2026. Copyright 2026 IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. Permission from IEEE must be obtained for all other uses. DOI to be added upon publication
summary: Maritime object detection is critical for the safe navigation of unmanned surface vessels (USVs), requiring accurate recognition of obstacles from small buoys to large vessels. Real-time detection is challenging due to long distances, small object sizes, large-scale variations, edge computing limitations, and the high memory demands of high-resolution imagery. Existing solutions, such as downsampling or image splitting, often reduce accuracy or require additional processing, while memory-efficient models typically handle only limited resolutions. To overcome these limitations, we leverage Vision Mamba (ViM) backbones, which build on State Space Models (SSMs) to capture long-range dependencies while scaling linearly with sequence length. Images are tokenized into sequences for efficient high-resolution processing. For further computational efficiency, we design a tailored Feature Pyramid Network with successive downsampling and SSM layers, as well as token pruning to reduce unnecessary computation on background regions. Compared to state-of-the-art methods like RT-DETR with ResNet50 backbone, our approach achieves a better balance between performance and computational efficiency in maritime object detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Vision Mamba的海上目标检测方法，通过特征金字塔网络和token剪枝技术，在边缘计算限制下实现了高分辨率图像的实时高效检测。
AI.motivation: 海上目标检测对无人水面船舶安全导航至关重要，但存在目标距离远、尺寸小、尺度变化大、边缘计算资源有限和高分辨率图像内存需求高等挑战。现有方法如降采样或图像分割会降低精度或增加计算负担。
AI.method: 采用Vision Mamba作为骨干网络，利用状态空间模型(SSM)线性扩展特性处理长距离依赖；设计定制化的特征金字塔网络，包含连续下采样和SSM层；引入token剪枝减少背景区域的冗余计算。
AI.result: 与RT-DETR等先进方法相比，该方法在海上目标检测任务上在性能和计算效率之间取得了更好的平衡。
AI.conclusion: 基于Vision Mamba的方法有效解决了海上目标检测中的计算效率和内存限制问题，为边缘计算环境下的实时检测提供了新思路。

title: PolarVSR: A Unified Framework and Benchmark for Continuous Space-Time Polarization Video Reconstruction
summary: Polarimetric imaging captures surface polarization characteristics, such as the Degree of Linear Polarization (DoLP) and the Angle of Polarization (AoP). In mainstream Division of-Focal-Plane (DoFP) color polarization imaging, recovering polarization parameters from captured mosaic arrays remains a challenging inverse problem. Existing DoFP cameras also face hardware bottlenecks and often cannot support high-frame-rate acquisition, limiting polarimetric imaging in dynamic video tasks. These limitations motivate joint spatial and temporal enhancement. To this end, we propose the first space-time polarization video reconstruction architecture. The method jointly models polarization directions in space and time and uses a polarization-aware implicit neural representation for continuous, high-fidelity upsampling. By analyzing temporal variations in polarization parameters, we further introduce a flow-guided polarization variation loss to supervise polarization dynamics. We also establish the first large-scale color DoFP polarization video benchmark to support this research direction. Extensive experiments on this benchmark demonstrate the effectiveness of the method.

AI.tldr: 这是首个时空偏振视频重建架构，通过联合建模时空偏振方向和偏振感知隐式神经表示，实现了连续高保真上采样，同时建立了首个大规模彩色DoFP偏振视频基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 传统DoFP偏振相机在偏振参数恢复和硬件瓶颈方面存在挑战，无法支持高帧率采集，这限制了动态视频任务中的偏振成像应用，因此需要联合时空增强的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出时空偏振视频重建架构，联合建模时空偏振方向，使用偏振感知的隐式神经表示进行连续高保真上采样，并引入流引导的偏振变化损失来监督偏振动态变化。
AI.result: 在建立的首个大规模彩色DoFP偏振视频基准数据集上进行了广泛实验，实验结果证明了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功解决了DoFP偏振成像在动态视频应用中的限制，为偏振视频重建提供了新的技术路径，并通过建立基准数据集推动了该领域的发展。

title: PaMoSplat: Part-Aware Motion-Guided Gaussian Splatting for Dynamic Scene Reconstruction
comment: Accepted by TCSVT. Project Url: https://pamosplat.github.io
summary: Dynamic scene reconstruction represents a fundamental yet demanding challenge in computer vision and robotics. While recent progress in 3DGS-based methods has advanced dynamic scene modeling, obtaining high-fidelity rendering and accurate tracking in scenarios with substantial, intricate motions remains significantly challenging. To address these challenges, we propose PaMoSplat, a novel dynamic Gaussian splatting framework incorporating part awareness and motion priors. Our approach is grounded in two key observations: 1) Parts serve as primitives for scene deformation, and 2) Motion cues from optical flow can effectively guide part motion. Specifically, PaMoSplat initializes by lifting multi-view segmentation masks into 3D space via graph clustering, establishing coherent Gaussian parts. For subsequent timestamps, we leverage a differential evolutionary algorithm to estimate the rigid motion of these parts using multi-view optical flow cues, providing a robust warm-start for further optimization. Additionally, PaMoSplat introduces an adaptive iteration count mechanism, internal learnable rigidity, and flow-supervised rendering loss to accelerate and optimize the training process. Comprehensive evaluations across diverse scenes, including real-world environments, demonstrate that PaMoSplat delivers superior rendering quality, improved tracking precision, and faster convergence compared to existing methods. Furthermore, it enables multiple part-level downstream applications, such as 4D scene editing.

AI.tldr: PaMoSplat是一个结合部件感知和运动先验的动态高斯溅射框架，通过将场景分解为多个刚性部件并利用光流信息引导运动估计，实现了对复杂动态场景的高质量重建和精确跟踪。
AI.motivation: 现有基于3DGS的动态场景重建方法在处理大幅度和复杂运动时难以获得高保真渲染和准确跟踪效果，需要新的方法来克服这些局限性。
AI.method: 通过图聚类将多视图分割掩码提升到3D空间建立连贯的高斯部件；使用差分进化算法结合多视图光流线索估计部件的刚性运动；引入自适应迭代机制、内部可学习刚度和光流监督渲染损失来优化训练过程。
AI.result: 在多样化场景（包括真实环境）的综合评估表明，PaMoSplat相比现有方法提供了更优的渲染质量、更高的跟踪精度和更快的收敛速度。
AI.conclusion: PaMoSplat不仅实现了对复杂动态场景的高质量重建，还支持4D场景编辑等多种部件级下游应用，为动态场景处理提供了有效的解决方案。

title: LimeCross: Context-Conditioned Layered Image Editing with Structural Consistency
summary: Layered image assets are widely used in real-world creative workflows, enabling non-destructive iteration and flexible re-composition. Recent advances in layered image generation and decomposition synthesize or recover layered representations, yet controllable editing of layered images remains challenging. Manual editing requires careful coordination across layers to maintain consistent illumination and contact, while AI-based pipelines collapse layers into a flattened image for editing, then decompose them again, introducing background-to-foreground leakage and unstable transparency. To address these limitations, we propose LimeCross, a training-free context-conditioned layered image editing framework that edits user-selected RGBA layers according to text while keeping the remaining layers unchanged. It leverages contextual cues from other layers using a bi-stream attention mechanism to preserve cross-layer consistency, while explicitly maintaining layer integrity to prevent the contamination of edited layers. To evaluate our approach, we introduce LayerEditBench, a benchmark of 1500 layered scenes with paired source/target prompts, along with evaluation protocols that assess both edit fidelity and alpha channel stability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LimeCross improves layer purity and composite realism over strong editing baselines, establishing context-conditioned layered editing as a principled framework for controllable generative creation.

AI.tldr: LimeCross是一个无需训练的分层图像编辑框架，能够根据文本编辑用户选择的RGBA图层，同时保持其他图层不变，通过双流注意力机制确保跨层一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有的分层图像编辑方法存在局限性：手动编辑需要精心协调图层以保持光照和接触的一致性，而基于AI的方法在编辑时会压平图层再分解，导致前景背景渗漏和不稳定的透明度。
AI.method: 提出LimeCross框架，采用双流注意力机制利用其他图层的上下文线索保持跨层一致性，显式维护图层完整性防止编辑图层污染。同时引入LayerEditBench评测基准，包含1500个分层场景和评估协议。
AI.result: 实验证明LimeCross相比强基线方法显著提升了图层纯度和合成真实感，建立了上下文条件分层编辑作为可控生成创作的原则性框架。
AI.conclusion: LimeCross首次实现了无需训练的上下文条件分层图像编辑，为创意工作流中的可控分层图像生成提供了新的技术路径，解决了传统方法中图层渗漏和透明度不稳定的核心问题。

title: The Alpha Blending Hypothesis: Compositing Shortcut in Deepfake Detection
summary: Recent deepfake detection methods demonstrate improved cross-dataset generalization, yet the underlying mechanisms remain underexplored. We introduce the Alpha Blending Hypothesis, positing that state-of-the-art frame-based detectors primarily function as alpha blending searchers; rather than learning semantic anomalies or specific generative neural fingerprints, they localize low-level compositing artifacts introduced during the integration of manipulated faces into target frames. We experimentally validate the hypothesis, demonstrating that deepfake detectors exhibit high sensitivity to the so-called self-blended images (SBI) and non-generative manipulations. We propose the method BlenD that leverages a large-scale, diverse dataset of real-only facial images augmented with SBI. This approach achieves the best average cross-dataset generalization on 15 compositional deepfake datasets released between 2019 and 2025 without utilizing explicitly generated deepfakes during training. Furthermore, we show that predictions from explicit blending searchers and models resilient to blending shortcuts are highly complementary, yielding a state-of-the-art AUROC of 94.0% in an ensemble configuration. The code with experiments and the trained model will be publicly released.

AI.tldr: 研究发现主流深度伪造检测器实际上是alpha混合搜索器，主要检测低级合成痕迹而非语义异常。基于此，作者提出BlenD方法，利用真实图像+自混合图像训练，在跨数据集泛化上取得最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 当前深度伪造检测方法在跨数据集泛化方面有所改进，但底层的检测机制尚未被充分探索和理解，需要深入揭示检测器的工作原理。
AI.method: 提出Alpha混合假说，通过实验验证检测器对自混合图像和非生成操作的敏感性；开发BlenD方法，使用包含SBI增强的仅真实人脸数据集进行训练，无需显式生成的deepfake样本。
AI.result: BlenD方法在2019-2025年间发布的15个组合深度伪造数据集上实现了最佳平均跨数据集泛化性能；集成方法达到94.0%的AUROC state-of-the-art性能。
AI.conclusion: 深度伪造检测器主要依赖低级合成痕迹而非高级语义特征，基于这一理解设计的BlenD方法为构建更泛化的检测系统提供了新思路，显式混合搜索器与抗混合模型的集成能进一步提升检测性能。

title: EvoStreaming: Your Offline Video Model Is a Natively Streaming Assistant
summary: Streaming video understanding demands more than watching longer videos: assistants must decide when to speak in real time, balancing responsiveness against verbosity. Yet most video-language models (VideoLLMs) are trained for offline inference, and existing streaming benchmarks externalize this timing decision to the evaluator. We address this gap with RealStreamEval, a frame-level multi-turn evaluation protocol that exposes models to sequential observations and penalizes unnecessary responses. Under this protocol, we observed that strong offline VideoLLMs retain useful visual understanding but lack an interaction policy for deciding when to respond. Motivated by this observation, we propose EvoStreaming, a self-evolved streaming adaptation framework in which the base model itself acts as data generator, relevance annotator, and roll-out policy to synthesize streaming trajectories without external supervision. With only $1{,}000$ self-generated samples ($139\times$ less than the leading streaming instruction-tuning approach) and no architectural changes, EvoStreaming consistently improves the overall RealStreamEval score by up to $10.8$ points across five open VideoLLM backbones (Qwen2/2.5/3-VL, InternVL-3.5, MiniCPM-V4.5) while largely preserving offline video performance. These results suggest that data-efficient interaction tuning is a practical path for adapting existing VideoLLMs to streaming assistants.

AI.tldr: 提出了RealStreamEval流式评估协议和EvoStreaming自适应框架，使现有VideoLLM能够在极少量自生成数据(1000个样本)下有效适配流式对话，显著提升实时响应能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频语言模型主要针对离线推理训练，缺乏实时流式交互中的时机决策能力。传统评估方法将何时回应的决策外部化给评估者，无法真实反映模型在实际流式场景中的表现。
AI.method:
1) 设计RealStreamEval帧级多回合评估协议，让模型顺序观察视频流并对不必要的回应施加惩罚
2) 提出EvoStreaming自进化框架：基础模型自身作为数据生成器、相关性标注器和策略，无需外部监督生成流式轨迹
3) 仅用1000个自生成样本进行微调，采用139倍更少的数据量
AI.result: 在五个开源VideoLLM骨干网络上，EvoStreaming将RealStreamEval总体评分提高最多10.8分，同时基本保持离线视频理解性能。仅需139倍更少的数据量就超越现有流式指令调优方法。
AI.conclusion: 数据高效的交互调优是将现有VideoLLM适配为流式助手的实用路径，为实时视频理解应用提供了新的解决方案。

title: BGG: Bridging the Geometric Gap between Cross-View images by Vision Foundation Model Adaptation for Geo-Localization
summary: Geometric differences between cross-view images, such as drone and satellite views, significantly increase the challenge of Cross-View Geo-Localization (CVGL), which aims to acquire the geolocation of images by image retrieval. To further enhance the CVGL performance, this paper proposes a parameter-efficient adaptation framework for bridging the geometric gap across images based on the vision foundation model (VFM) (e.g., DINOv3), termed BGG. BGG not only effectively leverages the general visual representations of VFM and captures the robust and consistent features from cross-view images, but also utilizes the generalization capabilities of the VFM, significantly improving the CVGL performance. It mainly contains a Multi-granularity Feature Enhancement Adapter (MFEA) and a Frequency-Aware Structural Aggregation (FASA) module. Specifically, MFEA enhances the scale adaptability and viewpoint robustness of features by multi-level dilated convolutions, effectively bridging the cross-view geometric gap with small training costs. Additionally, considering the [CLS] token lacks spatial details for precise image retrieval and localization, the FASA module modulates patch tokens in the frequency domain and performs adaptive aggregation for local structural feature enhancement. Finally, BGG fuses the enhanced local features with the [CLS] token for more accurate CVGL. Extensive experiments on University-1652 and SUES-200 datasets demonstrate that BGG has significant advantages over other methods and achieves state-of-the-art localization performance with low training costs.

AI.tldr: BGG是一个参数高效的跨视图地理定位框架，通过融合多粒度特征增强和频域感知结构聚合模块，有效缩小不同视角图像间的几何差异，在低训练成本下实现SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 无人机和卫星等跨视图图像间的几何差异显著增加了跨视图地理定位（CVGL）的挑战。现有的方法在处理这种跨视图几何差异时效果有限，需要一种高效的方法来克服这个问题。
AI.method: BGG框架包含两个核心模块：1）多粒度特征增强适配器（MFEA）通过多级空洞卷积增强特征的尺度适应性和视角鲁棒性；2）频域感知结构聚合（FASA）模块在频域调制patch token并自适应聚合以增强局部结构特征。最后将增强的局部特征与[CLS] token融合用于CVGL。
AI.result: 在University-1652和SUES-200数据集上的大量实验表明，BGG相比其他方法具有显著优势，以低训练成本实现了最先进的定位性能。
AI.conclusion: BGG有效利用视觉基础模型的通用视觉表示能力，通过MFEA和FASA模块成功弥补跨视图几何差异，为跨视图地理定位提供了一种高效且性能优异的解决方案。

title: Portable Active Learning for Object Detection
summary: Annotating bounding boxes is costly and limits the scalability of object detection. This challenge is compounded by the need to preserve high accuracy while minimizing manual effort in real-world applications. Prior active learning methods often depend on model features or modify detector internals and training schedules, increasing integration overhead. Moreover, they rarely jointly exploit the benefits of image-level signals, class-imbalance cues, and instance-level uncertainty for comprehensive selection. We present Portable Active Learning (PAL), a detector-agnostic, easily portable framework that operates solely on inference outputs. PAL combines class-wise instance uncertainty with image-level diversity to guide data selection. At each round, PAL trains lightweight class-specific logistic classifiers to distinguish true from false positives, producing entropy-based uncertainty scores for proposals. Candidate images are then refined using global image entropy, class diversity, and image similarity, yielding batches that are both informative and diverse. PAL requires no changes to model internals or training pipelines, ensuring broad compatibility across detectors. Extensive experiments on COCO, PASCAL VOC, and BDD100K demonstrate that PAL consistently improves label efficiency and detection accuracy compared to existing active learning baselines, making it a practical solution for scalable and cost-effective deployment of object detection in real-world settings.

AI.tldr: PAL是一种可移植的主动学习框架，通过组合类别级实例不确定性和图像级多样性来指导数据选择，在无需修改检测器内部结构和训练流程的情况下，显著提升了目标检测的标注效率和精度。
AI.motivation: 目标检测中边界框标注成本高昂且限制了可扩展性，现有主动学习方法通常需要依赖模型特征或修改检测器内部结构和训练计划，集成开销大，且很少联合利用图像级信号、类别不平衡线索和实例级不确定性的优势进行全面选择。
AI.method: PAL是一个检测器无关、易于移植的框架，仅基于推理输出运行。它首先在每个轮次训练轻量级特定类别的逻辑分类器来区分真阳性和假阳性，为候选区域产生基于熵的不确定性得分；然后使用全局图像熵、类别多样性和图像相似性对候选图像进行细化，产生既信息丰富又多样化的批次。
AI.result: 在COCO、PASCAL VOC和BDD100K数据集上的大量实验表明，与现有主动学习基线相比，PAL始终能够提高标注效率和检测准确度。
AI.conclusion: PAL无需更改模型内部或训练流程，确保了跨检测器的广泛兼容性，为实际场景中目标检测的大规模和成本效益部署提供了一个实用解决方案。

title: DySurface: Consistent 4D Surface Reconstruction via Bridging Explicit Gaussians and Implicit Functions
summary: While novel view synthesis (NVS) for dynamic scenes has seen significant progress, reconstructing temporally consistent geometric surfaces remains a challenge. Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) and 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) offer powerful dynamic scene rendering capabilities; however, relying solely on photometric optimization often leads to geometric ambiguities. This results in discontinuous surfaces, severe artifacts, and broken surfaces over time. To address these limitations, we present DySurface, a novel framework that bridges the effectiveness of explicit Gaussians with the geometric fidelity of implicit Signed Distance Functions (SDFs) in dynamic scenes. Our approach tackles the structural discrepancy between the forward deformation of 3DGS ($canonical \rightarrow dynamic$) and the backward deformation required for volumetric SDF rendering ($dynamic \rightarrow canonical$). Specifically, we propose the VoxGS-DSDF branch that leverages deformed Gaussians to construct a dynamic sparse voxel grid, providing explicit geometric guidance to the implicit SDF field. This explicit anchoring effectively regularizes the volumetric rendering process, significantly improving surface reconstruction quality, with watertight boundaries and detailed representations. Quantitative and qualitative experiments demonstrate that DySurface significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in geometric accuracy metrics while maintaining competitive rendering performance.

AI.tldr: DySurface框架结合3D高斯和隐式SDF，通过动态体素网格正则化，解决了动态场景中几何表面重建的不一致性问题。
AI.motivation: 动态场景新视角合成（NVS）技术虽取得进展，但在重建时间一致的几何表面方面存在挑战。仅依赖光度优化会导致几何模糊、表面不连续和严重伪影。
AI.method: 提出DySurface框架，解决3DGS前向变形与体积SDF渲染所需后向变形的结构差异。通过VoxGS-DSDF分支利用变形高斯构建动态稀疏体素网格，为隐式SDF场提供显式几何约束。
AI.result: 实验表明DySurface在几何精度指标上显著优于现有基线方法，同时保持竞争性的渲染性能，实现了水密边界和细节表示的高质量表面重建。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效结合了显式高斯的表达能力和隐式SDF的几何保真度，通过显式锚定正则化体积渲染过程，显著提升了动态场景表面重建质量。

title: CellDX AI Autopilot: Agent-Guided Training and Deployment of Pathology Classifiers
summary: Training AI models for computational pathology currently requires access to expensive whole-slide-image datasets, GPU infrastructure, deep expertise in machine learning, and substantial engineering effort. We present CellDX AI Autopilot, a platform that lets users -- from pathologists with no ML background to ML practitioners running many parallel experiments -- train, evaluate, and deploy whole-slide image classifiers through natural language interaction with an AI agent. The platform provides a structured set of agent skills that guide the user through dataset curation, automated hyperparameter tuning, multi-strategy model comparison, and human-in-the-loop deployment, all on a pre-built dataset of over 32,000 cases and 66,000 H&E-stained whole-slide images with pre-extracted features. We describe the agent skill architecture, the underlying Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) training framework supporting four classification strategies, and an iterative pairwise hyperparameter search (grid or seeded random) that reduces tuning cost by over 30x compared to exhaustive search. CellDX AI Autopilot is, to our knowledge, the first system to expose pathology-specialized agent skills and a pathology-specialized training platform to general-purpose AI agents (e.g. any LLM-based agent runtime), delivering end-to-end automated model training without requiring the agent itself to be domain-specific. The platform addresses both the ML-expertise bottleneck that limits adoption in diagnostic pathology and the engineering bottleneck that limits how many experiments a researcher can run cost-effectively.

AI.tldr: CellDX AI Autopilot是一个通过自然语言交互让不同专业水平用户训练病理学AI模型的平台，内置3万余例病例数据集，提供自动化超参数调优和多策略模型比较，显著降低训练成本和技术门槛。
AI.motivation: 计算病理学AI模型训练面临着全切片图像数据集昂贵、GPU基础设施需求高、需要深厚机器学习专业知识和大量工程工作等多重障碍，这限制了病理学诊断的应用推广和研究人员的实验效率。
AI.method: 平台提供结构化的智能体技能架构，包括数据集管理、自动化超参数调优、多策略模型比较和人机交互部署，基于包含32,000多个病例和66,000个H&E染色全切片图像的预处理特征数据集，支持四种分类策略的多示例学习训练框架，采用迭代成对超参数搜索方法。
AI.result: 相比穷举搜索，超参数调优成本降低了30倍以上，成为首个向通用AI智能体（如基于LLM的智能体运行时）开放病理学专业技能和训练平台的系统，无需智能体本身具备领域专业知识即可实现端到端自动化模型训练。
AI.conclusion: 该平台有效解决了制约病理学诊断应用的机器学习专业知识瓶颈，以及限制研究人员经济高效运行实验数量的工程瓶颈，为计算病理学AI模型的民主化提供了重要基础设施。

title: Halo Separation-guided Underwater Multi-scale Image Restoration
summary: Underwater images captured by Autonomous Underwater Vehicles (AUVs) are inevitably affected by artificial light sources, which often produce halos in the foreground of the camera and seriously interfere with the quality of the image. The existing underwater image enhancement methods fail to fully consider this key problem, and the robustness of processing images under artificial light scenes is poor. In practical applications, since underwater image enhancement itself is a very challenging task, the influence of artificial light sources will lead to serious degradation of image performance and affect subsequent vision tasks. In order to effectively deal with this problem, this paper designs a single halo image correction method based on an iterative structure. The network is mainly divided into two sub-networks, one is the halo layer separation sub-network which aims to separate the halo by gradient minimization, and the other is the multi-scale recovery sub-network which aims to recover the image information masked by halo. The UIEB and EUVP synthetic datasets are used for training to ensure that the network can fully learn the characteristics and laws of underwater halo images. Then a large number of halo images taken in an underwater environment with real artificial light are collected for testing. In addition, the brightness distribution characteristics of underwater halo images are analyzed and the radial gradient is introduced to constraint eliminate halo to improve the effect of underwater image restoration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于迭代结构的水下光晕图像校正方法，通过光晕层分离和多尺度恢复两个子网络，有效处理自主水下航行器在人工光源下拍摄产生的光晕问题。
AI.motivation: 自主水下航行器(AUVs)在水下拍摄时，人工光源会在相机前景产生光晕，严重影响图像质量。现有水下图像增强方法未充分考虑这一关键问题，在人工光源场景下鲁棒性较差，影响后续视觉任务的性能。
AI.method: 设计基于迭代结构的单图像光晕校正方法，包含两个子网络：1)光晕层分离子网络，通过梯度最小化分离光晕；2)多尺度恢复子网络，恢复被光晕遮掩的图像信息。引入径向梯度约束消除光晕，在UIEB和EUVP合成数据集上训练，并收集真实人工光源环境下的光晕图像进行测试。
AI.result: 通过分析水下光晕图像的亮度分布特征，引入径向梯度约束改进光晕消除效果，在合成和真实水下光晕图像上都取得了良好的图像恢复性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了水下人工光源产生的光晕问题，提升了水下图像质量，为后续水下视觉任务提供了更好的输入图像。

title: SleepWalk: A Three-Tier Benchmark for Stress-Testing Instruction-Guided Vision-Language Navigation
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have advanced rapidly in multimodal perception and language understanding, yet it remains unclear whether they can reliably ground language into spatially coherent, plausibly executable actions in 3D digital environments. We introduce SleepWalk, a benchmark for evaluating instruction-grounded trajectory prediction in single-scene 3D worlds generated from textual scene descriptions and filtered for navigability. Unlike prior navigation benchmarks centered on long-range exploration across rooms, SleepWalk targets localized, interaction-centric embodied reasoning: given rendered visual observations and a natural-language instruction, a model must predict a trajectory that respects scene geometry, avoids collisions, and terminates at an action-compatible location. The benchmark covers diverse indoor and outdoor environments and organizes tasks into three tiers of spatial and temporal difficulty, enabling fine-grained analysis of grounding under increasing compositional complexity. Using a standardized pointwise judge-based evaluation protocol, we evaluate three frontier VLMs on 2,472 curated 3D environments with nine instructions per scene. Results reveal systematic failures in grounded spatial reasoning, especially under occlusion, interaction constraints, and multi-step instructions: performance drops as the difficulty level of the tasks increase. In general, current VLMs can somewhat produce trajectories that are simultaneously spatially coherent, plausibly executable, and aligned with intended actions. By exposing failures in a controlled yet scalable setting, SleepWalk provides a critical benchmark for advancing grounded multimodal reasoning, embodied planning, vision-language navigation, and action-capable agents in 3D environments.

AI.tldr: SleepWalk是一个评估视觉语言模型在3D环境中基于指令预测轨迹能力的基准测试，当前模型在空间推理方面存在系统性不足。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉语言模型在多模态感知方面进展迅速，但它们能否在3D数字环境中将语言可靠地转化为空间连贯且可执行的动作仍不明确。
AI.method: 构建了一个名为SleepWalk的基准测试，使用文本描述生成可导航的3D场景，要求模型根据视觉观察和自然语言指令预测符合场景几何、避免碰撞并在动作兼容位置终止的轨迹。采用分层任务设计和点级评判协议进行评估。
AI.result: 对三个前沿VLM在2,472个3D环境上的评估显示，模型在空间推理方面存在系统性失败，特别是在遮挡、交互约束和多步指令情况下，表现随任务难度增加而下降。
AI.conclusion: 当前VLM在同时生成空间连贯、可执行且与预期动作一致的轨迹方面能力有限，SleepWalk基准为推进3D环境中的基础多模态推理和具身规划提供了重要测试平台。

title: Temporal Sampling Frequency Matters: A Capacity-Aware Study of End-to-End Driving Trajectory Prediction
summary: End to end (E2E) autonomous driving trajectory prediction is often trained with camera frames sampled at the highest available temporal frequency, assuming that denser sampling improves performance. We question this assumption by treating temporal sampling frequency as an explicit training set design variable. Starting from high frequency E2E driving datasets, we construct frequency sweep training sets by temporally subsampling camera frames along each trajectory. For each model dataset pair, we train and evaluate the same model under a fixed protocol, so the frequency response reflects how prediction performance changes with sampling frequency. We analyze this response from a capacity aware perspective. Sparse sampling may miss driving relevant cues, while dense sampling may add redundant visual content and off manifold noise. For finite capacity models, this can create a driving irrelevant capacity burden. We evaluate three smaller E2E models and a larger VLA style AutoVLA model on Waymo, nuScenes, and PAVE. Results show model and dataset dependent frequency responses. Smaller E2E models often show non monotonic or near plateau trends and achieve their best 3 second ADE at lower or intermediate frequencies. In contrast, AutoVLA achieves its best 3 second ADE and FDE at the highest evaluated frequency on all three datasets. Iteration matched controls suggest that the advantage of lower or intermediate frequencies for smaller models is not explained only by unequal training update counts. These findings show that temporal sampling frequency should be reported and tuned, rather than fixed to the highest available value.

AI.tldr: 本研究质疑端到端自动驾驶轨迹预测中“越密集的时间采样越好”的假设，通过系统实验发现不同容量模型在最优时间采样频率上存在显著差异。
AI.motivation: 当前端到端自动驾驶轨迹预测通常默认使用最高频率进行训练和采样，这可能导致模型容量浪费和性能下降，需要系统研究时间采样频率对预测性能的影响。
