AI.method: 在Waymo、nuScenes和PAVE三个数据集上构建频率扫描训练集，通过时间子采样获得不同频率的数据，训练评估三个小型E2E模型和大型AutoVLA模型，分析不同采样频率下的预测性能变化。
AI.result: 小型E2E模型在较低或中等频率下达到最佳3秒ADE，呈非单调或平台趋势；AutoVLA模型在最高频率下表现最佳。研究发现模型和数据集依赖的频率响应，表明需要针对不同模型调整最优采样频率。
AI.conclusion: 时间采样频率应该作为重要的超参数进行报告和调优，而不是固定为最高可用值。不同容量的模型需要不同的最优采样策略，这对自动驾驶系统的设计和优化具有重要指导意义。

title: Sens-VisualNews: A Benchmark Dataset for Sensational Image Detection
comment: Authors' Accepted Version; Accepted at IEEE ICIP 2026
summary: The detection of sensational content in media items can be a critical filtering mechanism for identifying check-worthy content and flagging potential disinformation, since such content triggers physiological arousal that often bypasses critical evaluation and accelerates viral sharing. In this paper we introduce the task of sensational image detection, which aims to determine whether an image contains shocking, provocative, or emotionally charged features to grab attention and trigger strong emotional responses. To support research on this task, we create a new benchmark dataset (called Sens-VisualNews) that contains 9,576 images from news items, annotated based on the (in-)existence of various sensational concepts and events in their visual content. Finally, using Sens-VisualNews, we study the prompt sensitivity, performance and robustness of a wide range of open SotA Multimodal LLMs, across both zero-shot and fine-tuned settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了煽情图像检测任务，构建了包含9,576张新闻图像的Sens-VisualNews数据集，并评估了当前多模态大模型在该任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 煽情内容能够绕过批判性评估，加速病毒式传播，是识别值得核查内容和标记潜在虚假信息的关键过滤机制。
AI.method: 创建Sens-VisualNews基准数据集，对新闻图像的视觉内容是否包含各种煽情概念和事件进行标注，并在零样本和微调设置下测试多种开源多模态大模型的提示敏感性、性能和鲁棒性。
AI.result: 构建了包含9,576张图像的Sens-VisualNews数据集，系统评估了当前最先进多模态大模型在煽情图像检测任务上的表现。
AI.conclusion: 为煽情内容检测研究提供了新的任务定义和基准数据集，对多模态大模型在检测煽情视觉内容方面的能力进行了全面评估。

title: AnomalyClaw: A Universal Visual Anomaly Detection Agent via Tool-Grounded Refutation
comment: We release the agent, the benchmark, and the analysis artifacts at https://github.com/jam-cc/AnomalyClaw
summary: Visual anomaly detection (VAD) is crucial in many real-world fields, such as industrial inspection, medical imaging, infrastructure monitoring, and remote sensing. However, the specific anomaly definitions, data modalities, and annotation standards across different domains make it difficult to transfer single-domain trained VAD models. Vision-language models (VLMs), pre-trained on large-scale cross-domain data, can perform visual perception under task instructions, offering a promising solution for cross-domain VAD. However, single-inference VLM judgments are unreliable, since they rely more on prior knowledge than on normal-sample references or fine-grained feature evidence. We therefore present AnomalyClaw, a training-free VAD agent that turns anomaly judgment into a multi-round refutation process. In each round, the agent proposes candidate anomalies and refutes each against normal-sample references, drawing on a 13-tool library for visual verification, reference parsing, and frozen expert probing. On the CrossDomainVAD-12 benchmark (12 datasets), AnomalyClaw achieves consistent macro-AUROC improvements over single-step direct inference with +6.23 pp on GPT-5.5, +7.93 pp on Seed2.0-lite, and +3.52 pp on Qwen3.5-VL-27B. We further introduce an optional verbalized self-evolution extension. It builds an online rulebook from internal-branch disagreement without oracle labels. On Qwen3.5-VL-27B, it delivers a +2.09 pp mean gain, comparable to a K = 10 oracle-label supervised baseline (+1.99 pp). These results show that agentic refutation improve anomaly understanding and reasoning of VLMs, rather than merely aggregating tool outputs.

AI.tldr: AnomalyClaw是一种免训练的视觉异常检测代理，通过多轮反驳机制显著提升了跨域VAD性能，在12个数据集上获得平均6-8个百分点的AUROC提升。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉异常检测模型难以跨域迁移，而视觉语言模型进行单步推理判断时不可靠，过度依赖先验知识而非正常样本参考或细粒度特征证据。
AI.method: 提出AnomalyClaw代理框架，将异常判断转化为多轮反驳过程，每轮中代理提出候选异常并利用13个工具库进行视觉验证、参考解析和冻结专家探测来反驳每个候选。
AI.result: 在CrossDomainVAD-12基准测试中，AnomalyClaw相比单步直接推理在GPT-5.5、Seed2.0-lite和Qwen3.5-VL-27B上分别提升6.23、7.93和3.52个百分点的macro-AUROC；自进化扩展进一步带来2.09个百分点的平均增益。
AI.conclusion: 代理式反驳机制改善了VLM的异常理解和推理能力，而不仅仅是工具输出的聚合，为跨域视觉异常检测提供了一种有效解决方案。

title: Position: Life-Logging Video Streams Make the Privacy-Utility Trade-off Inevitable
summary: With the growing prevalence of always-on hardware such as smart glasses, body cameras, and home security systems, life-logging visual sensing is becoming inevitable, forming the backbone of persistent, always-on AI systems. Meanwhile, recent advances in proactive agents and world models signal a fundamental shift from episodic, prompt-driven tools to next-generation AI systems that continuously perceive and react to the physical world. Although life-logging video streams can substantially improve utility of these promising systems, they also introduce significant privacy risks by revealing sensitive information, such as behavioral patterns, emotional states, and social interactions, beyond what isolated images expose. If unresolved, these risks may undermine public trust and hinder the sustainable development of always-on AI technologies. Existing privacy protections are either attack-specific or incur substantial utility loss, and fail to consider the entire data exploitation pipeline. We therefore posit that the privacy-utility trade-off in life-logging video streams is a foundational challenge for next-generation AI systems that demands further investigation. We call for novel pipeline-aware privacy-preserving designs that jointly optimize utility and privacy for long-horizon life-logging visual data. In parallel, formal privacy leakage metrics and standardized benchmarks remain important open directions for future research.

AI.tldr: 随着全天候硬件的普及，生活记录视频流为下一代AI系统带来了巨大价值，但也引发了严重的隐私挑战。现有保护方法存在局限，需要开发新型管道感知的隐私保护设计。
AI.motivation: 智能眼镜、随身摄像头等全天候硬件的普及使生活记录视觉感知成为必然，这为持续感知和反应的AI系统提供了基础，但同时也带来了超越孤立图像的隐私风险，可能影响公众信任和AI技术的可持续发展。
AI.method: 论文提出了一个研究框架，强调需要考虑整个数据利用管道的隐私保护，而不是针对特定攻击的方法。呼吁开发新型管道感知的隐私保护设计，共同优化长期生活记录视频数据的效用和隐私。
AI.result: 研究发现现有隐私保护方法要么局限于特定攻击，要么造成显著的效用损失，无法满足生活记录视频流的隐私-效用平衡需求。这表明当前解决方案在应对这一基础性挑战方面存在不足。
AI.conclusion: 生活记录视频流的隐私-效用权衡是下一代AI系统的基本挑战，需要进一步研究。未来的重要研究方向包括管道感知的隐私保护设计、形式化的隐私泄漏度量标准以及标准化基准测试。

title: Progressive Photorealistic Simplification
summary: Existing image simplification techniques often rely on Non-Photorealistic Rendering (NPR), transforming photographs into stylized sketches, cartoons, or paintings. While effective at reducing visual complexity, such approaches typically sacrifice photographic realism. In this work, we explore a complementary direction: simplifying images while preserving their photorealistic appearance. We introduce progressive semantic image simplification, a framework that iteratively reduces scene complexity by removing and inpainting elements in a controlled manner. At each step, the resulting image remains a plausible natural photograph. Our method combines semantic understanding with generative editing, leveraging Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to identify and prioritize elements for removal, and a learned verifier to ensure photorealism and coherence throughout the process. This is implemented via an iterative Select-Remove-Verify pipeline that produces high-quality simplification trajectories. To improve efficiency, we further distill this process into an image-to-video generation model that directly predicts coherent simplification sequences from a single input image. Beyond generating cleaner and more focused compositions, our approach enables applications such as content-aware decluttering, semantic layer decomposition, and interactive editing. More broadly, our work suggests that simplification through structured content removal can serve as a practical mechanism for guiding visual interpretation within the photorealistic domain, complementing traditional abstraction methods.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种渐进式语义图像简化框架，能够在保持照片真实感的同时，通过迭代移除和修复场景元素来降低图像复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现有的图像简化技术通常依赖非真实感渲染(NPR)，虽然能降低视觉复杂度但会牺牲照片真实感。本文探索了在保持照片真实外观的前提下简化图像的补充方向。
AI.method: 结合语义理解与生成式编辑，利用视觉-语言模型(VLMs)识别并优先移除的元素，通过学习验证器确保整个过程的照片真实性和连贯性。实现迭代选择-移除-验证管道，进一步提炼为图像到视频生成模型。
AI.result: 能够产生高质量的简化轨迹，生成更干净、更专注的构图，支持内容感知去杂、语义层分解和交互式编辑等应用。
AI.conclusion: 通过结构化内容移除的简化机制可以在照片真实域中指导视觉解释，是对传统抽象方法的有效补充，为图像编辑和理解提供了新的解决思路。

title: CoWorld-VLA: Thinking in a Multi-Expert World Model for Autonomous Driving
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have emerged as a promising paradigm for end-to-end autonomous driving. However, existing reasoning mechanisms still struggle to provide planning-oriented intermediate representations: textual Chain-of-Thought (CoT) fails to preserve continuous spatiotemporal structure, while latent world reasoning remains difficult to use as a direct condition for action generation. In this paper, we propose CoWorld-VLA, a multi-expert world reasoning framework for autonomous driving, where world representations serve as explicit conditions to guide action planning. CoWorld-VLA extracts complementary world information through multi-source supervision and encodes it into expert tokens within the VLA, thereby providing planner-accessible conditioning signals. Specifically, we construct four types of tokens: semantic interaction, geometric structure, dynamic evolution, and ego trajectory tokens, which respectively model interaction intent, spatial structure, future temporal dynamics, and behavioral goals. During action generation, CoWorld-VLA employs a diffusion-based hierarchical multi-expert fusion planner, which is coupled with scene context throughout the joint denoising process to generate continuous ego trajectories. Experiments show that CoWorld-VLA achieves competitive results in both future scene generation and planning on the NAVSIM v1 benchmark, demonstrating strong performance in collision avoidance and trajectory accuracy. Ablation studies further validate the complementarity of expert tokens and their effectiveness as planning conditions for action generation. Code will be available at https://github.com/potatochip1211/CoWorld-VLA.

AI.tldr: CoWorld-VLA是一个多专家世界推理框架，通过语义交互、几何结构、动态演化和自车轨迹四种专家标记作为显式条件，指导自动驾驶动作规划。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型推理机制存在缺陷：文本思维链无法保持连续时空结构，潜在世界推理难以直接作为动作生成条件，需要提供规划导向的中间表示。
AI.method: 构建四种专家标记（语义交互、几何结构、动态演化、自车轨迹），通过多源监督提取互补世界信息，采用基于扩散的分层多专家融合规划器进行联合去噪生成连续轨迹。
AI.result: 在NAVSIM v1基准测试中，CoWorld-VLA在未来场景生成和规划任务上取得竞争性结果，在避碰和轨迹精度方面表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 专家标记的互补性得到验证，证明其作为动作生成规划条件的有效性，为端到端自动驾驶提供了一种新的推理范式。

title: WorldReasonBench: Human-Aligned Stress Testing of Video Generators as Future World-State Predictors
summary: Commercial video generation systems such as Seedance2.0 and Veo3.1 have rapidly improved, strengthening the view that video generators may be evolving into "world simulators." Yet the community still lacks a benchmark that directly tests whether a model can reason about how an observed world should evolve over time. We introduce WorldReasonBench, which reframes video generation evaluation as world-state prediction: given an initial state and an action, can a model generate a future video whose state evolution remains physically, socially, logically, and informationally consistent? WorldReasonBench contains 436 curated test cases with structured ground-truth QA annotations spanning four reasoning dimensions and 22 subcategories. We evaluate generated videos with a human-aligned two-part methodology: Process-aware Reasoning Verification uses structured QA and reasoning-phase diagnostics to detect temporal and causal failures, while Multi-dimensional Quality Assessment scores reasoning quality, temporal consistency, and visual aesthetics for ranking and reward modeling. We further introduce WorldRewardBench, a preference benchmark with approximately 6K expert-annotated pairs over 1.4K videos, supporting pair-wise and point-wise reward-model evaluation. Across modern video generators, our results expose a persistent gap between visual plausibility and world reasoning: videos can look convincing while failing dynamics, causality, or information preservation. We will release our benchmarks and evaluation toolkit to support community research on genuinely world-aware video generation at https://github.com/UniX-AI-Lab/WorldReasonBench/.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了WorldReasonBench，一个将视频生成重新定义为世界状态预测的评测基准，通过评估模型在物理、社交、逻辑和信息维度上的推理能力，揭示了当前视频生成器在视觉逼真度与世界推理之间存在显著差距。
AI.motivation: 随着商业视频生成系统的快速发展，社区缺乏直接测试模型推理能力（即观察到的世界应如何随时间演化）的评测基准。现有模型可能生成视觉上逼真但世界推理错误的视频。
AI.method: 构建了包含436个测试案例的WorldReasonBench评测基准，涵盖四个推理维度和22个子类别。采用两阶段评估方法：基于结构化QA的流程感知推理验证和多维度质量评估。同时开发了WorldRewardBench偏好基准，包含约6K专家标注的配对数据。
AI.result: 评测结果显示，现代视频生成器在视觉逼真度与世界推理之间存在持续性差距，视频可能外观逼真但在动力学、因果性或信息保持方面表现不佳。
AI.conclusion: 论文揭示了当前视频生成模型的核心缺陷：它们擅长生成视觉上合理的画面，但缺乏真正的世界理解和推理能力。研究团队将开源评测基准和工具包，推动社区发展具有真正世界感知能力的视频生成技术。

title: Filtering Memorization from Parameter-Space in Diffusion Models
summary: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has become a widely used mechanism for customizing diffusion models, enabling users to inject new visual concepts or styles through lightweight parameter updates. However, LoRAs can memorize training images, causing generated outputs to reproduce copyrighted or sensitive content. This risk is particularly concerning in LoRA-sharing ecosystems, where users distribute trained LoRAs without releasing the underlying training data. Existing approaches for mitigating memorization rely on access to the training pipeline, training data, or control over the inference process, making them difficult to apply when only the released LoRA weights are available. We propose \textbf{Base-Anchored Filtering (BAF)}, a training-free and data-free framework for post-hoc memorization mitigation in diffusion LoRAs. BAF decomposes LoRA updates into spectral channels and measures their alignment with the principal subspace of the pretrained backbone. Channels strongly aligned with this subspace are retained as generalizable adaptations, while weakly aligned channels are suppressed as potential carriers of memorized content. Experiments on multiple datasets and diffusion backbones demonstrate that BAF consistently reduces memorization while preserving or even improving generation quality. Our code is available in the supplementary material.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需训练和数据的训练后过滤方法BAF，通过分析LoRA权重与预训练主子空间的对齐程度来过滤记忆化内容，有效降低版权风险同时保持生成质量。
AI.motivation: LoRA技术在扩散模型定制中广泛应用，但存在记忆训练图像的问题，可能导致生成包含版权或敏感内容。现有方法需要训练数据或控制推理过程，难以应用于仅有权重文件的场景。
AI.method: Base-Anchored Filtering (BAF)框架将LoRA更新分解为谱通道，测量各通道与预训练主干主子空间的对齐程度。保留强对齐通道作为可泛化适应，抑制弱对齐通道作为潜在记忆化载体。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和扩散主干上的实验表明，BAF能持续减少记忆化现象，同时保持甚至改善生成质量。
AI.conclusion: BAF为LoRA共享生态提供了一种实用的后处理记忆化缓解方案，无需训练数据和重新训练，为扩散模型的定制化应用提供了更安全的保障。

title: Uni-Synergy: Bridging Understanding and Generation for Personalized Reasoning via Co-operative Reinforcement Learning
summary: Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) excel in general tasks but struggle to bridge the gap between personalized understanding and generation. Prior works largely rely on implicit token-level alignment via supervised fine-tuning, which fails to fully capture the potential synergy between comprehension and creation. In this work, we propose Sync-R1, an end-to-end reinforcement learning framework that jointly optimizes personalized understanding and generation within a single, explicit reasoning loop. Through this unified feedback process, Sync-R1 enables personalized comprehension to guide content creation, while the resulting generation quality reciprocally refines understanding within an integrated reward landscape. To efficiently orchestrate this dual-task synergy, we introduce Sync-GRPO, a reinforcement learning method utilizing an ensemble reward system. Furthermore, we propose Dynamic Group Scaling (DGS), which adaptively filters low-potential trajectories to reduce gradient variance and accelerate convergence. To better reflect real-world complexity, we introduce UnifyBench++, featuring denser textual descriptions and richer user contexts. Experimental results demonstrate that Sync-R1 achieves state-of-the-art performance, showcasing superior cross-task reasoning and robust personalization without requiring complex cold-start procedures. The code and the UnifyBench++ dataset will be released at: https://github.com/arctanxarc/UniCTokens.

AI.tldr: Sync-R1是一个端到端强化学习框架，通过统一的推理循环联合优化个性化理解和生成任务，实现了跨任务协同和强大的个性化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的统一多模态模型在个性化理解和生成之间存在鸿沟，主要依靠隐式token级对齐，无法充分捕获理解与创造之间的协同效应。
AI.method: 提出Sync-R1框架，在单一显式推理循环中联合优化理解和生成；引入Sync-GRPO方法利用集成奖励系统；设计Dynamic Group Scaling (DGS)动态过滤低潜力轨迹；构建UnifyBench++数据集。
AI.result: 实验结果表明Sync-R1达到最先进性能，展现出卓越的跨任务推理和鲁棒个性化能力，且无需复杂的冷启动程序。
AI.conclusion: 通过端到端的强化学习框架统一了个性化理解和生成任务，实现了理解与生成的双向促进，为统一多模态模型的个性化应用提供了有效解决方案。

title: Automated high-frequency quantification of fish communities and biomass using computer vision
comment: 21 pages, 3 figures, supplementary information under Ancillary files
summary: Quantifying fish community structure is essential for understanding biodiversity and ecosystem responses in a changing environment, yet existing survey methods provide limited high-frequency, quantitative observations. Conventional approaches, including catch-based methods, underwater visual censuses, and environmental DNA metabarcoding, either require intensive labor or lack reliable estimates of abundance and biomass. Here, we develop an automated framework for quantifying fish communities from underwater video using computer vision. Using videos acquired with a custom-made stereo camera system, the framework integrates deep learning-based fish identification, multi-object tracking, and 3D reconstruction to estimate species-level abundance and biomass. We applied the approach to a reef fish community over a 20-day period with hourly daytime observations, revealing dynamic fluctuations in species richness, abundance, and biomass associated with changes in species composition. By comparing fish communities estimated from visual census and environmental DNA surveys, we demonstrate that our method provides complementary strengths for continuous, non-invasive, and quantitative monitoring of consistently observed species. This approach provides a scalable foundation for long-term monitoring and advances the capacity to resolve fine-scale temporal dynamics in fish communities.

AI.tldr: 本研究开发了一个基于计算机视觉的自动化框架，通过水下视频定量分析鱼类群落结构，实现了对物种丰度和生物量的高频监测。
AI.motivation: 传统的鱼类调查方法（基于渔获、水下视觉普查、环境DNA）要么需要大量人力，要么缺乏可靠的丰度和生物量估计，无法满足对环境变化下生态系统的长期、高频监测需求。
AI.method: 使用自制立体摄像系统获取视频，结合深度学习鱼类识别、多目标跟踪和3D重建技术，构建自动化分析框架，精确估计物种级别的丰度和生物量。
AI.result: 在20天期间每小时进行日间观察，揭示了物种丰富度、丰度和生物量的动态波动变化。与视觉普查和环境DNA方法比较表明，该方法为连续、非侵入性、定量监测提供了互补优势。
AI.conclusion: 该自动化视频分析框架为长期生态监测提供了可扩展的基础，显著提升了解析鱼类群落细尺度时间动态的能力，是环境变化研究的重要工具。

title: Automated Detection of Abnormalities in Zebrafish Development
summary: Zebrafish embryos are a valuable model for drug discovery due to their optical transparency and genetic similarity to humans. However, current evaluations rely on manual inspection, which is costly and labor-intensive. While machine learning offers automation potential, progress is limited by the lack of comprehensive datasets. To address this, we introduce a large-scale dataset of high-resolution microscopic image sequences capturing zebrafish embryonic development under both control conditions and exposure to compounds (3,4-dichloroaniline). This dataset, with expert annotations at fine-grained temporal levels, supports two benchmarking tasks: (1) fertility classification, assessing zebrafish egg viability (130,368 images), and (2) toxicity assessment, detecting malformations induced by toxic exposure over time (55,296 images). Alongside the dataset, we present the first transformer-based baseline model that integrates spatiotemporal features to predict developmental abnormalities at early stages. Experimental results present the model's effectiveness, achieving 98% accuracy in fertility classification and 92% in toxicity assessment. These findings underscore the potential of automated approaches to enhance zebrafish-based toxicity analysis.

AI.tldr: 本研究构建了斑马鱼胚胎发育的大规模数据集，并提出了基于Transformer的时空特征模型，实现了受精性分类和毒性评估的自动化分析。
AI.motivation: 斑马鱼胚胎因其光学透明性和与人类的遗传相似性成为药物发现的重要模型，但当前依赖人工检查的评估方式成本高、劳动强度大。机器学习虽有自动化潜力，但受限于缺乏全面数据集。
AI.method: 构建包含对照组和化合物暴露组的高分辨率显微图像序列数据集，提供细粒度时间级别的专家标注；设计基于Transformer的基线模型，整合时空特征来预测发育异常。数据集支持受精性分类(130,368张图像)和毒性评估(55,296张图像)两个基准任务。
AI.result: 提出的模型表现出色：受精性分类准确率达98%，毒性评估准确率达92%，证明了自动化方法在斑马鱼毒性分析中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过大规模数据集和有效的深度学习模型，为斑马鱼胚胎发育的高效自动评估提供了新工具，有望显著提升药物筛选和毒性分析的效率。

title: Adaptive Context Matters: Towards Provable Multi-Modality Guidance for Super-Resolution
summary: Super-resolution (SR) is a severely ill-posed problem with inherent ambiguity, as widely recognized in both empirical and theoretical studies. Although recent semantic-guided and multi-modal SR methods exploit large models or external priors to enhance semantic alignment, the fusion of heterogeneous modalities remains insufficiently understood in practice and theory. In this work, we provide the first theoretical modeling of multi-modal SR, revealing that prior methods are bottlenecked by sub-optimal modality utilization. Our analysis shows that the generalization risk bound can be improved by strengthening the alignment between modality weights and their effective contributions, while reducing representation complexity. This theoretical insight inspires us to propose the novel Multi-Modal Mixture-of-Experts Super-Resolution framework (M$^3$ESR) that employs generalization-oriented dynamic modality fusion for accurate risk control and modality contribution optimization. In detail, we propose a novel spatially dynamic modality weighting module and a temporally adaptive modality temperature scheduling mechanism, enabling flexible and adaptive spatial-temporal modality weighting for effective risk control. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our M$^3$ESR significantly boosts generalization and semantic consistency performances, which confirms our superiority.

AI.tldr: 本文首次对多模态超分辨率进行了理论建模，发现现有方法受限于次优的模态利用，并提出了M³ESR框架来优化模态融合并提升泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 超分辨率是固有模糊的病态问题，虽然现有的语义引导和多模态SR方法利用大模型或外部先验来增强语义对齐，但在实践中和理论上对异构模态融合的理解仍不充分。
AI.method: 提出了多模态混合专家超分辨率框架(M³ESR)，采用面向泛化的动态模态融合进行准确的风险控制和模态贡献优化。具体包括空间动态模态权重模块和时间自适应模态温度调度机制。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，M³ESR显著提升了泛化性能和语义一致性，验证了方法的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论分析揭示了改进泛化风险边界的关键在于加强模态权重与其有效贡献的对齐并降低表示复杂度，基于此提出的M³ESR框架在多模态SR任务中取得了显著性能提升。

title: OpenSGA: Efficient 3D Scene Graph Alignment in the Open World
summary: Scene graph alignment establishes object correspondences between two 3D scene graphs constructed from partially overlapping observations. This enables efficient scene understanding and object-level relocalization when a robot revisits a place, as well as global map fusion across multiple agents. Such capabilities are essential for robots that require long-term memory for long-horizon tasks involving interactions with the environment. Existing approaches mainly focus on subscan-to-subscan (S2S) alignment and depend heavily on geometric point-cloud features, leaving frame-to-scan (F2S) alignment and open-set vision-language features underexplored. In addition, existing datasets for scene graph alignment remain small-scale with limited object diversity, constraining systematic training and evaluation. We present a unified and efficient scene graph alignment framework that predicts object correspondences by fusing vision-language, textual, and geometric features with spatial context. The framework comprises modules such as a distance-gated spatial attention encoder, a minimum-cost-flow-based allocator, and a global scene embedding generator to achieve accurate alignment even under large coordinate discrepancies. We further introduce ScanNet-SG, a large-scale dataset generated via an automated annotation pipeline with over 700k samples, covering 509 object categories from ScanNet labels and over 3k categories from GPT-4o-based tagging. Experiments show that our method achieves the best overall performance on both F2S and S2S tasks, substantially outperforming existing scene graph alignment methods. Our code and dataset are released at: https://autonomousrobots.nl/paper_websites/opensga.

AI.tldr: 本文提出统一的场景图对齐框架，融合视觉语言、文本和几何特征，并发布大规模数据集ScanNet-SG，在F2S和S2S任务上取得最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有场景图对齐方法主要关注子扫描到子扫描(S2S)对齐，严重依赖几何点云特征，忽略了帧到扫描(F2S)对齐和开放集视觉语言特征。同时现有数据集规模小、物体多样性有限，制约了系统训练和评估。机器人需要长期记忆来完成涉及环境交互的长期任务。
AI.method: 提出统一高效的场景图对齐框架，通过距离门控空间注意力编码器、基于最小成本流的分配器和全局场景嵌入生成器模块，融合视觉语言、文本和几何特征与空间上下文来预测物体对应关系。开发自动化标注管道生成大规模ScanNet-SG数据集。
AI.result: 在F2S和S2S任务上均取得最佳整体性能，显著优于现有场景图对齐方法。ScanNet-SG数据集包含超70万个样本，涵盖ScanNet标签的509个物体类别和基于GPT-4o标注的超3000个类别。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了大规模坐标差异下的准确对齐问题，填补了F2S对齐和开放集视觉语言特征研究的空白。大规模数据集的发布为场景图对齐研究提供了重要资源，推动了机器人在长期任务中的场景理解和物体级重定位能力。

title: M$^2$E-UAV: A Benchmark and Analysis for Onboard Motion-on-Motion Event-Based Tiny UAV Detection
summary: Tiny UAV detection from an onboard event camera is difficult when the observer and target move at the same time. In this motion-on-motion regime, ego-motion activates background edges across buildings, vegetation, and horizon structures, while the UAV may appear as a sparse event cluster. To explore this practical problem, we present M$^2$E-UAV, a benchmark and analysis setup for onboard motion-on-motion event-based tiny UAV detection. The processed M$^2$E-UAV benchmark contains 87,223 training samples and 21,395 validation samples across four scene families: sunny building-forest, sunny farm-village, sunset building-forest, and sunset farm-village. We provide M$^2$E-Point, a point-based event baseline, and M$^2$E-Point + IMU, an IMU-conditioned variant, to analyze the role of inertial cues under onboard motion-on-motion detection. M$^2$E-Point encodes events as $[x,y,t,p]$ point sets, extracts local event structure with EdgeConv, and predicts event-level UAV foreground scores, from which bounding boxes are derived via DBSCAN. Our validation-stage analysis shows that point-based event modeling is a strong baseline, while simple IMU conditioning provides only marginal aggregate gains. Under the train/validation split, M$^2$E-Point achieves 0.9673 F1 and 0.5501 mAP50-95, while the IMU-conditioned variant reaches 0.5561 mAP50-95 with only marginal aggregate changes, serving as an initial baseline for future exploration in this domain. Code will be ready in https://github.com/Wickyan/M2E-UAV.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了M²E-UAV基准数据集用于机载运动-运动事件相机下的小型无人机检测，包含超过10万样本，并开发了基于点的检测基线方法。
AI.motivation: 机载事件相机检测小型无人机面临运动-运动双重挑战：载体自运动激活背景边缘事件，而无人机目标呈现稀疏事件簇，现有方法难以处理这一实际场景。
AI.method: 构建包含87,223个训练样本和21,395个验证样本的M²E-UAV基准，覆盖四种场景；提出M²E-Point将事件编码为[x,y,t,p]点集，使用EdgeConv提取局部结构，通过DBSCAN生成边界框；设计M²E-Point+IMU融合惯性测量单元信息。
AI.result: M²E-Point基线方法达到0.9673 F1分数和0.5501 mAP50-95；IMU条件变体仅带来边际提升至0.5561 mAP50-95，证明点建模是强基线而简单IMU融合效果有限。
AI.conclusion: 点事件建模在机载运动-运动无人机检测中是有效基线，但惯性传感器的简单融合策略提升有限，为该领域后续研究提供了基准和方向。

title: Simultaneous Long-tailed Recognition and Multi-modal Fusion for Highly Imbalanced Multi-modal Data
summary: Long-tailed distributions in class-imbalanced data present a fundamental challenge for deep learning models, which tend to be biased toward majority classes. While recent methods for long-tailed recognition have mitigated this issue, they are largely restricted to single-modal inputs and cannot fully exploit complementary information from diverse data sources. In this work, we introduce a new framework for long-tailed recognition that explicitly handles multi-modal inputs. Our approach extends multi-expert architectures to the multi-modal setting by fusing heterogeneous data into a unified representation while leveraging modality-specific networks to estimate the informativeness of each modality. These confidence-guided weights dynamically modulate the fusion process, ensuring that more informative modalities contribute more strongly to the final decision. To further enhance performance, we design specialized training and test procedures that accommodate diverse modality combinations, including images and tabular data. Extensive experiments on benchmark and real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed approach not only effectively integrates multi-modal information but also outperforms existing methods in handling long-tailed, class-imbalanced scenarios, highlighting its robustness and generalization capability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种处理多模态输入的长尾识别框架，通过融合异构数据并利用模态特定的置信度权重动态调节融合过程，在长尾类别不平衡场景下超越了现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的长尾识别方法主要局限于单模态输入，无法充分利用多数据源的互补信息。在处理真实世界的长尾分布、类别不平衡数据时，这种限制影响了模型的性能。
AI.method: 扩展多专家架构到多模态设置，将异构数据融合为统一表示；使用模态特定网络评估各模态的信息量；基于置信度权重动态调节融合过程，确保信息量更大的模态贡献更强；设计了专门的训练和测试流程以适应图像和表格数据等多种模态组合。
AI.result: 在基准数据集和真实世界数据集上的广泛实验表明，所提方法不仅能有效整合多模态信息，而且在处理长尾、类别不平衡场景时表现优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架证明了在多模态长尾识别中的有效性和鲁棒性，具有良好的泛化能力，为解决类别不平衡问题提供了新的技术路径。

title: DuetFair: Coupling Inter- and Intra-Subgroup Robustness for Fair Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Medical image segmentation models can perform unevenly across subgroups. Most existing fairness methods focus on improving average subgroup performance, implicitly treating each subgroup as internally homogeneous. However, this can hide difficult cases within a subgroup, where high-loss samples are obscured by the subgroup mean. We call this problem \textbf{intra-group hidden failure}. To solve this, we propose \textbf{DuetFair} mechanism, a dual-axis fairness framework that jointly considers inter-subgroup adaptation and intra-subgroup robustness. Based on DuetFair, we introduce \textbf{FairDRO}, which combines distribution-aware mixture-of-experts (dMoE) with subgroup-conditioned distributionally robust optimization (DRO) loss aggregation. This design allows the model to adapt across subgroups while also reducing hidden failures within each subgroup. We evaluate FairDRO on three medical image segmentation benchmarks with varying degrees of within-group heterogeneity. FairDRO achieves the best equity-scaled performance on Harvard-FairSeg and improves worst-case subgroup performance on HAM10000 under both age- and race-based grouping schemes. On the 3D radiotherapy target cohort, FairDRO further improves worst-group Dice by 3.5 points ($\uparrow 6.0\%$) under the tumor-stage grouping and by 4.1 points ($\uparrow 7.4\%$) under the institution grouping over the strongest baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DuetFair机制和FairDRO方法，解决医学图像分割中的组内隐藏失效问题，在三个基准数据集上显著提升了公平性性能。
AI.motivation: 现有公平性方法主要关注提升亚组平均性能，忽略了亚组内部的高损失样本（隐藏失效），导致性能评估不全面，影响模型在实际临床应用中的可靠性。
AI.method: 提出双轴公平框架DuetFair，结合分布感知混合专家模型(dMoE)和基于亚组的分布鲁棒优化(DRO)，实现跨亚组适应和亚组内鲁棒性的联合优化。
AI.result: 在Harvard-FairSeg、HAM10000和3D放疗目标队列三个数据集上，FairDRO均显著优于基线方法，最差亚组性能提升6.0%-7.4%，证明了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DuetFair框架成功解决了医学图像分割中的组内隐藏失效问题，FairDRO为提升模型公平性提供了有效解决方案，具有重要临床应用价值。

title: Improving Human Image Animation via Semantic Representation Alignment
summary: The field of image-to-video generation has made remarkable progress. However, challenges such as human limb twisting and facial distortion persist, especially when generating long videos or modeling intensive motions. Existing human image animation works address these issues by incorporating human-specific semantic representations, e.g., dense poses or ID embeddings, as additional conditions. However, conditioning on these representations could decrease the generation flexibility. Moreover, their reliance on RGB pixel supervision also lacks emphasis on learning necessary 3D geometric relationships and temporal coherence. In contrast, we introduce a novel approach named SemanticREPA that leverages these semantic representations as supervision signals through representation alignment. Specifically, we begin by training a structure alignment module that aligns the structure representations obtained from video latents with video depth estimation features. We then fix the pretrained module, and utilize it to provide additional supervision on the structure representations of the diffusion models, achieving structure rectification to generate coherent and stable human structures. Simultaneously, we develop an ID alignment module to align the ID representations of the generated videos to face recognition features. We further propose to use the predicted structure representations to refine identity restoration in relevant regions. With structure and ID alignment, our method demonstrates superior quality on extended character motions and enhanced character consistency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SemanticREPA方法，通过表示对齐技术将人体语义表示作为监督信号，而非条件输入，提升了图像到视频生成的质量和一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有图像到视频生成方法在生成长视频和密集运动时存在人体肢体扭曲、面部失真等问题。当前解决方案将语义表示作为条件输入会降低生成灵活性，且RGB像素监督缺乏对3D几何关系和时间连贯性的学习。
AI.method: 该方法包含两个核心模块：1）结构对齐模块，将视频潜在表示与深度估计特征对齐，实现结构校正；2）ID对齐模块，将生成视频的身份表示与人脸识别特征对齐，并使用预测的结构表示优化相关区域的身份恢复。
AI.result: 该方法在长角色运动生成和角色一致性方面表现出色，能够生成连贯稳定的人体结构，有效解决了肢体扭曲和面部失真问题。
AI.conclusion: 通过将语义表示作为监督信号而非条件输入，SemanticREPA在保持生成灵活性的同时，显著提升了图像到视频生成的质量，特别是在人体运动的连贯性和身份一致性方面取得了突破性进展。

title: GemDepth: Geometry-Embedded Features for 3D-Consistent Video Depth
summary: Video depth estimation extends monocular prediction into the temporal domain to ensure coherence. However, existing methods often suffer from spatial blurring in fine-detail regions and temporal inconsistencies. We argue that current approaches, which primarily rely on temporal smoothing via Transformers, struggle to maintain strict 3D geometric consistency-particularly under rotations or drastic view changes. To address this, we propose GemDepth, a framework built on the insight that an explicit awareness of camera motion and global 3D structure is a prerequisite for 3D consistency. Distinctively, GemDepth introduces a Geometry-Embedding Module (GEM) that predicts inter-frame camera poses to generate implicit geometric embeddings. This injection of motion priors equips the network with intrinsic 3D perception and alignment capabilities. Guided by these geometric cues, our Alternating Spatio-Temporal Transformer (ASTT) captures latent point-level correspondences to simultaneously enhance spatial precision for sharp details and enforce rigorous temporal consistency. Furthermore, GemDepth employs a data-efficient training strategy, effectively bridging the gap between high efficiency and robust geometric consistency. As shown in Fig.2, comprehensive evaluations demonstrate that GemDepth achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple datasets, particularly in complex dynamic scenarios. The code is publicly available at: https://github.com/Yuecheng919/GemDepth

AI.tldr: GemDepth是一种视频深度估计框架，通过显式建模相机运动和全局3D结构，解决了现有方法在细节模糊和时序不一致方面的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频深度估计方法主要依赖Transformer进行时间平滑，但在旋转或剧烈视角变化下难以保持严格的3D几何一致性，导致细节模糊和时序不一致。
AI.method: 提出GemDepth框架，包含几何嵌入模块(GEM)预测帧间相机位姿生成隐式几何嵌入，以及交替时空Transformer(ASTT)利用这些几何线索捕获点级对应关系，同时提升空间精度和时间一致性。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上达到最先进性能，特别是在复杂动态场景中表现突出，实现了高效的训练策略并保持强健的几何一致性。
AI.conclusion: 显式感知相机运动和全局3D结构是实现3D一致性的前提，GemDepth通过几何先验注入成功解决了视频深度估计中的关键挑战。

title: TIE: Time Interval Encoding for Video Generation over Events
summary: Director-style prompting, robotic action prediction, and interactive video agents demand temporal grounding over concurrent events -- a regime in which 68% of general clips and over 99% of robotics/gameplay clips contain overlapping events, yet existing multi-event generators rest on a single-active-prompt assumption. However, modern video generators, such as Diffusion Transformers (DiT), represent time as discrete points through point-wise positional encodings. This formulation creates a fundamental dimension mismatch: temporally extended intervals and overlapping events are mathematically unrepresentable to the attention mechanism. In this paper, we propose Time Interval Encoding (TIE), a principled, plug-and-play interval-aware generalization of rotary embeddings that elevates time intervals to first-class primitives inside DiT cross-attention. Rather than introducing another heuristic interval embedding, we show that, within RoPE-compatible bilinear attention, TIE is characterized by two basic principles: Temporal Integrability, which requires an event to aggregate positional evidence over its full duration, and Duration Invariance, which removes the trivial bias toward longer intervals. Under a uniform kernel, this characterization yields an efficient closed-form sinc-based solution that preserves the standard attention interface and naturally attenuates boundary noise through interval integration. Empirically, TIE preserves the visual quality of the base DiT model while substantially improving temporal controllability. In our experiments on the OmniEvents dataset, it improves human-verified Temporal Constraint Satisfaction Rate from 77.34% to 96.03% and reduces temporal boundary error from 0.261s to 0.073s, while also improving trajectory-level temporal alignment metrics. The code and dataset are available at https://github.com/MatrixTeam-AI/TIE.

AI.tldr: 提出时间间隔编码(TIE)，一种用于DiT视频生成器的插件式方法，解决并发事件时间定位问题，将时间间隔提升为一阶原语，显著提升时间控制精度。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成器基于单活动事件假设，但实际68%的通用片段和99%的机器人/游戏片段包含重叠事件。DiT的点式位置编码机制无法表示时间扩展间隔和重叠事件，存在根本性维度不匹配。
AI.method: TIE作为旋转嵌入的间隔感知推广，在DiT交叉注意力中将时间间隔作为一阶原语。基于时间可积性(事件聚集完整持续时间的位置证据)和持续时间不变性(消除对较长间隔的简单偏差)两个原则，导出高效的闭式sinc解法。
AI.result: 在OmniEvents数据集上，人类验证的时间约束满足率从77.34%提升至96.03%，时间边界误差从0.261s降至0.073s，同时保持基础DiT模型的视觉质量并改善轨迹级时间对齐指标。
AI.conclusion: TIE为并发事件的时间定位提供了原则性解决方案，通过间隔积分自然衰减边界噪声，保留标准注意力接口，实现了视频生成中时间控制能力的实质性提升。

title: EnergyLens: Interpretable Closed-Form Energy Models for Multimodal LLM Inference Serving
summary: As large language models span dense, mixture-of-experts, and state-space architectures and are deployed on heterogeneous accelerators under increasingly diverse multimodal workloads, optimising inference energy has become as critical as optimizing latency and throughput. Existing approaches either treat latency as an energy proxy or rely on data-hungry black-box surrogates. Both fail under varying parallelism strategies: latency and energy optima diverge in over 20% of configurations we tested, and black-box surrogates require hundreds of profiling samples to generalize across model families and hardware. We present EnergyLens, which uses symbolic regression as a structure-discovery tool over profiling data to derive a single twelve-parameter closed-form energy model expressed in terms of system properties such as degree of parallelism, batch size, and sequence length. Unlike black-box surrogates, EnergyLens decouples tensor and pipeline parallelism contributions and separates prefill from decode energy, making its predictions physically interpretable and actionable. Fitted from as few as 50 profiling measurements, EnergyLens achieves 88.2% Top-1 configuration selection accuracy across many evaluation scenarios compared to 60.9% for the closest prior analytical baseline, matches the predictive accuracy of ensemble ML methods with 10x fewer profiling samples, and extrapolates reliably to unseen batch sizes and hardware platforms without structural modification, making it a practical, interpretable tool for energy-optimal LLM deployment.

AI.tldr: EnergyLens提出了一种基于符号回归的方法，用12个参数的闭式模型精确预测LLM推理能耗，仅需50个样本就能达到88.2%的配置选择准确率。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型架构多样化（密集、专家混合、状态空间）和部署环境复杂化，现有能耗优化方法存在严重缺陷：要么将延迟作为能耗代理（20%配置下两者最优解不一致），要么依赖数据饥渴的黑盒替代模型，无法有效处理不同并行策略下的能耗优化。
AI.method: EnergyLens采用符号回归作为结构发现工具，从分析数据中推导出包含12个参数的闭式能耗模型，模型明确考虑并行度、批大小、序列长度等系统属性，并解耦了张量并行与流水线并行的贡献，分离了预填充与解码阶段的能耗。
AI.result: 仅用50个分析样本，EnergyLens在多种评估场景下实现88.2%的Top-1配置选择准确率，相比最接近的分析基线提升27.3个百分点；用10倍少的数据就能达到集成机器学习方法的预测精度；能够可靠外推到未见过的批大小和硬件平台。
AI.conclusion: EnergyLens为LLM的能耗最优部署提供了一个实用且可解释的工具，其模型具有物理意义和可操作性，避免了黑盒方法的缺点，在保持预测精度的同时大幅降低了分析成本。

title: DeepSight: Long-Horizon World Modeling via Latent States Prediction for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
summary: End-to-end autonomous driving systems are increasingly integrating Vision-Language Model (VLM) architectures, incorporating text reasoning or visual reasoning to enhance the robustness and accuracy of driving decisions. However, the reasoning mechanisms employed in most methods are direct adaptations from general domains, lacking in-depth exploration tailored to autonomous driving scenarios, particularly within visual reasoning modules. In this paper, we propose a driving world model that performs parallel prediction of latent semantic features for consecutive future frames in the bird's-eye-view (BEV) space, thereby enabling long-horizon modeling of future world states. We also introduce an efficient and adaptive text reasoning mechanism that utilizes additional social knowledge and reasoning capabilities to further improve driving performance in challenging long-tail scenarios. We present a novel, efficient, and effective approach that achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) results on the closed-loop Bench2drive benchmark. Codes are available at: https://github.com/hotdogcheesewhite/DeepSight.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种自动驾驶世界模型，通过BEV空间的语义特征并行预测和文本推理机制，在Bench2drive基准上实现了SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶系统中使用的视觉语言模型推理机制大多直接从通用领域迁移而来，缺乏针对自动驾驶场景的深度探索，特别是在视觉推理模块方面存在不足。
AI.method: 1) 提出驾驶世界模型，在BEV空间并行预测连续未来帧的潜在语义特征，实现未来世界状态的长视距建模；2) 引入高效自适应的文本推理机制，利用额外的社会知识和推理能力；3) 结合视觉推理与文本推理的并行架构。
AI.result: 在闭环Bench2drive基准上取得了最先进的性能表现，证明了方法在具有挑战性的长尾场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过专门设计的BEV空间语义特征预测和自适应文本推理机制，显著提升了自动驾驶系统的性能，为端到端自动驾驶系统提供了一种新的有效解决方案。

title: VeloGauss: Learning Physically Consistent Gaussian Velocity Fields from Videos
summary: In this paper, we aim to jointly model the geometry, appearance, and physical information of 3D scenes solely from dynamic multi-view videos, without relying on any physical priors. Existing works typically employ physical losses merely as soft constraints or integrate physical simulations into neural networks; however, these approaches often fail to effectively learn complex motion physics. Although modeling velocity fields holds the potential to capture authentic physical information, due to the lack of appropriate physical constraints, current methods are unable to correctly learn the interaction mechanisms between rigid and non-rigid particles. To address this, we propose VeloGauss, designed to learn the physical properties of complex dynamic 3D scenes without physical priors. Our method learns the velocity field for each Gaussian particle by introducing a Physics Code and a Particle Dynamics System, and ultimately incorporates Global Physical Constraints to ensure the physical consistency of the scene. Extensive experiments on four public datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms achieves state-of-the-art performance in both Novel View Interpolation and Future Frame Extrapolation tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VeloGauss方法，无需物理先验，仅从动态多视图视频中联合建模3D场景的几何、外观和物理信息，在新视角插值和未来帧外推任务上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常将物理损失仅作为软约束或将物理模拟集成到神经网络中，难以有效学习复杂运动物理；当前建模速度场的方法因缺乏适当物理约束，无法正确学习刚性和非刚性粒子间的相互作用机制。
AI.method: 提出VeloGauss框架，通过引入Physics Code和Particle Dynamics System学习每个高斯粒子的速度场，并采用Global Physical Constraints确保场景的物理一致性。
AI.result: 在四个公共数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法在New Novel View Interpolation和Future Frame Extrapolation任务上超越现有方法，达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: VeloGauss成功实现了无需物理先验的复杂动态3D场景物理属性学习，为动态场景重建和预测提供了新的有效解决方案。

title: SenseBench: A Benchmark for Remote Sensing Low-Level Visual Perception and Description in Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Low-level visual perception underpins reliable remote sensing (RS) image analysis, yet current image quality assessment (IQA) methods output uninterpretable scalar scores rather than characterizing physics-driven RS degradations, deviating markedly from the diagnostic needs of RS experts. While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) present a compelling alternative by delivering language-grounded IQA, their visual priors are heavily biased toward ground-level natural images. Consequently, whether VLMs can overcome this domain gap to perceive and articulate RS artifacts remains insufficiently studied. To bridge this gap, we propose \textbf{SenseBench}, the first dedicated diagnostic benchmark for RS low-level visual perception and description. Driven by a physics-based hierarchical taxonomy that unifies both non-reference and reference-based paradigms, SenseBench features over 10K meticulously curated instances across 6 major and 22 fine-grained RS degradation categories. Specifically, two complementary protocols are designed for evaluation: objective low-level visual \textit{perception} and subjective diagnostic \textit{description}. Comprehensive evaluation of 29 state-of-the-art VLMs reveals not only skewed domain priors and multi-distortion collapse, but also \textit{fluency illusion} and a \textit{perception-description inversion} effect. We hope SenseBench provides a robust evaluation testbed and high-quality diagnostic data to advance the development of VLMs in RS low-level perception. Code and datasets are available \href{https://github.com/Zhong-Chenchen/SenseBench}{\textcolor{blue}{here}}.

AI.tldr: SenseBench是首个专门用于遥感图像低层视觉感知与描述的诊断基准，通过构建包含10K+实例的6大类22种退化类型数据集，揭示了当前VLM在遥感领域的领域偏差、扭曲失真和错觉等问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图像质量评估方法输出难以解释的标量分数，无法满足遥感专家的物理退化诊断需求；视觉语言模型虽能提供语言化评估，但其视觉先验严重偏向地面自然图像，在遥感领域的感知能力不明确。
AI.method: 提出基于物理的层次化分类法整合无参考和有参考范式，构建包含10K+精心标注实例的数据集；设计客观低层视觉感知和主观诊断描述两种互补评估协议，对29个SOTA VLM进行综合评估。
AI.result: 29个VLM在SenseBench上表现出领域先验偏差、多失真坍塌、流利错觉和感知-描述倒置效应等问题，证实了VLM在遥感低层视觉感知方面的不足。
AI.conclusion: SenseBench为遥感低层视觉感知提供了强大的评估平台和高质量诊断数据，有助于推动VLM在遥感领域的进一步发展。

title: Polygon-mamba: Retinal vessel segmentation using polygon scanning mamba and space-frequency collaborative attention
summary: Retinal vessel segmentation is crucial for diagnosis and assessment of ocular diseases. Notably, segmentation of small retinal vessels has been consistently recognized as a challenging and complex task. To tackle this challenge, we design a hybrid CNN-Mamba fusion network that integrates polygon scanning mamba and space-frequency collaborative attention mechanism for the detection of small vessels. Considering that the traditional mamba architecture with horizontal-vertical scanning may compromise the topological integrity of target structures and result in local discontinuities in small retinal vessels, we present a polygon scanning visual state space model (PS-VSS) to identify small vessel structural features by multi-layer reverse scanning way. Which effectively preserves pixels connectivity, thereby substantially mitigating the loss of information pertaining to small vessels. Furthermore, as we all known that the spatial domain prioritizes positional and structural information, while the frequency domain emphasizes global perception and local detail components, a space-frequency collaborative attention mechanism (SFCAM) is introduced within the skip connection to extract efficient features from the spatial and frequency domains. This strategy empowers the model to dynamically enhance the key features while effectively suppressing clutters. To assess the efficacy of our model, it was tested on three publicly available datasets: DRIVE, STARE, and CHASE_DB1. Compared to manual annotations, our model demonstrated F1 scores of 0.8283, 0.8282, and 0.8251, Area Under Curve (AUC) values of 0.9806, 0.9840, and 0.9866, and Sensitivity (SE) values of of 0.8268, 0.8314, and 0.8484 across three datasets, respectively. The effectiveness of our model was validated through both visual inspection and quantitative analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合多边形扫描Mamba和空间-频率协同注意力的混合CNN-Mamba融合网络，专门用于解决视网膜小血管分割的挑战。
AI.motivation: 视网膜血管分割对眼部疾病诊断至关重要，其中小血管分割一直被认为是极具挑战性的复杂任务。传统的Mamba架构采用水平-垂直扫描方式可能会破坏目标结构的拓扑完整性，导致小血管局部不连续。
AI.method: 设计了混合CNN-Mamba融合网络，包含两个关键技术：1) 多边形扫描视觉状态空间模型(PS-VSS)，通过多层反向扫描方式识别小血管结构特征，有效保持像素连通性；2) 空间-频率协同注意力机制(SFCAM)，在跳跃连接中提取空间和频率域的高效特征，动态增强关键特征并抑制杂波。
AI.result: 在DRIVE、STARE和CHASE_DB1三个公开数据集上测试，模型分别达到F1分数0.8283、0.8282、0.8251，AUC值0.9806、0.9840、0.9866，敏感度0.8268、0.8314、0.8484，通过视觉检查和定量分析验证了模型的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的混合CNN-Mamba融合网络通过创新的多边形扫描机制和空间-频率协同注意力，有效解决了视网膜小血管分割中的拓扑完整性问题，为眼部疾病诊断提供了可靠的技术支撑。

title: FrequencyCT: Frequency domain pseudo-label generation for self-supervised low-dose CT denoising
summary: Despite extensive research on computed tomography (CT) denoising, few studies exploit projection-domain data characteristics to mitigate noise correlation. To address this, this work proposes FrequencyCT, the first zero-shot self-supervised method for pseudo-label generation in the frequency domain for low-dose CT denoising. Leveraging the characteristic of the frequency domain that largely isolates noise from clean signals, a regional low-frequency anchoring technique is proposed. Phase-preserving amplitude modulation and mask perturbation in the high-frequency region generate pseudo-label data for self-supervision. The fluctuating noise variance in the projection domain prompts truncation of the generated samples to stabilize the network's optimization gradient. Evaluation results on multiple public and real-world datasets confirm the clinical application potential of this research, which will have a revolutionary impact on the field of denoising. The code can be obtained from https://github.com/yqx7150/FrequencyCT.

AI.tldr: FrequencyCT是首个零样本自监督低剂量CT去噪方法，通过在频域中利用区域低频锚定技术和相位保留的幅度调制生成伪标签，有效缓解了投影域噪声相关性问题。
AI.motivation: 虽然CT去噪已有很多研究，但很少有研究利用投影域数据特征来缓解噪声相关性。现有方法在处理频域特性方面存在不足，需要开发新的自监督方法来充分利用频域中噪声与干净信号分离的特性。
AI.method: 提出FrequencyCT方法：1) 利用频域特性将噪声与干净信号分离；2) 提出区域低频锚定技术；3) 在高频区域进行相位保留的幅度调制和掩码扰动生成伪标签数据；4) 针对投影域中波动的噪声方差对生成样本进行截断处理以稳定网络优化梯度。
AI.result: 在多个公共和真实数据集上的评估结果证实了该研究的临床应用潜力，在低剂量CT去噪任务上表现出色，显示了对去噪领域的革命性影响。
AI.conclusion: FrequencyCT作为首个零样本自监督频域伪标签生成方法，有效解决了投影域噪声相关性问题，具有显著的临床应用价值，将对CT去噪领域产生深远影响。

title: CausalGS: Learning Physical Causality of 3D Dynamic Scenes with Gaussian Representations
summary: Learning a physical model from video data that can comprehend physical laws and predict the future trajectories of objects is a formidable challenge in artificial intelligence. Prior approaches either leverage various Partial Differential Equations (PDEs) as soft constraints in the form of PINN losses, or integrate physics simulators into neural networks; however, they often rely on strong priors or high-quality geometry reconstruction. In this paper, we propose CausalGS, a framework that learns the causal dynamics of complex dynamic 3D scenes solely from multi-view videos, while dispensing with the reliance on explicit priors. At its core is an inverse physics inference module that decouples the complex dynamics problem from the video into the joint inference of two factors: the initial velocity field representing the scene's kinematics, and the intrinsic material properties governing its dynamics. This inferred physical information is then utilized within a differentiable physics simulator to guide the learning process in a physics-regularized manner. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CausalGS surpasses the state-of-the-art on the highly challenging task of long-term future frame extrapolation, while also exhibiting advanced performance in novel view interpolation. Crucially, our work shows that, without any human annotation, the model is able to learn the complex interactions between multiple physical properties and understand the causal relationships driving the scene's dynamic evolution, solely from visual observations.

AI.tldr: CausalGS是一个仅从多视角视频学习复杂动态3D场景因果动力学的新框架，无需先验知识，实现了长期未来帧预测和新视角插值。
AI.motivation: 现有方法从视频学习物理模型要么需要强先验知识，要么依赖高质量几何重建，限制了其实际应用。需要一种能够直接从视觉观察中学习物理规律并预测未来的方法。
AI.method: 提出CausalGS框架，核心是逆物理推理模块，将复杂动力学问题分解为初始速度场（运动学）和内在材料属性（动力学）的联合推理，然后利用可微分物理模拟器以物理正则化方式指导学习过程。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的长期未来帧外推任务上超越了最先进方法，同时在新视角插值方面也表现出色。模型能够仅从视觉观察中学习多种物理属性间的复杂相互作用。
AI.conclusion: 证明了无需人工标注，模型可以仅从视觉观察中学习驱动场景动态演化的因果关系，为从原始视觉数据无监督学习物理规律开辟了新途径。

title: Thinking with Novel Views: A Systematic Analysis of Generative-Augmented Spatial Intelligence
summary: Current Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) struggle with spatial reasoning tasks requiring viewpoint-dependent understanding, largely because they are confined to a single, static observation. We propose Thinking with Novel Views (TwNV), a paradigm that integrates generative novel-view synthesis into the reasoning loop: a Reasoner LMM identifies spatial ambiguity, instructs a Painter to synthesize an alternative viewpoint, and re-examines the scene with the additional evidence. Through systematic experiments we address three research questions. (1) Instruction format: numerical camera-pose specifications yield more reliable view control than free-form language. (2) Generation fidelity: synthesized view quality is tightly coupled with downstream spatial accuracy. (3) Inference-time visual scaling: iterative multi-turn view refinement further improves performance, echoing recent scaling trends in language reasoning. Across four spatial subtask categories and four LMM architectures (both closed- and open-source), TwNV consistently improves accuracy by +1.3 to +3.9 pp, with the largest gains on viewpoint-sensitive subtasks. These results establish novel-view generation as a practical lever for advancing spatial intelligence of LMMs.

AI.tldr: 提出了思考新视角(TwNV)方法，将生成式新颖视角合成集成到多模态模型的推理循环中，显著提升了空间推理能力。
AI.motivation: 当前大型多模态模型在需要视角依赖理解的空间推理任务上表现不佳，主要是因为它们局限于单一静态观察视角。
AI.method: 设计了TwNV框架：推理器LMM识别空间歧义，指导画师合成替代视角，然后基于补充的证据重新检查场景。通过三方面实验研究：指令格式、生成保真度和推理时视觉扩展。
AI.result: 在四种空间子任务和四种LMM架构上，TwNV将准确率提高了1.3-3.9个百分点，在视角敏感的子任务上提升最大。数值相机位姿指令比自由形式语言更可靠，合成视角质量与下游空间精度紧密相关。
AI.conclusion: 新颖视角生成是提升多模态模型空间智能的实用杠杆，为LMM空间推理能力的发展提供了新的技术路径。

title: Segment Anything with Robust Uncertainty-Accuracy Correlation
summary: Despite strong zero-shot performance, SAM is unreliable under domain shift due to Mask-level Confidence Confusion (MCC), where a single IoU-based mask score fails to reflect pixel-wise reliability near boundaries. Motivated by the contrast between texture-biased shortcuts in neural networks and shape-centric processing in human vision, we model out-of-domain variation as appearance shifts and non-rigid deformations that jointly stress calibration. We propose Segment Anything with Robust Uncertainty-Accuracy Correlation (RUAC) for robust pixel-wise uncertainty estimation under appearance and deformation shifts. RUAC adds a lightweight uncertainty head, trains it with a collaborative style-deformation attack that jointly perturbs texture and geometry, and applies Uncertainty-Accuracy Alignment to ensure uncertainty consistently highlights erroneous pixels even under adversarial perturbations. Across 23 zero-shot domains, RUAC improves segmentation quality and yields more faithful uncertainty with stronger uncertainty-accuracy correlation. Project page: https://github.com/HongyouZhou/ruac.git.

AI.tldr: RUAC通过解决SAM的掩码级置信度混淆问题，在23个零样本领域实现了更鲁棒的分割质量和更可靠的不确定性估计。
AI.motivation: SAM在域偏移下表现不可靠，其基于IoU的单一掩码分数无法准确反映边界附近的像素级可靠性。受神经网络纹理偏置与人类视觉形状中心化处理差异的启发，研究者将域外变异建模为appearance shifts和非刚性变形的联合作用。
AI.method: RUAC为SAM添加轻量级不确定性头，采用协同风格-变形攻击联合扰动纹理和几何特征进行训练，并应用不确定性-准确性对齐技术，确保不确定性能够在对抗扰动下持续高亮错误像素。
AI.result: 在23个零样本领域的实验表明，RUAC不仅提升了分割质量，还产生了更忠实的不确定性估计，展现出更强的相关性。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合建模外观变化和几何变形，RUAC有效解决了SAM在域偏移下的置信度混淆问题，为像素级不确定性估计提供了鲁棒的解决方案。

title: Hypergraph-Enhanced Training-Free and Language-Free Few-Shot Anomaly Detection
summary: Few-shot anomaly detection (FSAD) has made significant strides, yet existing methods still face critical challenges: (i) dependence on task- or dataset-specific training/fine-tuning, (ii) reliance on language supervision or carefully hand-crafted prompts, and (iii) limited robustness across domains. In this paper, we introduce HyperFSAD, a novel FSAD framework that is training-free, language-free, and robust across domains, offering a powerful solution to these challenges. Built upon DINOv3 and a hypergraph-based inference mechanism, our approach performs inference without any task-specific optimization or text prompts, while remaining competitive. Specifically, we replace sensitive nearest-neighbor / top-$n$ matching with \textbf{Sparse Hyper Matching}: \textit{sparsemax} first selects the most relevant support patches, which are then aggregated into a \textit{hyperedge} as compact normal evidence to suppress background noise and distractors. We further introduce \textbf{Dual-Branch Image Scoring}, which fuses \emph{spatial anomaly evidence} from the patch-grid anomaly map with \emph{global semantic deviation} captured by support-aware CLS matching, yielding a robust image-level anomaly score in a strictly visual manner. Notably, all components of HyperFSAD are purely visual, eliminating the need for labor-intensive hand-crafted text prompts. Under the stringent training-free and language-free setting, HyperFSAD achieves state-of-the-art performance across six datasets spanning four industrial datasets (MVTecAD, VisA, MPDD, BTAD) and two medical datasets (RESC, BraTS).

AI.tldr: HyperFSAD是一个免训练、免语言监督、跨领域鲁棒的小样本异常检测框架，通过稀疏超匹配和双分支图像评分机制在多个数据集上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有FSAD方法面临三个关键挑战：需要任务/数据集特定训练调优、依赖语言监督或手工设计提示、跨领域鲁棒性有限。
AI.method: 基于DINOv3和超图推理机制，提出稀疏超匹配（使用sparsemax选择相关支持补丁并聚合成超边）和双分支图像评分（融合空间异常证据和全局语义偏差），所有组件均为纯视觉。
AI.result: 在免训练、免语言的设定下，HyperFSAD在涵盖工业（MVTecAD、VisA、MPDD、BTAD）和医疗（RESC、BraTS）的六个数据集上达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: HyperFSAD成功解决了FSAD领域的三大挑战，通过纯视觉的推理机制实现了跨领域的强大性能，为小样本异常检测提供了新的解决方案。

title: Product-of-Gaussian-Mixture Diffusion Models for Joint Nonlinear MRI Reconstruction
summary: Recently, diffusion models have attracted considerable attention for magnetic resonance image reconstruction due to their high sample quality. However, most existing methods rely on large networks with opaque time-conditioning mechanisms, and require offline coil sensitivity estimation. This results in limited interpretability of the reconstruction process and reduced flexibility in the acquisition setup. To address these limitations, we jointly reconstruct the image and the coil sensitivities by combining the parameter-efficient product-of-Gaussian-mixture diffusion model as an image prior with a classical smoothness prior on the coil sensitivities. The proposed method is fast and robust to both contrast and anatomical distribution shifts as well as changing k-space trajectories. Finally, we propose a more expressive parameterization of the image prior which improves results in denoising and magnetic resonance image reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种结合高斯混合乘积扩散模型与经典平滑性先验的方法，实现了图像和线圈灵敏度的联合重建，提高了MRI重建的可解释性和灵活性。
AI.motivation: 现有的扩散模型MRI重建方法存在网络庞大、时间调节机制不透明、需要离线估计线圈灵敏度等问题，导致重建过程可解释性差，采集设置灵活性不足。
AI.method: 将参数高效的高斯混合乘积扩散模型作为图像先验，结合线圈灵敏度的经典平滑性先验，实现图像和线圈灵敏度的联合重建；并提出更具表达力的图像先验参数化方法。
AI.result: 所提方法快速且鲁棒，能够有效处理对比度和解剖分布偏移，适应不同的k空间轨迹，在去噪和MRI重建任务中取得更好效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合重建策略和改进的先验参数化，该方法在保持重建质量的同时提升了可解释性和灵活性，为MRI重建提供了新的有效解决方案。

title: LLaVA-CKD: Bottom-Up Cascaded Knowledge Distillation for Vision-Language Models
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are successful in addressing a multitude of vision-language understanding tasks, such as Visual Question Answering (VQA), but their memory and compute requirements remain a concern for practical deployment. A promising class of techniques for mitigating this concern is Knowledge Distillation, where knowledge from a high-capacity Teacher network is transferred to a considerably smaller Student network. However, the capacity gap between the two networks is both a blessing and a curse: the smaller the Student network, the better its efficiency, and the larger the Teacher, the more knowledge it carries; yet, beyond a point, the larger capacity gap between the two leads to worse knowledge transfer. To counter this effect, we propose a bottom-up cascaded knowledge distillation (CKD) framework. Instead of treating knowledge transfer as an activity involving one high-capacity Teacher (or an ensemble of such), inspired by human formal education systems, we introduce one (potentially, more) additional Teacher(s) of intermediate capacity that gradually bring the Student network to the next level, where the next (higher-capacity) Teacher can take over. We provide a theoretical analysis in order to study the effect of cascaded distillation in the generalization performance of the Student. We apply the proposed framework on models build upon the LLaVA methodology and evaluate the derived models on seven standard, publicly available VQA benchmarks, demonstrating their SotA performance.

AI.tldr: 提出级联知识蒸馏(CKD)框架，通过中等容量教师逐步蒸馏，解决了大视觉语言模型中教师-学生容量差距过大导致知识转移效果差的问题，在7个VQA基准测试上达到最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型(VLMs)在实际部署中存在内存和计算需求的瓶颈，传统知识蒸馏方法中教师与学生网络之间的容量差距过大会导致知识转移效果不佳，需要一种更有效的知识转移机制。
AI.method: 受人类教育系统启发，提出自下而上的级联知识蒸馏框架，引入中等容量的中间教师网络，逐步将知识从高容量教师传递给学生网络，确保每一阶段的容量差距都在可控范围内。
AI.result: 基于LLaVA方法构建模型，在7个标准公开VQA基准测试上验证了所提框架的有效性，获得的模型达到了最先进的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: 级联知识蒸馏框架有效解决了大容量差距下的知识转移难题，通过渐进式的学习路径显著提升了学生模型的性能，为高效部署视觉语言模型提供了新的解决方案。

title: GenMed: A Pairwise Generative Reformulation of Medical Diagnostic Tasks
summary: Data-driven medical AI is traditionally formulated as a discriminative mapping from input $X$ to output $Y$ via a learned function $f$, which does not generalize well across heterogeneous data and modalities encountered in real-world clinical settings. In this work, we propose a fundamentally different, generative paradigm. We model the joint distribution $P(X,Y)$ using diffusion models and reframe inference as a test-time output optimization problem. By guiding the generative process to match observed inputs, our framework enables flexible, gradient-based conditioning at inference time without architectural changes or retraining, effectively supporting arbitrary and previously unseen combinations of observations. Extensive experiments demonstrate strong performance across standard and cross-modality medical image segmentation, few-shot segmentation with only 2 or 4 training samples, degraded-input segmentation, shape completion from sparse and partial observations, and zero-shot application to demonstrate generality. To support these evaluations, we curated and released a large-scale text-shape dataset derived from MedShapeNet. Our results highlight the versatility of generative joint modeling as a foundation for reusable, task-agnostic medical AI systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的生成式医学AI框架，通过建模联合分布P(X,Y)并将推理重构为测试时优化问题，实现了跨模态、少样本和零样本的通用医学图像分析。
AI.motivation: 传统的判别式医学AI方法在处理真实临床环境中的异质数据和模态时泛化能力有限，缺乏对未见过的观测组合的适应能力。
AI.method: 使用扩散模型建模输入输出的联合分布P(X,Y)，在推理时通过梯度引导生成过程来匹配观测数据，无需修改架构或重新训练即可实现灵活的条件处理。
AI.result: 在标准医学图像分割、跨模态分割、少样本分割(仅2-4个样本)、退化输入分割、稀疏观测形状补全和零样本应用等多个任务上表现出色，展示了强大的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 生成式联合建模为可重用、任务无关的医学AI系统提供了有效基础框架，具有高度的灵活性和泛化能力。

title: bViT: Investigating Single-Block Recurrence in Vision Transformers for Image Recognition
summary: Vision Transformers (ViTs) are built by stacking independently parameterized blocks, but it remains unclear how much of this depth requires layer specific transformations and how much can be realized through recurrent computation. We study this question with bViT, a single-block recurrent ViT in which one transformer block is applied repeatedly to process an image. This architecture preserves the iterative structure of a deep ViT while removing layer specific block parameterization, providing a controlled setting for studying recurrence in vision. On ImageNet-1K, a 12-step bViT-B achieves accuracy comparable to standard ViT-B under the same training recipe and computational budget, while using an order of magnitude fewer parameters. We observe that recurrent performance improves with representation width, with wider bViTs recovering much more of the performance of standard ViTs than narrow variants. We interpret this behavior as implicit depth multiplexing, where a shared block expresses multiple step-dependent computations through the evolving hidden state. Beyond ImageNet classification, bViT transfers competitively to downstream tasks and enables parameter-efficient fine-tuning. Mechanistic analyses of activations, attention and step-specific pruning show that the shared block changes its effective behavior across recurrent steps rather than simply repeating the same computation. Our results suggest that a large fraction of ViT depth can be implemented through recurrent reuse, provided that the representation space is sufficiently wide.

AI.tldr: bViT通过单一transformer模块的循环处理替代了传统ViT的多层结构，在相似计算预算下达到相当性能，参数量减少一个数量级。
AI.motivation: 探究ViT的深层结构中，哪些需要层级特定变换，哪些可以通过循环计算实现，以减少参数冗余。
AI.method: 提出bViT架构，使用单一transformer模块循环处理图像，保留迭代结构但移除层级特定参数化，研究循环机制在视觉任务中的作用。
AI.result: 12步bViT-B在ImageNet-1K上达到与标准ViT-B相当的准确率，参数量减少10倍；性能随表示宽度提升而改善，并在下游任务中表现良好；分析显示共享模块在不同循环步骤表现出不同的有效行为。
AI.conclusion: ViT的大部分深度可以通过循环重用实现，前提是表示空间足够宽，为构建更高效的视觉变换器提供了新思路。

title: Neuromorphic Monocular Depth Estimation with Uncertainty Modeling
summary: Event cameras offer distinct advantages over conventional frame-based sensors, including microsecond-level temporal resolution, high dynamic range, and low bandwidth. In this paper, we predict per-pixel depth distributions from monocular event streams using deep neural networks. We estimate uncertainty using Gaussian, log-normal, and evidential learning frameworks. We compare six event representations: spatio-temporal voxel grids with 1, 5, 10, and 20 temporal bins, the Compact Spatio-Temporal Representation (CSTR), and Time-Ordered Recent Event (TORE) volumes. Our U-Net-based models are trained on synthetic data and then fine-tuned on real sequences. We evaluate performance using absolute relative error, root mean squared error, and the area under the sparsification error. Quantitative results show that the representations perform similarly, while 10 bin log-normal and 5 bin evidential learning perform best across metrics. Our experiments demonstrate that uncertainty estimation can be successfully integrated into event-based monocular depth estimation, and be used to indicate pixels with reliable depth.

AI.tldr: 本文使用深度神经网络从单目事件流中预测像素级深度分布，比较了六种事件表示方法和三种不确定性估计框架，发现10-bin对数正态分布和5-bin证据学习效果最佳。
AI.motivation: 事件相机具有微秒级时间分辨率、高动态范围和低带宽等优势，但如何从单目事件流中准确估计深度并量化不确定性是一个挑战。
AI.method: 采用基于U-Net的架构，在合成数据上训练后在实际序列上微调，评估了六种事件表示方法（1/5/10/20时间体素网格、CSTR、TORE）和三种不确定性估计框架（高斯、对数正态、证据学习）。
AI.result: 定量结果显示不同表示方法性能相似，其中10-bin对数正态分布和5-bin证据学习在各项指标上表现最好，不确定性估计能有效标识可靠深度像素。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性估计可以成功集成到基于事件的单目深度估计中，为可靠性评估提供了有效手段，不同事件表示方法对最终性能影响相对较小。
